centers.english: a written number

examples.english: Each player has a number on the back of their shirt.
examples.chinese: 每位球员的衬衫背上都印有编号。

examples.english: I live at number 12 Liverpool Road.
examples.chinese: 我住在利物浦路12号。

examples.english: Raffle ticket number 241 wins the dinner for two at La Fiorentina.
examples.chinese: 241号奖券赢得两人在翡冷翠餐厅用餐的机会。

examples.english: The game works best with an even number of children.
examples.chinese: 玩这个游戏最好是把小孩子凑成双数。

examples.english: All the doors on this side of the street have odd numbers.
examples.chinese: 街这边的门牌号码都是奇数。

examples.english: What's your phone number?
examples.chinese: 你的电话号码是多少?

examples.english: Write your social security number in the appropriate box of the tax form.
examples.chinese: 在报税表上适当的方框里填上你的社会保障号码。

examples.english: On a cheque, write the amount in words and in figures.
examples.chinese: 支票上的金额要同时写上文字大写和数字。

examples.english: Temperatures reached double figures for the first time this spring, going as high as 14 degrees.
examples.chinese: 今春气温第一次达到两位数，升至14度。

examples.english: The inflation rate was still in single figures. less than 10%
examples.chinese: 通货膨胀率仍旧是单位数。

examples.english: The managing director earns a six-figure salary.
examples.chinese: 总经理赚取六位数的工资。

examples.english: The pond is shaped like a figure eight with a bridge across the middle.
examples.chinese: 这个池塘是数字8的形状，中间有一座桥。

examples.english: French telephone numbers have six digits.
examples.chinese: 法国的电话号码是六位数。

examples.english: This calculator can display only nine digits at a time.
examples.chinese: 这个计算器一次只能显示九位数字。

examples.english: To unlock the gate you must know the four-digit security code.
examples.chinese: 要打开大门，你必须知道四位数的密码。

examples.english: The nation has not experienced double-digit inflation for many years.
examples.chinese: 这个国家已经很多年没有两位数的通货膨胀率了。

examples.english: The European numbers 1, 2, 3 and so on, are based on Arabic numerals.
examples.chinese: 欧洲人用的数字1，2，3等是以阿拉伯数字为基础的。

examples.english: The date was written in Roman numerals -- MCMLXXXII.
examples.chinese: 日期是用罗马数字写的—MCMLXXXII〔1982〕。

centers.english: a number used in representing a quantity

examples.english: There have been several cases of tuberculosis, and the number is rising.
examples.chinese: 已经出现了好几个结核病例，而且数字还在上升。

examples.english: The number of cars on the roads increased by 22% last year.
examples.chinese: 去年马路上车辆的数量上升了22%。

examples.english: The regulations limit the number of students in each class.
examples.chinese: 条例限制每个班级的学生人数。

expressions.text: a large/small etc number of people/things etc

examples.english: An enormous number of people wrote to complain about last night's show.
examples.chinese: 有不少人写信来投诉昨晚的节目。

examples.english: Government figures published today show that unemployment is rising again.
examples.chinese: 政府今天公布的数据显示，失业人数又在上升。

examples.english: The total value of all drugs seized by the police reached a record figure of $116,000,000.
examples.chinese: 警方查获的所有毒品的总价值创下了纪录，达1.16亿美元。

examples.english: Inflation in Japan is around 3%, while the German figure is now over 4%.
examples.chinese: 日本的通货膨胀是3%左右，而德国的这一数字现已超过4%。

examples.english: Retailers are reporting their November sales figures today.
examples.chinese: 今天零售商会报告他们11月份的销售数字。

examples.english: Statistics show that the number of women managers has risen continuously for the last 25 years.
examples.chinese: 统计数字显示女性经理人员的人数在过去25年里一直在上升。

examples.english: According to the latest government statistics, 2 million people retired last year.
examples.chinese: 根据政府的最新统计数字，去年有200万人退休。

examples.english: The final toll was 83 dead and more than 100 injured.
examples.chinese: 最终的伤亡人数是83人死亡，超过100人受伤。

examples.english: The death toll from the earthquake has risen still further in the worst disaster since 1952.
examples.chinese: 这次地震的死亡人数仍继续上升，这是1952年以来最严重的灾难。

centers.english: to write or put numbers on a set of things
centers.chinese: 给一系列事物写上号码或编号

examples.english: We finished numbering the seats just as the audience began to arrive.
examples.chinese: 观众开始到达的时候，我们刚刚把座位编好号。

examples.english: The program will automatically number the pages of your reports.
examples.chinese: 这个程序会给你的报告自动加页码。

examples.english: If you don't number your answers, how will I know which questions they refer to?
examples.chinese: 如果你不给答案标上号码，我怎么知道你答的是哪一题？

examples.english: The tickets are numbered, so you can find your seat quite easily.
examples.chinese: 票上有号码，所以很容易找到座位。

examples.english: A series of numbered diagrams illustrate the results of the experiment.
examples.chinese: 一连串编了号的示意图表说明了实验的结果。

expressions.text: numbered from one/five etc to ten/fifteen etc

examples.english: The squares are numbered from one to ten.
examples.chinese: 方框标有由1到10的号码。

centers.english: two

examples.english: We've got two dogs and three cats.
examples.chinese: 我们有两只狗、三只猫。

examples.english: There used to be five churches in the town. Now there are only two.
examples.chinese: 镇上过去有五座教堂，现在只剩下两座了。

examples.english: It takes two hours to get there.
examples.chinese: 到那里要两小时。

examples.english: Two of the boys in the hockey team were sick.
examples.chinese: 曲棍球队里有两个男孩病了。

examples.english: I haven't got any stamps - could you lend me a couple?
examples.chinese: 我没有邮票了，你能借给我两张吗？

examples.english: I've got a couple of tickets for the game on Saturday.
examples.chinese: 我有两张星期六比赛的票。

examples.english: She lived in Japan for a couple of years.
examples.chinese: 她在日本住了两年。

centers.english: two people

examples.english: the couple who live next door to me
examples.chinese: 住在我隔壁的那对夫妻

examples.english: A young couple were walking hand in hand along the beach.
examples.chinese: 一对年轻情侣手牵手在海滩上散步。

examples.english: The house was bought by a young married couple.
examples.chinese: 房子由一对年轻夫妇买下了。

examples.english: They felt like a pair of burglars, enjoying themselves in someone else's house while the owner was away.
examples.chinese: 他们感觉就像一对窃贼，乘房主外出时在人家的房子里快活。

examples.english: Do the next exercise in pairs.
examples.chinese: 下一个练习两人一组进行。

examples.english: Bill and his brother were a rather odd-looking pair.
examples.chinese: 比尔和他弟弟是看上去很古怪的一对。

examples.english: a brilliant young comedy duo
examples.chinese: 一对出色的年轻喜剧搭档

examples.english: the successful management duo of Doug Livermore and Ray Clemence
examples.chinese: 一对成功的管理搭档道格·利弗莫尔和雷·克莱门丝

centers.english: two things of the same type that are used together
centers.chinese: 被一起使用的两个同类物

examples.english: I need a new pair of shoes.
examples.chinese: 我需要一双新鞋。

examples.english: the new twin bridges over the river Clyde
examples.chinese: 横跨克莱德河的两座新造的姊妹桥

examples.english: a PC with twin disk drives
examples.chinese: 有两个光盘驱动器的个人电脑

examples.english: I asked for a room with twin beds.
examples.chinese: 我要了一间有一对单人床的房间。

centers.english: each one of two people or things
centers.chinese: 两个人或物中的每一个

examples.english: We both really enjoyed the evening.
examples.chinese: 那个晚上我们两个都玩得很开心。

examples.english: I can't decide which dress to buy, I like them both.
examples.chinese: 我无法决定买哪件衣服，两件我都喜欢。

examples.english: Both drivers were injured, but not seriously.
examples.chinese: 两名驾车者都受了伤，但并不严重。

examples.english: Both of us felt ill the next day.
examples.chinese: 第二天我们两个人都感觉不舒服。

examples.english: Both of the windows had been broken.
examples.chinese: 两扇窗都被打破了。

examples.english: Both her attackers were wearing masks and gloves.
examples.chinese: 袭击她的两个人都戴着面罩和手套。

examples.english: Both her parents are doctors.
examples.chinese: 她的父母都是医生。

examples.english: My wife and I each have our own bank account.
examples.chinese: 我和妻子每人都有自己的银行账户。

examples.english: In the cup final, each player gets a medal, even the substitutes.
examples.chinese: 参加决赛的每个球员都能得到一枚奖牌，甚至连替补球员也有。

examples.english: ‘Would you like tea or coffee?’ ‘Either - I don't mind.’
examples.chinese: “你要茶还是咖啡？”“哪种都行，我无所谓。”

examples.english: You can enjoy the view from either window.
examples.chinese: 你从任何一扇窗口都能观赏景色。

examples.english: If you see either of these men, contact the police immediately.
examples.chinese: 如果你看到这两个人中的任何一个，立即和警方联系。

examples.english: She says she has never seen either of them before.
examples.chinese: 她说这两个人她以前都没见过。

examples.english: I usually drink either coke or beer.
examples.chinese: 一般我要么喝可乐，要么喝啤酒。

examples.english: ‘Do you want milk or lemon in your tea?’ ‘Neither thanks.’
examples.chinese: “你的茶里要加牛奶还是柠檬？”“都不要，谢谢。”

examples.english: The game wasn't very exciting. Neither team played well.
examples.chinese: 这场比赛不大刺激，两个队都打得不好。

examples.english: Luckily, neither of the passengers was hurt in the crash.
examples.chinese: 所幸的是，两名乘客都没有在撞车事故中受伤。

examples.english: Neither Mary nor the doctor was willing to use the word ‘cancer’.
examples.chinese: 玛丽和医生都不愿说出“癌症”这个词。

examples.english: The twins looked at one another and giggled.
examples.chinese: 这对双胞胎相互看了看，咯咯地笑了起来。

examples.english: We don't see each other so often now.
examples.chinese: 如今我们不那么经常见面了。

examples.english: They used to borrow each other's clothes.
examples.chinese: 以前他们常常借对方的衣服穿。

centers.english: someone whose brother or sister was born at the same time
centers.chinese: 某人有同时出生的兄弟或姐妹

examples.english: I never realized that you and Sammy were twins.
examples.chinese: 我从来没想到你和萨米是双胞胎。

examples.english: Joey's my twin.
examples.chinese: 乔伊是我的挛生兄弟。

examples.english: Sally and her twin sister still spend a lot of time together now that they are adults.
examples.chinese: 萨莉和她的孪生姐姐现在都已是成人了，可还是经常在一起。

examples.english: There have been a lot of interesting studies done on identical twins separated at birth.
examples.chinese: 对出生后就分开的同卵双胞胎有很多有趣的研究。

examples.english: Noelle and Craig are fraternal twins.
examples.chinese: 诺埃尔和克雷格是异卵双胞胎。

centers.english: intended for two people

examples.english: We'd like a table for two please.
examples.chinese: 我们想要一张两人桌。

examples.english: a romantic weekend in Paris for two
examples.chinese: 到巴黎的两人浪漫周末

examples.english: The room contained a double bed, a wardrobe, and a small chest of drawers.
examples.chinese: 这个房间里有一张双人床、一个衣柜和一个小五斗橱。

examples.english: Double rooms cost $80, single rooms are $50.
examples.chinese: 双人房间要80美元，单人房间是50美元。

examples.english: We all squeezed into Ralph's small two-man tent.
examples.chinese: 我们都挤进了拉尔夫那小小的双人帐篷里。

examples.english: They paddled down the river in a two-man canoe.
examples.chinese: 他们划着一只双人独木舟顺河而下。

centers.english: twice the normal size

examples.english: The band has just released a new double album.
examples.chinese: 这个乐队刚推出了一张新的双专辑。

examples.english: Last year she suffered the double blow of losing her father and discovering that she had cancer.
examples.chinese: 去年她遭受失去父亲和发现自己患上癌症的双重打击。

examples.english: A double brandy, please.
examples.chinese: 请来一杯双份白兰地。

examples.english: I ordered fish and a double portion of chips.
examples.chinese: 我要了鱼和双份的炸薯条。

examples.english: Three whiskeys, please - two singles and one double.
examples.chinese: 请来三杯威士忌—两杯单的，一杯双份的。

centers.english: when something happens two times

examples.english: The weather was great - it only rained twice in three weeks.
examples.chinese: 天气好极了，三个星期里才下了两次雨。

examples.english: She's been married twice before.
examples.chinese: 她此前已结过两次婚。

examples.english: I play golf twice a week.
examples.chinese: 我每周打两次高尔夫球。

examples.english: Staff meetings are held twice a month.
examples.chinese: 员工会议一个月举行两次。

examples.english: You should read the exam question twice over before answering it.
examples.chinese: 在答题之前你应该先把考题审读两遍。

examples.english: The company's accounts were checked twice over, the second time by an independent auditor.
examples.chinese: 该公司的账目被审查了两次，第二次是由一个独立审计师查账的。

examples.english: I've been out with Harry a couple of times, but I wouldn't call him my boyfriend.
examples.chinese: 我和哈里出去过几次，但我不会把他称作男朋友。

centers.english: consisting of two things of the same type
centers.chinese: 由两个同类型的东西组成的

examples.english: I pushed the double doors open and walked into the office.
examples.chinese: 我推开双扇门走进办公室。

examples.english: The report and photographs fitted nicely onto a double page.
examples.chinese: 报道和照片在一张双开页上配放得很妥帖。

examples.english: You cannot park on double yellow lines.
examples.chinese: 你不可以在双黄线上停车。

examples.english: It's much safer if you learn to drive in a car which has dual controls.
examples.chinese: 如果你用配有双重控制装置的汽车来学习驾驶就安全得多了。

examples.english: He found it difficult to cope with the dual pressures of work and home life.
examples.chinese: 他觉得很难应付工作和家庭生活的双重压力。

examples.english: Don Jose continued in his dual role of father and teacher to his son.
examples.chinese: 唐·何塞继续对儿子履行其亦父亦师的双重角色。

examples.english: The magistrate's court has a dual function: to try minor cases and consider whether in more serious cases there is enough evidence for a trial to take place.
examples.chinese: 地方治安法庭具有双重职能：审理罪行较轻的案件，以及斟酌较为严重的案件是否有足够的证据进行审讯。

examples.english: He has dual nationality because his father was born in Pakistan and his mother is British.
examples.chinese: 他有双重国籍，因为他父亲在巴基斯坦出生，母亲是英国人。

examples.english: My reasons for leaving are twofold.
examples.chinese: 我要离开的原因有两个。

examples.english: This new legislation will have a twofold effect on businesses.
examples.chinese: 这条新法规对工商企业将产生双重影响。

centers.english: when a number or amount is twice as big as another
centers.chinese: 某一数字或数量是另一个的两倍

examples.english: This sweater would have cost twice as much if I'd bought it in England.
examples.chinese: 这件毛衣我如果在英国买的话就要贵一倍。

expressions.text: twice the size/my salary/his age etc

examples.english: He married a woman who was twice his age.
examples.chinese: 他和一个年龄比他大一倍的女人结了婚。

examples.english: It's about twice the length of a football field.
examples.chinese: 它大约是足球场长度的两倍。

examples.english: Full cream milk contains about twice the fat of skimmed milk.
examples.chinese: 全脂牛奶所含的脂肪是脱脂牛奶的两倍。

examples.english: Over 30% of marriages end in divorce, which is double the number 20 years ago.
examples.chinese: 超过30%的婚姻以离婚告终，这个数字是20年前的两倍。

examples.english: The house is now worth double the amount we paid for it.
examples.chinese: 这幢房子的价值比我们当初买下时翻了一番。

examples.english: The last ten years have seen a twofold increase in the numbers of deaths on the road.
examples.chinese: 过去十年里死于道路交通事故的人数增加了一倍。

centers.english: happening, existing, done etc first
centers.chinese: 最先发生的、存在、做的等

examples.english: Laurie's name was first on the list.
examples.chinese: 劳丽的名字在名单上是第一个。

examples.english: I still remember my first day of school.
examples.chinese: 我仍记得第一天上学的情形。

examples.english: She had her first baby in 1998.
examples.chinese: 她的第一个孩子是1998年生的。

examples.english: I've only read the first chapter, but it seems like a really good book.
examples.chinese: 这本书我只看了第一章，但似乎是一本很不错的书。

examples.english: The first thing I ever had published was an article for the Boy Scout magazine.
examples.chinese: 我刊出的第一篇东西是为《男童子军》杂志写的一篇文章。

examples.english: I always read the sports page of the newspaper first.
examples.chinese: 我总是先读报纸的体育版。

examples.english: Shall we go out now, or do you want to eat first?
examples.chinese: 我们现在出去，还是你想先吃东西？

examples.english: I'll help you with your homework, but first let me finish the dishes.
examples.chinese: 我会帮你一起做家庭作业，但让我先把碗碟洗了。

examples.english: First of all, fry the onions.
examples.chinese: 首先，把洋葱油炸一下。

examples.english: First of all, let me welcome everyone to the meeting.
examples.chinese: 首先，让我来欢迎各位出席这次会议。

examples.english: First of all I went to tell my wife and then my daughter and son-in-law what had happened.
examples.chinese: 首先我告诉了妻子，然后是告诉女儿和女婿发生了什么事。

examples.english: The house still has its original stone floors.
examples.chinese: 这房子仍保留着原先的石地板。

examples.english: Our original plan was to go camping, but it was pouring with rain.
examples.chinese: 我们原先的计划是去野营，但下着倾盆大雨。

examples.english: My initial reaction was one of complete disbelief.
examples.chinese: 我最初的反应是完全不相信。

examples.english: After the initial shock, people adjusted to the new circumstances.
examples.chinese: 最初的震惊过后，人们就逐渐适应了新的环境。

examples.english: Initial difficulties with the computer system were soon fixed.
examples.chinese: 电脑系统最初的问题很快就解决了。

examples.english: I was only involved in the initial stages of the planning.
examples.chinese: 我只参与了最初几个规划阶段。

examples.english: Classes in gun handling are recommended as the initial step for those who want to own a handgun.
examples.chinese: 建议想要拥有手枪的人把去参加枪支使用培训班作为第一步。

examples.english: Far fewer people have applied for the visas than the government initially expected.
examples.chinese: 申请签证的人数比政府原先预计的要少得多。

examples.english: ‘The Comedy of Errors’ is one of Shakespeare's earliest plays.
examples.chinese: 《错误的喜剧》是莎士比亚最早的剧本之一。

examples.english: The earliest form of transport was probably some kind of sledge.
examples.chinese: 最早的交通工具可能是某种雪橇。

examples.english: Ginger was one of the earliest oriental spices known to Europeans.
examples.chinese: 姜是欧洲人最早认识的东方调味品之一。

examples.english: The first time I went on a plane I was really nervous.
examples.chinese: 我第一次坐飞机时非常紧张。

examples.english: It was the first time that she had seen her mother cry.
examples.chinese: 那是她第一次见到母亲哭泣。

examples.english: For the first time, representatives from the two countries will talk at a conference table.
examples.chinese: 两国的代表将第一次坐到会议桌上谈判。

examples.english: An unprecedented number of cars entered the race.
examples.chinese: 参加比赛的汽车之多前所未有。

examples.english: The police took the unprecedented step of publishing the victim's photograph.
examples.chinese: 警方公布了被害者的相片，这是史无前例的。

examples.english: The depression that started in mid-1929 was a catastrophe of unprecedented dimensions for the United States.
examples.chinese: 始于1929年中期的经济萧条对美国来说是一场规模空前的灾难。

centers.english: first in a race or competition
centers.chinese: 在比赛或竞赛中获第一

examples.english: Jones came first in the 200 metres.
examples.chinese: 琼斯在200米赛跑中获第一名。

examples.english: Maryam was first to cross the line, in just 12 seconds.
examples.chinese: 马娅姆第一个冲过了终点线，只用了12秒。

examples.english: Krzystof finished first among the 147 professional cyclists.
examples.chinese: 克日什托夫在147名专业自行车运动员中第一个冲过终点线。

centers.english: when something is the first thing you want to say
centers.chinese: 某事是你想说的第一件事

examples.english: I wanted to change schools, firstly because I didn't like the teacher and secondly because it was too far away.
examples.chinese: 我要换学校，首先我不喜欢这老师，其次它太远了。

examples.english: First, may I say that I am extremely grateful for the trust my colleagues have put in me.
examples.chinese: 首先请允许我对同事们表示由衷的感激，他们对我很信任。

examples.english: African leaders are worried, firstly about the official flow of aid, and also about levels of private investment.
examples.chinese: 非洲的领导人首先是担心官方援助的提供，同时也担心私人投资的水平。

examples.english: Freddy, first of all, I didn't flirt with him. He flirted with me.
examples.chinese: 弗雷迪，首先我没和他打情骂俏，是他想和我打情骂俏。

examples.english: I called the book ‘Drum Planet’ because first of all, there are drums in every culture.
examples.chinese: 我把该书起名为《鼓的行星》，首先因为在每种文化中都有鼓。

examples.english: To start with, one of the biggest problems in the classroom is that the kids don't get enough discipline at home.
examples.chinese: 首先班里最大的问题之一是这些孩子在家里都不够有规矩。

examples.english: Working at home is a good option, because, to begin with, what's the point of driving two hours a day just to sit in front of a computer?
examples.chinese: 在家上班是个很好的选择，首先因为一天开两小时车就为了坐在电脑前有什么意思呢？

expressions.text: in the first place/ for a start

examples.english: In the first place, they have a more experienced team, so they're more likely to win.
examples.chinese: 首先他们的球队有更多经验，所以他们更有可能赢。

examples.english: We haven't made a decision, because, in the first place, we do not know enough at this point.
examples.chinese: 我们还未决定，因为首先我们目前对情况了解得不够多。

examples.english: For a start, someone's sex should not matter in a job interview.
examples.chinese: 第一，个人的性别不应该影响到求职面试。

examples.english: Before I start, I'd like to thank everyone for coming.
examples.chinese: 进入正题以前，我要感谢各位的光临。

examples.english: All right, before I start, could everyone please stand up and introduce themselves.
examples.chinese: 好，首先请各位起立作一下自我介绍。

centers.english: someone's first performance, appearance, or speech
centers.chinese: 某人的首次演出、出场或讲话

examples.english: ‘Little Man Tate’ was Jodie Foster's directorial debut.
examples.chinese: 《我的天才宝贝》是乔迪福斯特导演的第一部影片。

examples.english: This is his debut for his new club, Manchester United.
examples.chinese: 这是他为新转入的曼联队踢的首场比赛。

examples.english: Charlie Chaplin made his film debut in 1913.
examples.chinese: 查利·卓别林于1913年首次登上银幕。

examples.english: I've been invited to the premiere of the new Schliessman play.
examples.chinese: 我被邀请出席施利斯曼新戏的首演。

examples.english: Music-lovers gathered in Boston for the world premiere of Gershwin's opera, ‘Porgy and Bess’.
examples.chinese: 音乐爱好者聚集在波士顿来参加格什温的歌剧《波吉与贝丝》的全球首次公演。

examples.english: ‘Singing in the Rain’ begins with its stars attending a movie premiere.
examples.chinese: 《雨中曲》开始时是影星们在参加一次电影首映式。

examples.english: The Titanic sank on its maiden voyage.
examples.chinese: 泰坦尼克号首航时沉没了。

examples.english: Two jets crashed on their maiden flights last year.
examples.chinese: 去年有两架飞机在首次飞行中失事。

examples.english: The new prime minister admitted that her maiden speech had been too long.
examples.chinese: 新首相承认她的首次讲演太冗长了。

examples.english: The inaugural address drew a large audience.
examples.chinese: 就职演讲吸引了大批听众。

examples.english: Professor Eston gave the inaugural lecture in 1860.
examples.chinese: 伊斯顿教授在1860年作了首次讲座。

centers.english: to do something that has never been done before

expressions.text: be the first to do something

examples.english: The Spanish were the first to keep cattle in the American deserts.
examples.chinese: 西班牙人是首先在美洲的沙漠上养牛的人。

examples.english: She was the first to see the link between poverty and poor health.
examples.chinese: 她是第一个看出贫困与健康不佳之间关系的人。

expressions.text: be the first person to do something

examples.english: Yuri Gagarin became the first man to fly in space.
examples.chinese: 尤里·加加林是第一个作太空飞行的人。

examples.english: Once the Japanese had shown the way, manufacturers in other countries soon began to use robots on a large scale.
examples.chinese: 日本人带头之后，其他国家的制造商也都很快大规模地使用机器人。

expressions.text: lead the way in doing something

examples.english: The company has led the way in developing environmentally friendly products.
examples.chinese: 该公司在开发环保产品方面带了头。

examples.english: The special effects in the movie included things that had never been done before.
examples.chinese: 这部影片中的特技效果有些是前所未有的。

examples.english: Because of advances in technology, we are able to try something that has never been attempted before.
examples.chinese: 由于技术的进步，我们能够尝试一些从未尝试过的事。

examples.english: He pioneered techniques for photographing moving objects.
examples.chinese: 他为拍摄移动物体开创了新技术。

examples.english: Heart-transplant surgery was pioneered by Professor Christiaan Barnard.
examples.chinese: 心脏移植手术是由克里斯蒂安·巴纳德教授开创的。

examples.english: She became famous as a pioneer of the person who pioneered prison reform.
examples.chinese: 她作为监狱改革的先驱而闻名于世。

examples.english: Her pioneering work in the field of education will be remembered.
examples.chinese: 她在教育领域所做的开拓性工作将流芳后世。

examples.english: Cowley's pioneering development of modern emergency medicine helped save countless lives.
examples.chinese: 考利对现代急救医学的开拓性发展拯救了无数人的生命。

examples.english: Roosevelt's social reform program broke new ground.
examples.chinese: 罗斯福的社会改革计划开辟了新的天地。

examples.english: The album is enjoyable, but breaks no new ground.
examples.chinese: 这个专辑很好听，但没有新意。

examples.english: There's a lot of new ground being broken in the field of genetic research.
examples.chinese: 基因研究领域有许多创新。

examples.english: He won praise as governor for his ground-breaking educational reforms.
examples.chinese: 作为推行创新教育改革的州长，他受人称赞。

examples.english: The governor urged teachers to break the mold in establishing new ways of teaching.
examples.chinese: 州长鼓励教师破除陈规，创出新的教学方法。

examples.english: The new party promised to break the mould of British politics.
examples.chinese: 新政党答应要打破英国政治的陈规旧习。

centers.english: something that is the first

examples.english: If an animated film was nominated as best picture, it would be a first.
examples.chinese: 如果动画影片被提名为最佳影片，那将是第一次。

examples.english: Roger Bannister's four-minute mile was a notable first in the history of athletics.
examples.chinese: 罗杰·班尼斯特四分钟跑一英里在运动史上是引人注目的新纪录。

examples.english: During the 1960's, the Soviet Union achieved a series of firsts in space exploration.
examples.chinese: 在20世纪60年代，苏联在太空探索中做出一连串创举。

examples.english: Delivering a baby on the job was a first for the two police officers.
examples.chinese: 执勤时接生婴儿对这两位警察来说是新鲜事。

examples.english: No damage to the prototype aircraft was reported after its first test flight.
examples.chinese: 样机首次试飞后没有接到损坏的报告。

examples.english: Pilots have begun testing a prototype of the new aircraft.
examples.chinese: 飞行员已经开始试飞这种新式飞机的原型了。

examples.english: The prototype of this particular computer was developed by an American in 1975.
examples.chinese: 这种电脑的原型是由一位美国人于1975年研制的。

examples.english: Within a year, the company expects to have a prototype for military use.
examples.chinese: 一年不到，该公司期望生产出一种供军用的样品。

examples.english: I wasn't sure whether the portrait was an excellent copy or the original.
examples.chinese: 我无法确定这幅肖像画是出色的临摹本还是原作。

examples.english: This is a photograph of the manuscript. The original is in the city museum.
examples.chinese: 这是手稿的照片。原稿在市博物馆里。

examples.english: Only a millionaire could afford to buy an original Picasso a picture by Picasso that is not a copy.
examples.chinese: 只有百万富翁才能买得起毕加索的原作。

examples.english: The first-generation digital televisions cost over $2000.
examples.chinese: 第一代数字电视机要2,000多美元一台。

examples.english: There were a variety of problems common to first-generation computer software programs.
examples.chinese: 第一代的电脑软件程序存在各种各样的常见问题。

examples.english: The first generation of cellular phones used analog transmitters and receivers.
examples.chinese: 第一代手机使用了模拟传输器和接收器。

centers.english: on one occasion in the past

examples.english: They had met once on holiday, so they knew each other slightly.
examples.chinese: 他们度假的时候见过一面，所以彼此有点认识。

examples.english: She once called me a liar and I've never forgiven her.
examples.chinese: 她有一次说我是骗子，我一直没有原谅她。

examples.english: I remember once it snowed on my birthday, and I was so excited.
examples.chinese: 记得有一次我生日那天正好下雪，我多么兴奋啊。

examples.english: I remember coming home from school one time and finding we'd been burgled.
examples.chinese: 我记得有一次放学回家发现家里被盗了。

examples.english: One time we went out fishing on the lake at night.
examples.chinese: 有一次，我们夜里到湖上去钓鱼。

examples.english: On one occasion, she rang his home and a strange woman answered.
examples.chinese: 有一次，她打电话到他家里，接电话的是一个陌生的女人。

examples.english: She had some pretty frightening experiences. On one occasion her jeep was hijacked by a group of armed soldiers.
examples.chinese: 她有过几次可怕的经历。有一回，她的吉普车被一群武装士兵劫持了。

examples.english: I dieted for many years, and at one stage I weighed only 71 kg.
examples.chinese: 我节食了好多年，有一段时间体重只有71公斤。

examples.english: It was a terrible winter. At one stage all the roads to the village were blocked by snow.
examples.chinese: 那个冬天糟透了，有一段时间通往村里的所有道路都被大雪封锁了。

examples.english: At one stage in the match, he was trailing by three games, but he managed to fight back.
examples.chinese: 比赛中有一段时间他落后三局，但他最终反败为胜。

examples.english: At one point in the interview, he seemed close to tears.
examples.chinese: 访问中有一刻他差点落下眼泪。

examples.english: ‘You play the piano very well,’ I remember Mrs Saito remarking at one point.
examples.chinese: “你钢琴弹得非常好。”我记得斋藤夫人有一次这样说道。

examples.english: I had several narrow escapes during the war, at one point just missing death when my plane was shot down.
examples.chinese: 战争中我几次死里逃生，有一次我的飞机被击落，我差点送命。

examples.english: I was sitting eating my breakfast one day when the telephone rang.
examples.chinese: 有一天我正坐着吃早餐，电话铃响了。

examples.english: One day when we had nothing else to do, we went down to the river for a swim.
examples.chinese: 有一天我们没有其他事可做，就到河里去游泳。

examples.english: He used to come and go, then one day he went away and never came back.
examples.chinese: 他过去总是去了又来，可后来有一天他走了就再也没回来过。

centers.english: only one, or only a small number

examples.english: There was only one dress that she really liked.
examples.chinese: 只有一条裙子她是真的喜欢的。

examples.english: Only rich people were able to travel abroad in those days.
examples.chinese: 那个时候只有富人才能出国旅游。

examples.english: You can only take one piece of hand baggage onto the plane.
examples.chinese: 你只能带一件手提行李上飞机。

examples.english: You get only two chances - if you fail the exam twice you can't take it again.
examples.chinese: 你只有两次机会——两次还考不及格的话就不能补考了。

examples.english: She's the only woman I've ever loved.
examples.chinese: 她是我唯一爱过的女人。

examples.english: These seats are only for first class passengers.
examples.chinese: 这些座位只给头等舱的乘客坐。

examples.english: ‘Were there a lot of people there?’ ‘No, just me and David.’
examples.chinese: “那里有很多人吗？”“没有，只有我和戴维。”

examples.english: He started his own small shop - at first just selling newspapers, then books and magazines.
examples.chinese: 他自己开了一家小店——初时只卖报纸，后来卖书和杂志。

examples.english: ‘Does everyone have to wear uniform?’ ‘No, just the first year students.’
examples.chinese: “每个人都得穿校服吗？”“不用，只有一年级学生要穿。”

examples.english: All Kevin ever talks about is football.
examples.chinese: 凯文的话题全都是足球。

examples.english: We were really hungry, but all we could find was some stale bread.
examples.chinese: 我们很饿，但是能找到的只有一些变了味的面包。

examples.english: All I wanted was a bit of sympathy.
examples.chinese: 我所需要的只是一点点同情。

examples.english: There was nothing but salad to eat.
examples.chinese: 除了沙拉没有东西可吃。

examples.english: They did nothing but argue for the whole journey.
examples.chinese: 他们一路上就只有吵架。

examples.english: She was the one friend that I could trust.
examples.chinese: 她是我唯一一个可以信任的朋友。

examples.english: The one thing I don't like about my car is the colour.
examples.chinese: 关于我的车，我唯一不喜欢的地方就是它的颜色。

examples.english: The one time I forgot my umbrella was the day it rained.
examples.chinese: 我只有一次忘了带伞，那天偏巧下雨了。

examples.english: My one regret is that I never told Brad how I felt.
examples.chinese: 我唯一的遗憾是没有把我的感受告诉布拉德。

examples.english: A lone gunman burst into his house and shot him dead.
examples.chinese: 一名独行的持枪歹徒闯进他的屋子，开枪打死了他。

examples.english: Out of the stillness, a lone bird began to sing.
examples.chinese: 一只鸟儿唱起了歌，打破了寂静。

examples.english: A solitary light shone in the street.
examples.chinese: 街上只亮着孤零零的一盏灯。

examples.english: There was one solitary hotel left standing after the earthquake.
examples.chinese: 地震过后只有一家旅馆没有倒下。

examples.english: I could see a solitary figure outlined against the horizon.
examples.chinese: 我看到地平线上现出一个孤单的身影。

examples.english: Everyone ignored my sole contribution to the conversation.
examples.chinese: 就我一个人在说话，大家都不理睬我。

examples.english: In many households, the woman is the sole breadwinner the only person who has a job.
examples.chinese: 在许多家庭中，女人是唯一挣钱养家的人。

expressions.text: with the sole intention/objective/aim of doing something

examples.english: I think he came here with the sole intention of causing trouble.
examples.chinese: 我觉得他来这里唯一的目的就是捣乱。

examples.english: NASA's sole concern was the safety of the astronauts.
examples.chinese: 美国国家航空航天局唯一关心的是宇航员的安全。

examples.english: This shop sells clothes made exclusively of Indian materials.
examples.chinese: 这家商店出售专用印度布料做的衣服。

examples.english: The office staff are almost exclusively female.
examples.chinese: 这个办公室的职员几乎清一色全是女性。

centers.english: a surprisingly small price/number/amount.
centers.chinese: 价格出奇地低，数量出奇地少

examples.english: I got these four chairs for only $99.
examples.chinese: 我买这四把椅子才99美元。

examples.english: We only have a very small garden.
examples.chinese: 我们只有一个很小的花园。

examples.english: ‘Is it far?’ ‘No, it's only a mile away.’
examples.chinese: “远吗？”“不远，只有一英里路。”

examples.english: She was only 17 when she got married.
examples.chinese: 她结婚时才17岁。

examples.english: There is a beautiful park just 300 metres from the busiest shopping street.
examples.chinese: 离最繁华的商业街只有300米远的地方有一个漂亮的公园。

examples.english: It took the firefighters just three minutes to arrive.
examples.chinese: 消防员只用了三分钟就赶到了。

examples.english: His car hit a wall, but he escaped with just cuts and bruises.
examples.chinese: 他的汽车撞到了墙上，不过他只是受了点轻伤。

expressions.text: just a little/ just a bit

examples.english: ‘Do you take milk?’ ‘Just a little, please.’
examples.chinese: “你要加奶吗？”“只加一点点，谢谢。”

examples.english: ‘The tickets are $10.’ ‘Is that all?’
examples.chinese: “票价一共十美元。”“就这点?”

examples.english: Is that all the money you've got?
examples.chinese: 你就只有这点钱吗？

examples.english: You can now buy computers from a mere £300.
examples.chinese: 现在只要300英镑就能买一台电脑了。

examples.english: The crossword took him a mere six and a half minutes.
examples.chinese: 这个填字游戏只花了他六分半钟。

examples.english: We were standing no more than 10 yards away from the scene of the crime and we didn't realize it.
examples.chinese: 我们站的地方离案发现场仅仅十码远，但我们却不知道。

examples.english: David watched the car drive slowly away, until it was no more than a speck in the distance.
examples.chinese: 戴维目送汽车缓缓开走，直到它成了远处的一个小点。

centers.english: for one reason only and no other
centers.chinese: 只有一个原因，没有其他

examples.english: She only married him for his money.
examples.chinese: 她嫁给他只是为了钱。

examples.english: Ms Walker said she only started stealing because her children were hungry.
examples.chinese: 沃克女士说她是因为孩子挨饿才开始偷东西的。

examples.english: I think she just wanted someone to talk to.
examples.chinese: 我想她只是想找个人说说话。

examples.english: I didn't mean to interfere - I was just trying to help.
examples.chinese: 我并不是想插手—我只是想帮个忙。

examples.english: Just because he looked at them in the wrong way, they beat him up and stole his money.
examples.chinese: 他只是看了看他们，他们觉得不顺眼就痛打了他一顿，还拿了他的钱。

examples.english: The committee does not blame any individual; we are merely trying to find out how the accident happened.
examples.chinese: 委员会并不是要指责任何人，我们只是想找出事故的起因。

examples.english: You are not there to teach, but merely to supervise the children.
examples.chinese: 你去不是为了教书，你只要管好孩子们就行。

examples.english: What we have is a purely business arrangement.
examples.chinese: 我们有的是纯粹的商业协议。

examples.english: Most plants are planted purely for decoration.
examples.chinese: 大多数植物都是为了装饰才种的。

centers.english: not particularly important, special, or interesting
centers.chinese: 并不特别重要、特殊或有趣

examples.english: Don't ask me - I'm only the cleaner.
examples.chinese: 不要问我—我只是个清洁工。

examples.english: ‘What's for dinner?’ ‘Just pasta - nothing exciting.’
examples.chinese: “晚饭有什么？”“只有意大利面—没什么特别的。”

examples.english: It's just another one of those daytime talk shows.
examples.chinese: 那不过是另一个白天的清谈节目。

examples.english: The President's position is merely ceremonial; it is the Chancellor who holds real power.
examples.chinese: 总统的职位只是形式上的，掌实权的是总理。

examples.english: I wondered if the girl had meant more to him than being merely a casual friend.
examples.chinese: 我不知道这女孩是不是和他有进一步的关系，还是只是他的一位普通朋友。

examples.english: She sees him as a friend and nothing else.
examples.chinese: 她只把他当成朋友，没有别的。

examples.english: If nothing else the meeting serves as a useful way of getting everyone's ideas together.
examples.chinese: 这次会议即使没有别的作用，起码也可把大家的意见集合起来。

examples.english: How can you expect him to understand? He's a mere child.
examples.chinese: 你怎能指望他理解呢？他只不过是个孩子。

examples.english: There have been reports that she is going to resign, but it's mere speculation at the moment.
examples.chinese: 有报道说她准备辞职，不过目前这仅仅是一种猜测。

examples.english: The mere mention of Ronan's name made her heart beat faster.
examples.chinese: 只要提到罗南的名字，她就会心跳加快。

examples.english: They say they're a moral, religious regime, but in fact they're nothing but a bunch of bullies and thugs.
examples.chinese: 他们自称是一个有道德的宗教政权，但事实上他们不过是一群欺压百姓的暴徒。

examples.english: As far as I can see, this proposal is no more than an attempt to disguise many of the mistakes management have made in the past.
examples.chinese: 在我看来，这个提议只是想让管理层掩饰他们过去所犯的许多错误。

centers.english: belonging or relating to only one thing, person, or group
centers.chinese: 只属于一个物件、人或团体，或只与一个物件、人或团体有关的

examples.english: The bee orchid is a rare plant normally only found in Mediterranean climates.
examples.chinese: 蜂兰是稀有植物，一般只生长在地中海气候里。

examples.english: Women only swimming sessions are held every Thursday.
examples.chinese: 只供女士游泳的专场设在每周四。

examples.english: High impact aerobics is only for people who are extremely fit.
examples.chinese: 高冲击有氧操只适合体格非常强健的人。

examples.english: It is a disease which affects just male children.
examples.chinese: 这种疾病只发生在男童身上。

examples.english: Sam Mendes is highly regarded, not just in the UK.
examples.chinese: 萨姆·门德斯备受尊敬，不只限于英国。

examples.english: This class is just for beginners. Why don't you try the class next door?
examples.chinese: 这个班只为初学者而设，你为什么不到隔壁班去看看呢？

examples.english: Access to the files is limited to management.
examples.chinese: 只有管理层才能接触这些文件。

examples.english: The cultivation of rice has to be restricted to areas of high rainfall.
examples.chinese: 稻米只能在降雨量高的地区种植。

examples.english: So far, fighting has been confined to the capital city.
examples.chinese: 到目前为止只有首都在打仗。

examples.english: ME or "Yuppie Flu', is not just confined to people in high-powered, well-paid jobs.
examples.chinese: 慢性疲劳综合征〔又称“雅皮感冒”〕并不仅仅局限于高职位、高薪金人士。

examples.english: This type of tapestry work is unique to the region.
examples.chinese: 这一类挂毯是该地区特有的。

examples.english: Each set of genes is unique to the individual.
examples.chinese: 每一组基因都是各人特有的。

examples.english: There's something uniquely English about the scene.
examples.chinese: 这个场面具有英国特色。

examples.english: This way of grinding corn is peculiar to North American Indians.
examples.chinese: 这种碾磨谷物的方法是北美印第安人所特有的。

examples.english: a gesture peculiar to himself
examples.chinese: 他独有的一个手势

examples.english: a peculiarly South African phenomenon it is only found in South Africa
examples.chinese: 南非特有的一种现象

examples.english: There will be exclusive coverage of the championship on Channel 5.
examples.chinese: 第五频道将独家报道这项锦标赛。

examples.english: The recent takeover gave Rafferty exclusive control of the company.
examples.chinese: 最近一次收购使拉佛蒂取得了对那家公司的专控权。

examples.english: Your password gives you exclusive access to your personal computer files.
examples.chinese: 你设置了密码，就只有你一个人可以存取自己的个人电脑文件。

examples.english: Certain areas of the club are reserved exclusively for members.
examples.chinese: 会所的某些地方是专为会员预留的。

centers.english: not completely

examples.english: The road was partly blocked by a fallen tree.
examples.chinese: 一棵倒下的树堵住了部分路面。

examples.english: What he told us was only partly true.
examples.chinese: 他告诉我们的事只有一部分是真的。

examples.english: He was educated partly in Glasgow and partly in London.
examples.chinese: 他在格拉斯哥和伦敦接受过教育。

examples.english: The accident happened partly because we were having an argument in the car.
examples.chinese: 事故的部分原因是我们在车内吵架。

examples.english: The house was partially destroyed by the explosion.
examples.chinese: 房子的一部分被炸毁了。

examples.english: The ice had partially melted and there was a pool of water on the table.
examples.chinese: 冰融化了一部分，桌子上有一摊水。

examples.english: The advertising campaign was only partially successful.
examples.chinese: 广告活动只获得部分成功。

examples.english: They have asked for a partial lifting of the ban on fur trading.
examples.chinese: 他们要求局部取消对毛皮交易的禁令。

examples.english: There was a half-smoked cigarette in the ashtray.
examples.chinese: 烟灰缸里有根抽了一半的香烟。

examples.english: ‘That's good,’ he said dully, putting down his half-eaten sandwich.
examples.chinese: “好的。”他没精打采地说道，放下手中吃了一半的三明治。

examples.english: I found him sitting on his bed, half-dressed.
examples.chinese: 我发现他半裸着坐在床上。

examples.english: The houses were half-submerged by the flood water.
examples.chinese: 房屋被洪水淹了一半。

examples.english: ‘Who was he hiding from?’ ‘I'm not completely sure.’
examples.chinese: “他在躲谁？”“我不完全肯定。”

examples.english: I'm not entirely convinced that we have enough control over schools as it is.
examples.chinese: 我不完全相信我们现在对学校有足够的控制权。

examples.english: ‘So, is everything clear?’ ‘Not entirely.’
examples.chinese: “那么，都弄清了吗？”“不全清楚。”

expressions.text: to some extent/to a certain extent/up to a point

examples.english: Doing well in exams is to some extent a matter of luck.
examples.chinese: 从某种程度上说，考得好是运气。

examples.english: To a certain extent it was our own fault that we lost the contract.
examples.chinese: 从某种程度上来说，失去合同是我们自己的错。

examples.english: His figures were correct - up to a point.
examples.chinese: 从某种程度上说，他提供的数字是正确的。

examples.english: The situation has been improved to a degree in recent months.
examples.chinese: 近几个月来，形势在一定程度上有所好转。

examples.english: Golding's novel is to some degree experimental in style.
examples.chinese: 戈尔丁的小说风格在一定程度上是试验性的。

examples.english: They developed their ideas in part from important work by Paykel.
examples.chinese: 他们的想法一部分是从派克尔的重要成果中发展而来的。

examples.english: Although bad management was the major factor, the firm's problems were due in part to a fall-off in demand.
examples.chinese: 尽管经营不善是主要原因，但公司的问题部分在于需求量减少。

centers.english: a total

examples.english: You had 29 points plus 33 points, so the total is 62.
examples.chinese: 你有29分加33分，因此总数是62分。

examples.english: A company spokesperson said 28,000 jobs or 70% of the total will be cut.
examples.chinese: 一名公司发言人说要裁减28,000个职位，即员工总数的70%。

examples.english: The three defendants were jailed for a total of 30 years.
examples.chinese: 三名被告总共入狱30年。

examples.english: A total of $950 million was spent on the new transportation system.
examples.chinese: 这套新的运输系统总共花了9.5亿美元。

examples.english: The total cost was far higher than we had expected.
examples.chinese: 总成本比我们原来估计的要高得多。

examples.english: People of Chinese origin made up about 10% of the total population.
examples.chinese: 华裔人士占了总人口的大约10%。

examples.english: The Performing Arts Department's total budget for the year was $6.3 million.
examples.chinese: 表演艺术系的年度总预算为630万美元。

examples.english: Altogether 680 women took part in the conference.
examples.chinese: 总共有680名妇女参加了这次大会。

examples.english: On the wall are rows of stickers, 35 in all, each representing a team victory.
examples.chinese: 墙上是一排排的贴纸，总共有35张，每张代表了一次球队的获胜。

examples.english: The grand total for both meals was $6.73.
examples.chinese: 两顿饭总计为6.73美元。

examples.english: A grand total of six people showed up for the lecture.
examples.chinese: 总共有六个人出席了这次讲课。

examples.english: The subtotal for parts was $23. With labor costs, the bill came to $36.
examples.chinese: 零件小计为23美元。加上人工费，账单上是36美元。

examples.english: My gross annual income, before tax, is just over £18,000.
examples.chinese: 我一年的税前总收入是18,000英镑多一点。

examples.english: The company's gross earnings were up $12 million over last year.
examples.chinese: 公司的总收入较去年增加了1,200万美元。

examples.english: The gross weight of the package is 10 kilos, including the packaging.
examples.chinese: 连包装在内包裹的总重量是10公斤。

examples.english: She earns about $100,000 a year gross.
examples.chinese: 她一年总收入为100,000美元左右。

centers.english: when several numbers produce another number as a total
centers.chinese: 几个数字加起来得出的总数

examples.english: Including wine, the bill came to $70.
examples.chinese: 包括酒在内，账款一共是70美元。

examples.english: Total profits from all sources for the year came to about $15 million.
examples.chinese: 一年来自各处的利润总额大约有1,500万美元。

examples.english: Hurricane damage could reach billions of dollars.
examples.chinese: 飓风造成的损失可能高达几十亿美元。

examples.english: China's economic output is likely to reach $13 trillion within the next few years.
examples.chinese: 在今后的几年里，中国的经济产量可能达到13万亿美元。

examples.english: The city's population is expected to reach 12 million by the year 2010.
examples.chinese: 该市的人口估计到2010年将达到1,200万。

examples.english: Two plus two makes four.
examples.chinese: 2加2等于4。

examples.english: If Jane comes, that will make six of us.
examples.chinese: 如果简来的话，我们就有六个人了。

examples.english: There are eight submarines as well as the ships, making a total fleet of 34.
examples.chinese: 除了这些军舰外还有8艘潜艇，使舰队船只总数达到34艘。

examples.english: The three angles of a triangle add up to 180 degrees.
examples.chinese: 三角形的三个角加起来是180度。

examples.english: If you follow the diet exactly, it adds up to about 1,200 calories per day.
examples.chinese: 如果你严格遵照这个食谱，它每天加起来大约有1,200卡路里。

examples.english: With the hotel, the flights, and the food, it all added up to much more than I had expected.
examples.chinese: 旅馆、飞机票和饮食加起来以后远远超出了我的预算。

examples.english: Credit card fraud amounts to about $17 million a year.
examples.chinese: 信用卡诈骗案的金额一年总计达到1，700万美元左右。

examples.english: Nationally, deaths from smoking-related illnesses amount to about 30 people each day.
examples.chinese: 全国每天约有30人死于与吸烟有关的疾病。

examples.english: A thousand-word essay might amount to roughly 6,000 bytes on a computer disk.
examples.chinese: 一篇千字散文在电脑磁盘上总计约占6,000个字节。

examples.english: The company was forced to pay fines and penalties totalling $24.8.
examples.chinese: 这家公司被迫支付各项罚款，总计24.8美元。

examples.english: The number of people included in the study totalled 170.
examples.chinese: 这项研究涉及的人数共计有170人。

examples.english: The crowd of students numbered at least 2000.
examples.chinese: 聚集的学生至少有2,000人。

examples.english: In the capital, unemployed workers now number 12% of the workforce.
examples.chinese: 首都的失业人数目前占工人总数的12%。

centers.english: to get points in a game or sport

examples.english: San Francisco scored twice in the last ten minutes of the game.
examples.chinese: 圣弗朗西斯科队在比赛的最后十分钟里两次得分。

examples.english: Tottenham scored the first goal of the game.
examples.chinese: 托特纳姆热刺队在比赛中率先入球得分。

examples.english: In Scrabble you score points by making words on the board.
examples.chinese: 拼字游戏中，在板上拼出单词就能得分。

examples.english: When you get a total of 5 points it's your turn to throw the dice.
examples.chinese: 你总分达到五分时就轮到你扔骰子了。

examples.english: Stevens got only 10 goals in 41 games, and decided to leave the Boston Bruins.
examples.chinese: 在41场比赛中，史蒂文斯只取得10分，于是他决定退出波士顿棕熊队。

examples.english: Jordan made 34 points to put his team into the lead.
examples.chinese: 乔丹得了34分，使他的球队处于领先地位。

examples.english: He ran 30 yards to make his second touchdown of the quarter.
examples.chinese: 他奔跑了30码，在这一节中第二次持球触地得分。

examples.english: The batter hit a home run.
examples.chinese: 击球员击出一个本垒打。

examples.english: Greg Davis didn't disappoint his teammates, hitting six field goals in six attempts.
examples.chinese: 格雷格·戴维斯没有让他的队友失望，六次投球全中。

centers.english: when two teams or players have the same score
centers.chinese: 两个球队或两名球员得分相同

examples.english: ‘What was the result of the Barcelona v Real Madrid game?’ ‘It was a draw.’
examples.chinese: “巴塞罗那队和皇家马德里队的比赛结果如何？”“打平了。”

examples.english: The game ended in a tie.
examples.chinese: 比赛打成了平局。

expressions.text: be two all/be four all etc

examples.english: It's two all at the moment, but United seems the better team.
examples.chinese: 现在是二平，但是联队看来实力更强。

examples.english: ‘What was the final score’? ‘One all.’
examples.chinese: “最后比分是多少？”“一平。”

examples.english: Liverpool equalized in the last minute.
examples.chinese: 利物浦队在最后的一分钟里打成了平局。

examples.english: Manchester United were a goal down against Real Madrid when Bobby Charlton equalized.
examples.chinese: 曼彻斯特联队落后皇家马德里队一分，这时博比·查尔顿进球扳平了比分。

centers.english: the points scored in a game or sport

examples.english: Steve Jones is 15 points ahead.
examples.chinese: 史蒂夫·琼斯领先15分。

examples.english: Damon Hill leads the Formula 1 Championship, with 58 points from 6 races.
examples.chinese: 一级方程式锦标赛中，戴蒙·希尔6场比赛共得58分，处于领先位置。

examples.english: What's the score?
examples.chinese: 比分是多少?

examples.english: The score at half-time was 12-18.
examples.chinese: 中场休息时比分是12：18。

examples.english: The final score went up on the scoreboard, and the crowd let out a roar.
examples.chinese: 积分板上亮出了最后的比分，观众发出了欢呼。

examples.english: Goal! Right in the last minute, England have scored.
examples.chinese: 射门！就在最后的时刻，英格兰队进了一球。

examples.english: Florin Raducioiu scored four goals, putting Romania in the lead.
examples.chinese: 弗洛林·拉杜乔尤进了四球，使罗马尼亚队处于领先地位。

examples.english: Turn to BBC1 for the latest football results.
examples.chinese: 请调到英国广播公司一台收听足球赛的最新结果。

examples.english: D'you know the result of the Arsenal game?
examples.chinese: 你知道阿森纳队这场比赛的最后结果吗？

examples.english: The West Indies beat Australia by 273 runs.
examples.chinese: 西印度群岛队以273分打败了澳大利亚队。

examples.english: Camilli scored 936 runs in 12 major-league seasons.
examples.chinese: 卡米利在12个大联盟赛季中一共得了936分。

centers.english: not

examples.english: It's not boring -- it's really interesting.
examples.chinese: 这并不枯燥—其实很有意思。

examples.english: David's not stupid. He knows what's going on.
examples.chinese: 戴维不笨，他明白现在的情况。

examples.english: This period of history is not well documented.
examples.chinese: 这段时期的历史没有清楚地记录。

examples.english: We're not going on holiday this year.
examples.chinese: 今年我们不打算去度假。

examples.english: Buying a yacht isn't as expensive as you might imagine.
examples.chinese: 买游艇并没有你想的那么贵。

examples.english: ‘Are you worried about your exams?’ ‘No, I'm not.’
examples.chinese: “你担心考试吗？”“不，我不担心。”

examples.english: It's not a computer -- it's a word processor.
examples.chinese: 这不是电脑——是文字处理器。

examples.english: I wouldn't recommend the fish - it's not very nice.
examples.chinese: 我不会推荐这种鱼—不是很好吃。

examples.english: He isn't very clever, is he?
examples.chinese: 他不是很聪明，是吧？

examples.english: The figures were different, but at the time we thought it wasn't very important.
examples.chinese: 数据不一样，但我们当时觉得不是很要紧。

examples.english: It was a good film, not particularly exciting, but enjoyable.
examples.chinese: 这是部好电影，不是特别刺激，但很好看。

examples.english: Birmingham isn't a particularly beautiful city.
examples.chinese: 伯明翰不是一个特别漂亮的城市。

examples.english: I didn't particularly want to go out.
examples.chinese: 我不太想出去。

examples.english: The paint's not quite dry yet.
examples.chinese: 油漆还没有干透。

examples.english: We haven't quite finished yet.
examples.chinese: 我们还没有完全结束。

examples.english: She's not exactly fat, but she is slightly overweight.
examples.chinese: 她不算很胖，只是略微超重。

examples.english: What they're doing is not exactly dishonest, but it's not completely honest either.
examples.chinese: 他们所做的事不算很不正当，但也不是完全正当。

expressions.text: neither am I/neither does she/neither have we etc

examples.english: ‘I've never been to Australia.’ ‘No, neither have I.’
examples.chinese: “我从没去过澳大利亚。”“我也没去过。”

examples.english: Tom didn't believe a word she said, and neither did the police.
examples.chinese: 她的话汤姆一句也不信，警察也不信。

centers.english: stronger expressions meaning not
centers.chinese: 语气更强烈的表示不的用语

examples.english: She's not at all happy about the situation.
examples.chinese: 她对这个情况一点也不满意。

examples.english: The children didn't seem to be at all frightened.
examples.chinese: 孩子们好像一点也没受惊吓。

examples.english: No, no, no, that's wrong. That's not what I meant at all.
examples.chinese: 不不不，不是那样的，那根本不是我的意思。

expressions.text: by no means/not by any means

examples.english: It is by no means certain that you'll get your money back.
examples.chinese: 完全不能肯定你能不能把钱拿回来。

examples.english: It's difficult, but by no means impossible.
examples.chinese: 是困难的，但也绝不是不可能的。

examples.english: It's not clear by any means where the money is going to come from to fund this project.
examples.chinese: 从哪里去弄钱来做这个项目，一点眉目也没有。

expressions.text: not in the least/ not a bit

examples.english: You're not in the least sorry, are you?
examples.chinese: 你一点也不难过，是吧？

examples.english: My essay wasn't a bit like yours.
examples.chinese: 我的文章跟你的一点也不一样。

examples.english: ‘Was she annoyed?’ ‘Not a bit! She was delighted.’f
examples.chinese: “她生气了吗？”“一点也没有！她很开心呢。”

examples.english: Henry wasn't the least bit worried.
examples.chinese: 亨利一点也不担心。

examples.english: This will in no way influence our original decision.
examples.chinese: 这根本不会影响我们原来的决定。

examples.english: The damage is very slight and in no way reduces the value of the painting.
examples.chinese: 损坏十分轻微，根本不会降低画的价值。

examples.english: His arguments are not remotely convincing.
examples.chinese: 他的论点根本不足以服人。

examples.english: It was a stupid remark, and not remotely funny.
examples.chinese: 那是一句傻话，根本不好笑。

examples.english: She didn't seem remotely interested in anything I had to say.
examples.chinese: 她对我所说的话好像毫不感兴趣。

examples.english: They only won 1-0 - hardly a great victory!
examples.chinese: 他们只是以1:0获胜—根本算不上是大胜！

examples.english: It's hardly surprising he's upset, considering the way you've treated him!
examples.chinese: 你这么对他，他生气是绝不为怪的！

examples.english: He's hardly a world chess champion - you should be able to beat him.
examples.chinese: 他根本不是什么世界象棋冠军—你应该能赢他的。

examples.english: All these similarities could hardly be due to chance.
examples.chinese: 所有这些相似之处绝不能说是出于巧合。

examples.english: I occasionally put up a few shelves, but I'm not exactly the world's greatest handyman.
examples.chinese: 我偶尔也做几个架子，但根本不是什么能工巧匠。

examples.english: Of course, I'm no expert but that wall really looks like it's leaning over.
examples.chinese: 当然我不是专家，不过那堵墙好像真的倾斜了。

examples.english: Stephanie knows what she's doing. She's no fool.
examples.chinese: 斯蒂芬妮知道自己在干什么，她不是傻瓜。

examples.english: He's quite a bright boy I suppose, but he's no Albert Einstein.
examples.chinese: 我想他是个很聪明的男孩，不过他不是爱因斯坦。

examples.english: I can't see any use in us talking about that idea at all - it's simply not practical.
examples.chinese: 我们谈论那个想法，我看不出有任何用处——根本不切实际。

examples.english: For as long as she could remember she'd just never been interested in marriage and children.
examples.chinese: 在她的记忆里，她从来就没有对婚姻和孩子感兴趣过。

centers.english: not one thing and not the other
centers.chinese: 不是这个，也不是另一个

examples.english: Neither side in the dispute seems willing to make any compromise.
examples.chinese: 这次纠纷双方似乎都不肯作出任何让步。

examples.english: Neither of their children had shown any particular talent for music.
examples.chinese: 他们的两个孩子在音乐方面都没有表现出特别的天赋。

examples.english: The company's chairman described the criticisms as ‘neither accurate nor fair’.
examples.chinese: 该公司主席说这些批评“既不准确也不公平”。

examples.english: Neither France nor Britain will be represented at the conference.
examples.chinese: 法国和英国都不会出席这次会议。

examples.english: She neither accepted nor rejected his offer immediately.
examples.chinese: 对他的提议，她没有立即接受，也没有马上拒绝。

expressions.text: neither one thing nor the other

examples.english: Having had one Protestant parent and one Catholic parent, I was really neither one thing nor the other.
examples.chinese: 我的父母一个是新教徒，一个是天主教徒，我则两个都不是。

examples.english: The play attempts to blend high tragedy with comedy, but just ends up being neither one thing nor the other.
examples.chinese: 这出戏试图把很悲情的悲剧和喜剧结合在一起，结果变得什么都不是。

centers.english: when there is not any of something

examples.english: I was going to offer you some cake, but there's none left.
examples.chinese: 我本来打算给你们吃些糕点，但是没有了。

examples.english: ‘Coffee?’ ‘None for me, thanks.’
examples.chinese: “来点咖啡吗？”“我不要了，谢谢。”

examples.english: None of her friends live in London.
examples.chinese: 她的朋友都不住在伦敦。

examples.english: None of my clothes fit anymore.
examples.chinese: 我的衣服都不合身了。

examples.english: Parents complain that none of the money set aside for the school has been spent on textbooks.
examples.chinese: 家长投诉说拨给学校的那笔钱没有一分用在教科书上。

examples.english: ‘Do you have any objections to the plan, John?’ ‘None at all.’
examples.chinese: “你对这个计划有什么异议吗，约翰？”“没有。”

examples.english: ‘The mayor has no tolerance for violent criminals, absolutely none,’ said a spokesperson.
examples.chinese: “市长决不姑息暴力犯罪分子，决不。一位发言人说。

examples.english: Under the Constitution, the President has no legal authority -- none whatsoever -- to commit the United States to war.
examples.chinese: 根据宪法规定，总统没有法定权力使美国投入战争—一点也没有。

examples.english: You won't find any, I'm afraid I haven't been shopping yet.
examples.chinese: 你找不到的，我还没去购物呢。

examples.english: There aren't any good book stores in town.
examples.chinese: 镇上没有好的书店。

examples.english: We won't be getting any extra-large shirts until tomorrow.
examples.chinese: 我们明天才会有特大号的衬衫。

examples.english: The clerk said he didn't have any change.
examples.chinese: 那店员说没有零钱。

examples.english: There won't be any time for questions after the lecture.
examples.chinese: 这次讲座结束后将没有时间提问。

examples.english: I haven't read any of Henry Miller's novels.
examples.chinese: 我没有看过亨利·米勒的小说。

examples.english: She asked for a copy of the ‘Boston Globe’ but there weren't any left.
examples.chinese: 她要一份《波士顿环球报》，但是卖完了。

examples.english: There are no buses on Sundays.
examples.chinese: 星期天没有公共汽车。

examples.english: a very plain room, with no pictures on the wall
examples.chinese: 一个非常朴素的房间，墙上没有画

examples.english: Do you mind having black coffee? There's no milk.
examples.chinese: 给你清咖啡行吗？没有牛奶了。

examples.english: We've had no rain for three months.
examples.chinese: 我们这儿三个月没下雨了。

examples.english: There was no room in the car for anyone else.
examples.chinese: 车里坐不下其他人了。

examples.english: I knocked on the door, but there was no reply.
examples.chinese: 我敲了敲门，但是没有人回应。

examples.english: He just started hitting her for no reason.
examples.chinese: 他无缘无故地就打起她来。

examples.english: Some athletes have no intention of getting an education while they're at college.
examples.chinese: 有些运动员上大学根本不想学习。

examples.english: There are no more classes until Monday.
examples.chinese: 星期一之前不再有课。

examples.english: There's nothing in this box.
examples.chinese: 这盒子里没有任何东西。

examples.english: Many older people don't know anything about computers.
examples.chinese: 许多年纪较大的人对电脑一窍不通。

examples.english: I switched the TV on, but nothing happened.
examples.chinese: 我打开电视机开关，可没有反应。

examples.english: ‘What are you doing?’ ‘Nothing.’
examples.chinese: “你在干什么？”“没干什么。”

examples.english: Nothing exciting ever happens in this place!
examples.chinese: 这地方从来都不会有叫人激动的事情发生！

examples.english: There was nothing to do, so we just watched TV.
examples.chinese: 我们没有什么事可做，所以只有看电视。

examples.english: She hasn't had anything to eat all day.
examples.chinese: 她一整天都没吃东西了。

examples.english: ‘Do you know anything about fixing cars?’ ‘No, nothing at all.’
examples.chinese: “你会修车吗？”“不会，一点都不会。”

examples.english: As he listened, he understood the word ‘shimai’, which means ‘sister’, but nothing else.
examples.chinese: 他听着，只听懂shimai这个词是“姐妹”的意思，其他一概不懂。

examples.english: I had nothing else to do so I cleaned the kitchen.
examples.chinese: 我没事可做，所以就打扫了厨房。

examples.english: We will make an announcement next week; we have nothing else to say until then.
examples.chinese: 我们会在下星期作出宣布，在此之前无可奉告。

examples.english: She knows absolutely zilch about marketing.
examples.chinese: 她对市场营销一窍不通。

examples.english: The federal government does zilch to help struggling farmers.
examples.chinese: 联邦政府对苦苦挣扎的农民不闻不问。

examples.english: ‘Do you have any batteries?' ’Not one. We've completely sold out."
examples.chinese: “你们有电池吗？”“一个都没有了，全卖完了。”

examples.english: According to the report, of the 10 best cities in which to do business, not one is in California.
examples.chinese: 根据这份报告，经商环境最好的十个城市中，没有一个是加州的。

examples.english: We examined over a hundred machines and not one of them was working properly.
examples.chinese: 我们检查了一百多台机器，没有一台是运作正常的。

examples.english: It all happened so fast, I didn't see a thing.
examples.chinese: 一切发生得这么快，我什么都没看到。

examples.english: Usually there were voices to be heard coming from the living room, but tonight there was not a sound.
examples.chinese: 往常都能听到客厅里有人说话的声音，但是今晚却悄无声息。

examples.english: There wasn't a scrap of food in the house.
examples.chinese: 家里一点吃的都没有。

examples.english: I haven't heard a dickybird from him all morning.
examples.chinese: 整个上午，我没有他的丁点儿消息。

examples.english: With their best player injured, England's chances of winning the game were just about nil.
examples.chinese: 英格兰队最好的球员受了伤，他们获胜的希望几乎为零。

examples.english: Refreshment facilities for long-distance bus passengers are virtually nil.
examples.chinese: 几乎没有给长途汽车乘客休息的设施。

examples.english: I hope she does some work at home. She does bugger all in the office.
examples.chinese: 我希望她在家会干点活，在公司她屁事不干。

examples.english: You'll get bugger all thanks for helping them.
examples.chinese: 你帮他们，连句谢谢都得不到。

centers.english: the number that means none

examples.english: The zip code for Annandale is zero eight eight zero one.
examples.chinese: 安嫩代尔的邮政编码是08801。

examples.english: The ZR1 can go from zero to sixty miles per hour in 4.3 seconds.
examples.chinese: ZR1跑车可以在4.3秒内从静止状态加速到每小时60英里。

examples.english: In the long run, zero inflation will bring lower interest rates.
examples.chinese: 从长远来看，零通货膨胀率会使利率降低。

examples.english: The government aims to hold the country's population at zero-growth.
examples.chinese: 政府的目标是要把国家的人口控制在零增长。

examples.english: At the end of the first half it's Spurs two, Arsenal nil.
examples.chinese: 上半场结束时热刺队两分，阿森纳队零分。

examples.english: ‘Who won?’ ‘The Yankees, five-zip.’
examples.chinese: “谁赢了？”“洋基队，五比零。”

examples.english: By a seven-nil vote, the Council passed a resolution protecting the land from development.
examples.chinese: 市议会以七比零的投票结果通过了一项决议，保护这块土地，不准开发。

examples.english: Interest rates rose by nought point three percent today.
examples.chinese: 今天利率上升了0.3%。

examples.english: ‘What did you score?’ ‘Nought out of ten.’
examples.chinese: “你得了几分？”“满分十分，一分也没得。”

examples.english: I'll be in room four-o-nine.
examples.chinese: 我将会在409号房间。

examples.english: It's an inner London phone number, so you dial o-two-o-seven.
examples.chinese: 这是伦敦市区的电话号码，所以你要拨0-2-0-7。

examples.english: One hundredth has the same value as point o one.
examples.chinese: 百分之一等于零点零一。

centers.english: less than none

examples.english: My bank statement shows a negative balance.
examples.chinese: 我的银行结单上余额显示为负数。

examples.english: Do you know how to multiply negative numbers?
examples.chinese: 你知道负数的乘法怎么算吗？

examples.english: The temperature dropped to almost minus 40.
examples.chinese: 气温降至将近零下40度了。

examples.english: a trade deficit of minus £4bn
examples.chinese: 40亿英镑的贸易赤字

centers.english: to count numbers, objects etc in order to find the total
centers.chinese: 清点数目、物品等以便算出总数

examples.english: Katherine counted her money. There was almost $50 left.
examples.chinese: 凯瑟琳点点自己的钱，差不多还剩50美元。

examples.english: Count up the number of calories you have each day.
examples.chinese: 计算一下每日摄入的卡路里总量。

examples.english: Count the kids as they get on the bus and make sure they're all here.
examples.chinese: 孩子们上车时清点人数，确保所有人都在。

examples.english: When we added up the receipts we realized we had spent too much.
examples.chinese: 我们把收据加起来，发现钱用得太多了。

examples.english: Just tot up the total and write it at the bottom.
examples.chinese: 把总数加一下，并写在底部。

examples.english: Five percent may not sound like much but it's a lot of money when you add it all up.
examples.chinese: 百分之五也许听上去不多，但是加在一起就是一大笔钱。

examples.english: Tot the whole lot up to make sure you'll have enough money to pay.
examples.chinese: 把一切加起来，确保有足够的钱支付。

examples.english: I don't know what the score was. I wasn't keeping count.
examples.chinese: 我不知道比分是多少；我没记下来。

examples.english: She was trying to keep count of how many stations they'd passed.
examples.chinese: 她在试着记下他们经过了多少个车站。

examples.english: He kept a notebook in the car to keep track of how much money he was spending on gas.
examples.chinese: 他在车里放了一个笔记本，记录汽油的开支。

examples.english: Steve kept a tally of the days he spent in prison by scratching marks on the wall.
examples.chinese: 史蒂夫在墙上划痕，以记下他在狱中的天数。

examples.english: The plastic rings help the sales assistants to keep a tally of the number of garments customers have taken into the changing rooms.
examples.chinese: 这些塑料环有助于营业员记录被顾客拿进试衣室的衣服的件数。

expressions.text: at the last count /at last coun

examples.english: At the last count, only 18 Japanese firms were making car parts in America.
examples.chinese: 根据最新统计，只有18家日本公司在美国生产汽车零件。

examples.english: There are a lot of professional athletes living in the Orlando area -- more than 100 at last count.
examples.chinese: 许多职业运动员住在奥兰多地区—根据最新统计有一百多个。

centers.english: to calculate an amount or price

examples.english: Their accountant calculated the total cost of the project.
examples.chinese: 他们的会计计算了工程的总成本。

expressions.text: calculate how much/how many/how far etc

examples.english: I began calculating how long it would take to get to the airport if I left at 4:00.
examples.chinese: 我开始计算，如果4点出发，到达机场要多长时间。

examples.english: Sally calculated that she needed $300 to pay all her bills.
examples.chinese: 萨莉算了一下，她需要300美元来支付账单。

examples.english: NASA calculations put the cost of the space program at $118 billion.
examples.chinese: 美国国家航空航天局计算该航天计划成本为1，180亿美元。

examples.english: I always use a calculator to work out percentages.
examples.chinese: 我总是用计算器来算百分比。

examples.english: Has anyone been able to figure out the answer to number seven?
examples.chinese: 有没有人能算出第七题的答案？

examples.english: ‘How much do I owe you?’ ‘I haven't worked it out yet.’
examples.chinese: “我欠你多少钱？“我还没算好。”

expressions.text: work out how much/how many/how far etc

examples.english: We need to work out how much food we'll need to take with us.
examples.chinese: 我们得算一下得带多少食物。

examples.english: I spent all of last night trying to figure out how much this wedding is going to cost me.
examples.chinese: 我昨天整晚都在计算这次婚礼我要花多少钱。

examples.english: ‘How much do I owe you for the meal?’ ‘I make it $10.50.’
examples.chinese: “这顿饭我欠你多少？”“一共10.5美元。”

examples.english: Will you count these figures again? I make the total 248, but Chris made it 249.
examples.chinese: 你能把这些数字再算算吗？我算出的总数是248，可克里斯算出的是249。

examples.english: He needs to sit down and figure out how many people are coming.
examples.chinese: 他得坐下算一算多少人会来。

examples.english: There has been criticism about the current method for figuring social security retirement benefits.
examples.chinese: 有人批评现行社会保障退休金的计算方法。

examples.english: Analysts estimate the business earned about $135 million last year.
examples.chinese: 分析家估计这家企业去年收入约1.35亿美元。

examples.english: The police department estimates that the number of violent crimes will increase this year by about 15%.
examples.chinese: 警方估计今年暴力犯罪案件会增加15%左右。

examples.english: At that point, the public sector deficit was estimated to be around £45 billion.
examples.chinese: 那时，公共部门的赤字估计在450亿英镑左右。

examples.english: Industry sources estimate the value of the ranch at $7 million.
examples.chinese: 行业消息人士估计那家牧场价值700万美元。

expressions.text: estimate how much/how many/how far etc

examples.english: Our staff will help you estimate how much fabric you will require.
examples.chinese: 我们的员工会帮助你估算你将需要多少布料。

examples.english: This computer program will assess how much is spent on each student within the school.
examples.chinese: 这种电脑程序会估算用于校内每个学生身上的费用。

examples.english: I took the ring to a jeweller to have its value assessed.
examples.chinese: 我把戒指拿到珠宝商那里去估价。

examples.english: The total value of the paintings is assessed at $20 million.
examples.chinese: 估计这些画的总价值为2,000万美元。

centers.english: to say numbers in order

examples.english: Most children know how to count by the time they start kindergarten.
examples.chinese: 大多数孩子到了上幼儿园时会数数。

examples.english: Shut your eyes, count to twenty, then come and find us.
examples.chinese: 闭上眼，数到20，然后来找我们。

examples.english: NASA has stopped the countdown for the space shuttle mission because of technical problems.
examples.chinese: 由于技术问题，美国国家航空航天局已经停止了发射航天飞机的倒计时准备。

centers.english: to add one number to another

examples.english: If you add 11 and 31, you get 42.
Add 10% to the total.
examples.chinese: 给总数加上10%。

examples.english: Twelve plus eight is twenty.
The cost is £45 plus £5 for delivery.
examples.chinese: 价格45英镑，再加5英镑的运费。

examples.english: Just 200 extra calories each day add up to one-half pound of extra body fat each week.
examples.chinese: 每天只要多摄入200卡路里热量，每周总计额外增加半磅脂肪。

examples.english: The three angles of a triangle always add up to 180 degrees.
examples.chinese: 三角形的三个内角相加必定为180度。

centers.english: to take one number away from another
centers.chinese: 从一个数字中减去另一个数字

examples.english: If you take 37 from 94 you get 57.
Take 19 away from 48 and then add 15.
examples.chinese: 48减掉19再加上15。

examples.english: To convert the temperature into Celsius, subtract 32, then multiply by 5 and divide by 9.
examples.chinese: 将温度转化为摄氏温标，先减去32，然后乘以5再除以9。

examples.english: Subtract 12 from 32.
30 minus 5 leaves 25.
Here's the twenty dollars I owe you, minus seven dollars for the movie.
examples.chinese: 还给你我欠你的20美元，减去电影票7美元。

examples.english: Marks may be deducted for illegible handwriting.
examples.chinese: 字迹潦草不清要扣分。

examples.english: Your employer will deduct income tax from your salary.
examples.chinese: 你的雇主会从你的薪金中扣除所得税。

examples.english: Your monthly repayments will be deducted from the total amount that you owe.
examples.chinese: 你每月偿还的款项将从你所欠的总数中扣掉。

centers.english: to multiply one number by another
centers.chinese: 把一个数字乘以另一数字

examples.english: If you multiply ten by seven you get seventy.
To find the price in yen, you multiply by 86.
examples.chinese: 要算出日元价格，就乘以86。

examples.english: 11 multiplied by 10 is 110.
Five times six equals thirty.
examples.chinese: 5乘以6等于30。

examples.english: What is eight times twelve?
examples.chinese: 8乘以12是多少？

centers.english: to divide one number by another
centers.chinese: 把一个数字除以另一个数字

examples.english: It is easier to divide by 10 than by 12.
examples.chinese: 用10除比用12除来得容易。

examples.english: If you divide twenty by four, you get five.
36 divided by 2 is 18.

expressions.gram: transitive phrasal verb not in progressive or passive

examples.english: 13 goes into 78 six times.
examples.chinese: 用13去除78得6。

examples.english: How many times will nine go into eighty-one?
examples.chinese: 81除以9是多少？

centers.english: to calculate or count something wrongly

examples.english: We have too many chairs. I must have miscalculated.
examples.chinese: 我们的椅子太多，我肯定算错了。

examples.english: The city miscalculated the cost of earthquake repairs for the Bay Bridge.
examples.chinese: 该市对遭地震损坏的海湾大桥的修复费用计算有误。

expressions.text: miscalculate how much/how many/how long etc

examples.english: Sorry we're late -- we miscalculated how long it would take to get here.
examples.chinese: 对不起，我们迟到了—我们算错了路上所需的时间。

examples.english: I thought everyone was here, but I must have miscounted.
examples.chinese: 我以为大家都在这儿，可我一定算错了。

examples.english: Census Bureau officials announced that they miscounted the nation's official population by 5 million people.
examples.chinese: 人口统计局官员称他们算错了全国的正式人口，数目相差500万。

examples.english: I've been trying to keep a record of how many tickets we've sold, but I've lost count.
examples.chinese: 我本来一直在记录我们卖了多少张票的，可现在记乱了。

examples.english: I made enough food for forty people but it looks like I overestimated.
examples.chinese: 我准备了足够40人吃的饭，但是看样子我估计过高了。

examples.english: A Harvard University survey found that Americans significantly overestimate the cost of higher education.
examples.chinese: 哈佛大学一项调查显示，美国人大大高估了高等教育的费用。

examples.english: We saved about $1000 for our trip but we underestimated and may have to wait until next year to go.
examples.chinese: 我们为旅游储蓄了约1,000美元，可是估计过低，可能要等到明年才能成行。

examples.english: Early mapmakers often underestimated the earth's circumference.
examples.chinese: 早期的地图制作者常常对地球的圆周估算过低。

centers.english: a calculation

examples.english: This type of calculation would take several hours without a computer.
examples.chinese: 如果没有电脑，这类运算要花费数小时。

examples.english: According to our calculations, 2000 jobs will be lost.
examples.chinese: 根据我们的计算，将失去2,000个就业机会。

examples.english: Mickey sat at the kitchen table doing calculations on a scratch pad.
examples.chinese: 米基坐在厨房餐桌旁，在拍纸簿上计算着。

examples.english: Once all the necessary calculations have been made the experiment can proceed.
examples.chinese: 一完成所有必需的计算，实验就能进行了。

examples.english: It'll be quicker if I use a calculator for these sums.
examples.chinese: 做这些算术题，使用计算器会更快些。

examples.english: We had to do some really hard sums today.
examples.chinese: 今天，我们做了一些非常难的算术题。

examples.english: I'm allowing $300, but that's only an estimate.
examples.chinese: 我打算花300美元，但那只是估计。

examples.english: Officials said Huntcor's estimate of building costs was about $3 million more than expected.
examples.chinese: 官员们说享特科对造价的估算比预期多300万美元左右。

examples.english: This proposal represents a rough estimate of the cost of materials and labor.
examples.chinese: 这一计划提出材料费和人工费的粗略估算。

examples.english: The paintings have been valued at $3.5 million, which is probably a conservative estimate.
examples.chinese: 这些画估价为350万美元，这很可能是个保守的数字。

examples.english: The tunnel is being constructed at an estimated cost of £15 million.
examples.chinese: 隧道正在建设中，估计花费1,500万英镑。

examples.english: An estimated 1 million Irish people died from starvation and disease during the Famine.
examples.chinese: 大饥荒时期，估计有100万爱尔兰人死于饥饿和疾病。

centers.english: to add a new part or piece to something
centers.chinese: 给某物加入新的部分或新的东西

examples.english: If you need more storage space it's possible to add more shelves.
examples.chinese: 如果你需要多一些储藏空间的话，可以再添一些架子。

examples.english: The book would look a lot more attractive if they added a few color pictures.
examples.chinese: 这本书如果加一些彩图就会漂亮许多。

examples.english: Adding fertilizer to the soil will help the plants to grow more quickly.
examples.chinese: 土壤中添加肥料可使植物生长得更快。

examples.english: We're having a bedroom added on to the back of the house.
examples.chinese: 我们准备在屋子后面加盖一间卧室。

examples.english: By adding a garage on, you can increase the value of your home.
examples.chinese: 加建一个车库，你家的房子就可以增值了。

centers.english: to add more to an amount or cost

examples.english: New fire-safety equipment had to be installed, adding thousands of dollars to the cost of the repairs.
examples.chinese: 新的防火装置必须安装，这样一来维修费增加了数千美元。

examples.english: Catherine won't mind if you add to her workload give her more work -- she needs the extra money.
examples.chinese: 凯瑟琳不会介意你给她增加工作量—她正需要额外收入。

examples.english: There are rumours that the government plans to put 20p on the cost of a packet of cigarettes.
examples.chinese: 有传闻说政府打算给每包香烟加价20便士。

examples.english: The new tax could put another ten cents on the price of gas.
examples.chinese: 新税会使油价上涨10美分。

examples.english: Tracy gives her children vitamin pills to supplement their diet.
examples.chinese: 特蕾西给孩子们服用维生素药片以补充他们饮食中的营养。

examples.english: Mary found it necessary to supplement her earnings by writing articles for magazines.
examples.chinese: 玛丽觉得有必要给杂志写点文章以增加收入。

centers.english: to add something to something you are cooking or mixing
centers.chinese: 在烹煮或拌和的某物中加入某物

examples.english: Add milk to the mixture before heating it.
examples.chinese: 在混合料中加入牛奶再加热。

examples.english: John added some water to the paint to make it thinner.
examples.chinese: 约翰在颜料中加了些水使它变稀。

centers.english: to add a quality or characteristic to something
centers.chinese: 使某物增添某种品质或特点

examples.english: The car chase isn't really necessary to the story, but it adds an element of excitement.
examples.chinese: 故事中的追车场面并非是必要的，但有了这场面故事就多了一分刺激。

examples.english: Using actual furniture from the 1920s should help lend some authenticity.
examples.chinese: 使用20世纪20年代实际使用的家具有助于增加一点真实感。

examples.english: Fine champagne always adds glamour to an occasion.
examples.chinese: 上等的香槟酒总能为一场盛会增加点气氛。

examples.english: The strange music lends an air of mystery to the movie.
examples.chinese: 怪异的音乐给这部电影增添了一种神秘的气氛。

examples.english: The two new members added nothing to the band's sound.
examples.chinese: 那两位新来的成员并没有给乐队的音乐风格注入新的特色。

examples.english: The fresh chilies add a spicy flavor to the sauce.
examples.chinese: 新鲜的辣椒给酱汁增加了辣味。

examples.english: The new sponsor gives the theatre some respectability.
examples.chinese: 新的赞助人使这家剧院添了几分体面。

examples.english: His uniform gave him an air of authority.
examples.chinese: 他的制服使他显得很威严

centers.english: to add something to what has already been said or written
centers.chinese: 给前面所说或所写的话作补充

examples.english: That's my report. Is there anything you'd like to add, Peter?
examples.chinese: 那是我的报告，你有什么要补充的吗，彼得?

examples.english: ‘Finally,’ she added, ‘I would like to thank my family for all their help.’
examples.chinese: “最后，”她补充道，“我要感谢家人为我所做的一切。”

examples.english: Barker refused to answer more questions, adding that he had already said too much.
examples.chinese: 巴克拒绝继续回答问题，还说他已经说得太多了。

examples.english: The bus was two hours late and, I might add, they tried to charge my children the full adult fare!
examples.chinese: 公共汽车迟到了两小时，而且，他们还要我的孩子买全额成人票！

examples.english: The company gave a very long and confusing explanation, and just tacked on a short apology right at the end.
examples.chinese: 该公司含糊地解释了一大通，最后就只轻描淡写地道个歉。

examples.english: It looks like the director ran out of ideas and tacked the last part of the film on.
examples.chinese: 电影的最后一部分就好像是导演已经江郎才尽，随便拼凑上去的。

centers.english: something that is added

examples.english: There has been a last minute addition to the programme for the President's visit.
examples.chinese: 总统的出访计划在最后一刻又增加了一项新的内容。

examples.english: In the last three months there has been a new addition to the family - our daughter, Rachel.
examples.chinese: 三个月前家里添了一口人—我们的女儿雷切尔。

examples.english: This product contains no artificial additives.
examples.chinese: 这种产品不含人工添加剂。

examples.english: Foods sold under this label are guaranteed to be free from additives and preservatives.
examples.chinese: 贴有这种标签出售的食品保证不含添加剂和防腐剂。

examples.english: Doctors believe that vitamin supplements are largely unnecessary.
examples.chinese: 医生认为维生素补充剂大多是不必要的。

examples.english: He sometimes eats fish as a supplement to his vegetarian diet.
examples.chinese: 他平时吃素，有时吃点鱼补充一下营养。

examples.english: The current supplement to the encyclopedia ‘Growing Up with Science’ has a new section on cycles in nature.
examples.chinese: 在《与科学一起成长》这套百科全书目前的增补本中，有一个新的章节讲大自然的循环。

examples.english: A wide range of extras are also available.
examples.chinese: 另有各种不同的配件出售。

examples.english: Tinted windows and a sunroof are optional extras.
examples.chinese: 有色玻璃窗和车顶天窗是备选的配件。

examples.english: Add-ons such as modems and DVD drives can easily cost you hundreds of dollars.
examples.chinese: 调制解调器、DVD光盘驱动器等附件一下子就能花掉你几百美元。

examples.english: The Simpsons built a big addition onto the back of their house.
examples.chinese: 辛普森家在房子后面扩建了一个很大的房间。

examples.english: You'll find the Picasso collection in the extension to the museum.
examples.chinese: 毕加索的作品收藏在博物馆扩建的部分。

centers.english: a circle

examples.english: The teacher drew a circle on the blackboard.
examples.chinese: 老师在黑板上画了一个圆。

examples.english: The circle of stones at Stonehenge is thought to have originally been a temple.
examples.chinese: 巨石阵中那圈石头据认为最初是一座庙宇。

examples.english: The flashlight threw a dim circle of light onto the wall.
examples.chinese: 手电筒在墙上投下一个暗淡的光圈。

examples.english: We all stood in a circle and tossed the ball to each other.
examples.chinese: 我们站成一个圆圈，相互传球。

examples.english: I want you to form two circles, one inside the other. Boys on the outside, girls on the inside.
examples.chinese: 我要你们里外围成两圈，男孩在外，女孩在内。

examples.english: The cottage was surrounded by a ring of trees.
examples.chinese: 小茅屋的四周种着一圈树。

examples.english: The cup left a dark ring on the table.
examples.chinese: 茶杯在桌子上留下一圈深色的印痕。

examples.english: The hostage's wrists had red rings on them where the ropes had been pulled tight.
examples.chinese: 人质手腕上被绳子勒过的地方留下一道道红色印痕。

examples.english: The children sat around him in a ring, eager to hear his story.
examples.chinese: 孩子们围着他坐成一圈，急着要听他讲故事。

examples.english: The road goes round in a loop and rejoins the main road about 2 kilometres past the town.
examples.chinese: 这条路呈环状，在离镇子两公里处又与主干道连结上。

centers.english: shaped like a circle

examples.english: In the kitchen there was a round table with a vase of flowers on it.
examples.chinese: 厨房里有张圆桌，上面摆着一瓶花。

examples.english: Violet stared at him with her huge round eyes.
examples.chinese: 维奥莉特那双又大又圆的眼睛直盯着他。

examples.english: The moon was perfectly round that night.
examples.chinese: 那个晚上，满月当空。

examples.english: The cattle are kept in a large enclosure surrounded by a circular fence.
