examples.english: You don't have to let the police in unless they have a search warrant.
examples.chinese: 如果没有搜查令，你可以不让警察进屋。

centers.english: money that you make by doing business
centers.chinese: 做生意、买卖等赚到的钱

examples.english: We aim to increase our profits by at least 5% every year.
examples.chinese: 我们的目标是每年至少增加5%的利润。

examples.english: For the first time, the company's annual profits were over $1 million.
examples.chinese: 该公司的年利润首次突破100万美元。

examples.english: They don't care who they sell weapons to. All they are interested in is profit.
examples.chinese: 他们不在乎把武器卖给谁。他们只对利润感兴趣。

examples.english: They made a huge profit when they sold the business.
examples.chinese: 他们卖了那家公司获得暴利。

examples.english: His first year in business was so successful that John could afford to buy a delivery van with the proceeds.
examples.chinese: 约翰开业后的第一年里就取得很大成功，收入足以使他买一辆货车了。

examples.english: The proceeds of the sale of the house went to an animal-welfare charity, as stated in the owner's will.
examples.chinese: 根据业主的遗嘱，卖房所得收益已经捐给一家动物福利慈善机构。

examples.english: Our surplus on book publishing last year was $47 million.
examples.chinese: 去年我们出版书籍的赢利是4,700万美元。

examples.english: For the first time in 20 years Congress was working with a budget surplus.
examples.chinese: 20年来，国会第一次处理预算盈余。

examples.english: If private hospitals are operating purely for gain, how can we be sure they have the patients’ best interests at heart?
examples.chinese: 如果私人医院的经营纯粹是为了赚钱，我们怎样才能相信他们关心病人的利益呢？

examples.english: Companies just don't invest enough -- short-term gain is all they think about.
examples.chinese: 许多公司不愿多作投资一他们只考虑短期收益。

centers.english: a profit from leaving money in the bank or lending it to a company
centers.chinese: 靠把钱存入银行、借给公司等所赚到的利润

examples.english: If you had half a million dollars you could easily live off the interest.
examples.chinese: 要是有50万美元的话，就能轻易靠利息过活了。

examples.english: John had put his grandfather's money in the bank, and was getting $400 a month in interest.
examples.chinese: 约翰把爷爷的钱存入银行，每月获取400美元的利息。

examples.english: The best rate of interest the banks can offer is around 14 per cent.
examples.chinese: 银行能够提供的最高利率约为14%。

examples.english: a high interest savings account
examples.chinese: 高利息的储蓄账户

examples.english: The company offers the hope of big returns for people who buy its shares.
examples.chinese: 该公司给购买其股票的人丰厚赢利的希望。

examples.english: The return on the initial investment was huge.
examples.chinese: 最初的投资赢利很高。

examples.english: We have calculated the probable yield from this investment at around 17%.
examples.chinese: 我们已算过，此项投资可能带来17%左右的利润。

examples.english: If you invest the money now, the yield after only twelve months will be $3160.
examples.chinese: 如果你现在投资这笔钱，只需12个月，利润将达3，160美元。

centers.english: to get a profit

examples.english: British Telecom made over $3 billion last year.
examples.chinese: 英国电信公司去年赚了三十多亿英镑。

examples.english: The restaurant makes a lot of money in the summer.
examples.chinese: 那家餐厅夏季很赚钱。

examples.english: You could make a lot of money selling your photographs, they're excellent.
examples.chinese: 你把照片卖了可以赚许多钱，那些照片太美了。

examples.english: Mandon, our richest cousin, had made a fortune in the cable TV business.
examples.chinese: 我们最富有的表亲曼东靠有线电视发了财。

examples.english: The entrepreneur boasted that he could make money out of anything, even pebbles in the beach.
examples.chinese: 那个企业家吹嘘说，他能靠任何东西赚钱，甚至是沙滩上的卵石。

examples.english: Harry made a good profit - he bought the house for £45,000 and sold it for £55,000 six months later.
examples.chinese: 哈里获了厚利—他以45,000英镑买下那幢房子，六个月后卖了55,000英镑。

examples.english: When you consider how much this meal would cost to prepare at home, you realize that the restaurant must be making an enormous profit.
examples.chinese: 你考虑一下这顿饭在家里做会花费多少，就会明白饭馆定是赢利颇丰的。

examples.english: The drug company Sasco made a profit of $53 million last year.
examples.chinese: 塞斯科制药公司去年赚了5,300万美元。

examples.english: Even though the price has been reduced, the builders will still make a profit on the sale.
examples.chinese: 尽管降低了价格，建筑商仍能从这笔买卖中获利。

examples.english: The Washington Post Company earned $187 million in 1987.
examples.chinese: 华盛顿邮报公司1987年赚了1.87亿美元。

examples.english: Our finances look better if we include the profit earned on the sale of our London offices.
examples.chinese: 如果我们把出售伦敦分公司所获的利润算进去，资金状况看上去就好些。

examples.english: She decided to put the money in a high-earning investment account.
examples.chinese: 她决定将资金投入高收益投资账户。

examples.english: He had made a killing on the stock exchange that morning.
examples.chinese: 那天早晨，他在股市上赚了大钱。

examples.english: Vito's a debonair middle-aged New Yorker, who's made a killing in advertising.
examples.chinese: 维托是个温文尔雅的中年纽约人，他靠广告发了大财。

centers.english: to not make a profit

examples.english: The company says that the publishing side of its division is unprofitable and must be closed down.
examples.chinese: 该公司称它的出版部门无利可图，必须关闭。

examples.english: Unprofitable flight routes have been axed as recession hits the aviation industry.
examples.chinese: 经济衰退影响航空业，无利可图的航线被削减了。

examples.english: The bank isn't likely to lend money to an unprofitable business like yours.
examples.chinese: 银行不会借钱给你那样不赚钱的公司。

examples.english: Most of the old nationalized industries were labelled ‘uneconomic’ and sold off to private companies.
examples.chinese: 旧的国营企业大多被说成“没有效益”，出售给了私人公司。

examples.english: Workers in uneconomic areas of the economy fought hard to keep their factories and mines open.
examples.chinese: 经济结构中非赢利部门的工作人员努力让他们的工厂和矿井继续运营。

centers.english: when a business produces a profit

examples.english: We don't sell children's clothes any more - it wasn't profitable enough.
examples.chinese: 我们不卖童装了一赢利不多。

examples.english: It's only in the last year that our business has become profitable. Before that we were just managing to cover our costs.
examples.chinese: 我们公司去年才开始赢利。在那以前，我们只是勉强做到收支相抵。

examples.english: Catering is a very lucrative business if you succeed in it.
examples.chinese: 如果酒宴办得好，那是一门非常赚钱的生意。

examples.english: Sam's journalistic work was much more lucrative than his painting had ever been.
examples.chinese: 萨姆的新闻作品较之以前的绘画赚的钱多得多。

examples.english: There is still an illegal but lucrative trade in ivory between Africa and South-East Asia.
examples.chinese: 在非洲和东南亚之间，仍有人进行着非法但利润丰厚的象牙贸易。

examples.english: The little bar turned out to be a real moneyspinner.
examples.chinese: 结果证明，小酒吧确实很赚钱。

examples.english: The toy companies are always trying to find another money-spinner like Monopoly or the Barbie doll.
examples.chinese: 玩具公司总想发掘另一种像“大富翁”游戏或“芭比”娃娃那样赚钱的产品。

examples.english: It's just a scruffy little beach café, but in summer it's an absolute goldmine.
examples.chinese: 那只是海滩上一家邋遢的小咖啡馆，但夏天它绝对是一大财源。

examples.english: I bet that corner shop's a goldmine.
examples.chinese: 我敢肯定，那家街角小店很赚钱。

centers.english: to not make a profit

examples.english: The company made a small loss last year but this year has managed to break even.
examples.chinese: 去年这家公司略有亏损，但今年达到了收支平衡。

examples.english: We'll be just breaking even if we can get an average audience of 300.
examples.chinese: 如果平均每场观众有300人的话，我们刚好收支相抵。

examples.english: Traidcraft is a non-profitmaking organization that buys goods from Indian workers at fair prices.
examples.chinese: “翠德克拉夫特”是一家非赢利机构，它以公平的价格购买印度工人的产品。

centers.english: to make a profit in an unfair way

examples.english: He's just cashing in on the fact that his wife is famous.
examples.chinese: 他就是利用妻子的名气来赚钱。

examples.english: Have you noticed how the record companies cash in on the death of famous pop stars by re-releasing all their old records?
examples.chinese: 你注意到唱片公司怎样在著名歌星去世之际靠重新发行他们全部的旧唱片来捞钱吗？

examples.english: Nobody should be allowed to profit from war and human suffering.
examples.chinese: 任何人都不可以从战争及人类的苦难中获利。

examples.english: Crafty entrepreneurs like Harper profited from the ignorance of the masses.
examples.chinese: 像哈珀之类精明的企业家利用大众的无知来获利。

examples.english: The emergency government brought in a special law to prevent hoarding and profiteering.
examples.chinese: 临时政府颁布特别法令禁止囤积居奇和投机倒把的行为。

examples.english: As food supplies dwindled, complaints against profiteering became more vociferous.
examples.chinese: 随着食品供应量的减少，大众反对“牟取暴利”的呼声越来越高。

examples.english: Measure are being taken to stop employment agencies exploiting foreign workers desperate to find a job.
examples.chinese: 正在采取措施阻止职业介绍所剥削急着找工作的外国劳工。

examples.english: Many ‘New Age’ therapists simply exploit the hopes and fears of sick people who would be better off going to their own doctor.
examples.chinese: 许多“新时代”治疗师只是利用病人的希望与恐惧，病人还是去自己的医生那里看病比较好。

examples.english: loan sharks who exploit the poor by charging up to 1000% interest per year.
examples.chinese: 以年利率高达1000%来剥削穷人的放高利贷者

centers.english: expensive

examples.english: She spends most of her money on expensive clothes.
examples.chinese: 她的大部分钱都用来买名贵的衣服。

examples.english: Do you have any less expensive cameras?
examples.chinese: 你们有便宜一些的照相机吗?

examples.english: Taxis are so expensive - that's why I usually take the bus.
examples.chinese: 出租车很贵—所以我通常乘公共汽车。

examples.english: Movies are incredibly expensive to make these days.
examples.chinese: 如今电影的制作成本高得不可思议。

examples.english: I managed to find the bike I wanted but it cost a lot.
examples.chinese: 我好不容易找到了自己想要的自行车，但是很贵。

examples.english: It costs a lot of money to go to medical school, you know.
examples.chinese: 你知道的，上医学院花费很大。

expressions.text: cost a lot (of money) to do something

examples.english: Did it cost a lot to fly to Rio?
examples.chinese: 乘飞机去里约热内卢是不是很贵？

examples.english: Rents in central London are very high.
examples.chinese: 伦敦市中心租金很高。

examples.english: The cost of living is higher in Denmark than in Germany.
examples.chinese: 丹麦的生活费比德国的高。

examples.english: Increased production costs will mean higher prices for consumers.
examples.chinese: 生产成本的提高将意味着消费者要付更高的价钱。

examples.english: The finance committee rejected their plan because they said it was too costly.
examples.chinese: 财政委员会说他们的计划成本太大，故加以拒绝。

examples.english: Caring for the park's swans is a costly business - roughly $26,600 per year.
examples.chinese: 照顾公园里的天鹅要花很多钱—一年大概需要26,600美元。

examples.english: Buying all those computers was a costly mistake.
examples.chinese: 购进那些电脑是个代价非常大的错误。

expressions.text: it's going to cost you/it'll cost you

examples.english: You can get new parts specially made for these, but it'll cost you.
examples.chinese: 你可以为这些专门定制新部件，但要花很多钱。

examples.english: There are some places that can mend the suit in a couple of hours, but it's going to cost you.
examples.chinese: 有一些地方几个小时就可以修补好这套衣服，但是价钱很贵。

examples.english: Gibson guitars sound great, but they don't come cheap.
examples.chinese: 吉布森吉他音质很好，但是价钱不菲。

examples.english: It would be great if we could hire her, but with all her experience, she won't come cheap.
examples.chinese: 要是我们聘得到她当然不错，但是凭着她的这些经验，她要价不会低的。

examples.english: Let's not eat here - it's too pricey.
examples.chinese: 我们不要在这里吃吧一太贵了。

examples.english: The tickets were kind of pricey, but the show was good.
examples.chinese: 票价有点贵，但是演出很精彩。

examples.english: Those strawberries look a bit dear.
examples.chinese: 那些草莓看上去有些贵。

examples.english: The blue jacket is slightly dearer, but it's much better material.
examples.chinese: 那件蓝色夹克稍微贵了一点，但料子好多了。

examples.english: No, you can't have an ice-cream - they're too dear.
examples.chinese: 不行，你不能吃冰淇淋—一价钱太贵了。

centers.english: extremely expensive

examples.english: What a beautiful car - it must have cost a fortune.
examples.chinese: 多漂亮的汽车啊—肯定是花了很多钱买的。

examples.english: We had to eat out every night - it ended up costing us a fortune.
examples.chinese: 我们得每天晚上都出去吃饭——最后花了不少钱。

expressions.text: cost a fortune to do something

examples.english: It'll cost a fortune to get that old car of his repaired.
examples.chinese: 他的那辆旧车要花不少钱去修理。

examples.english: The hotel was great, but it cost an absolute fortune.
examples.chinese: 那酒店是不错，可是价钱太贵了。

examples.english: I can't imagine how she affords to send her kids to that school - it must cost a bomb.
examples.chinese: 我真想象不出她如何供得起孩子上那所学校—那肯定要不少钱。

examples.english: Good shoes needn't cost the earth.
examples.chinese: 好鞋子不必很贵。

examples.english: The divorce cost me a bomb.
examples.chinese: 离婚让我花了一大笔钱。

examples.english: The painting was sold for an astronomical price.
examples.chinese: 这幅画以天价出售。

examples.english: Tuition at private universities has become astronomical.
examples.chinese: 私立大学的学费已经成了天文数字了。

expressions.text: cost an arm and a leg

examples.english: That carpet must have cost an arm and a leg.
examples.chinese: 那块地毯肯定花了一大笔钱。

expressions.text: cost somebody an arm and a leg

examples.english: Getting good health insurance these days costs an arm and a leg.
examples.chinese: 如今买好的健康保险要花一大笔钱。

centers.english: expensive and fashionable

examples.english: My uncle took us out to dinner at an expensive restaurant.
examples.chinese: 叔叔带我们去一家很贵的餐馆里吃饭。

examples.english: The house is on West Boston Avenue, Detroit's most expensive residential area.
examples.chinese: 这所房子位于底特律最昂贵的居住区，西波士顿大街。

examples.english: They live in Bel Air, an exclusive suburb of Los Angeles.
examples.chinese: 他们住在贝莱尔，这是洛杉矶郊外一处高级住宅区。

examples.english: The country club is very exclusive - you have to be invited to join.
examples.chinese: 这个乡村俱乐部非常贵族化——只有获邀请才可以参加。

examples.english: a room in a luxurious New York hotel
examples.chinese: 纽约一家豪华酒店的一间客房

examples.english: Atlantis is one of the world's most luxurious cruise ships.
examples.chinese: “亚特兰蒂斯”号是世界上最奢华的游船之一。

examples.english: You'd think a fancy restaurant like this would have better service.
examples.chinese: 你会以为像这样的豪华餐馆会有更好的服务。

examples.english: We stayed in a fancy Victorian hotel in San Francisco.
examples.chinese: 我们住在旧金山市一家豪华的维多利亚风格的酒店里。

examples.english: When I'm famous I'm going to stay in a posh hotel and drink champagne all day.
examples.chinese: 我成名之后要住高级酒店，整天喝香槟。

examples.english: She goes to a posh girls’ school near Brighton.
examples.chinese: 她在布赖顿附近的一所贵族女校上学。

examples.english: I was surprised when I saw her apartment - I'd have expected a lawyer to have something a little more upmarket.
examples.chinese: 看见她的公寓我吃了一惊——我还以为律师会住得更高级一些呢。

examples.english: New upscale shops and restaurants are driving some of the older businesses out of the neighborhood.
examples.chinese: 新开的高级商铺和餐厅把这一带原有的部分商店挤走了。

examples.english: She took us to a very classy seafood restaurant in the old part of the city.
examples.chinese: 她把我们带到了旧城区里一家非常高档的海鲜餐馆。

examples.english: The cafe's interior has been redone and looks very classy.
examples.chinese: 咖啡馆内部重新装潢了一下，看上去非常高级。

examples.english: The Grand Union Hotel is one of the classiest hotels in this part of the country.
examples.chinese: 联合大酒店是该国这一地区最高级的酒店之一。

examples.english: The firm's headquarters is a plush $2.5 million office building on Woodside Road.
examples.chinese: 公司总部是伍德赛德路上价值250万美元的一幢豪华办公大楼。

examples.english: the plush lobby of a four-star hotel
examples.chinese: 一家四星级酒店华丽的大堂

centers.english: when something is too expensive

examples.english: I really need a new coat, but I can't afford one.
examples.chinese: 我很需要一件新的外套，可是我买不起。

examples.english: We couldn't afford to go on holiday last year.
examples.chinese: 去年我们没有钱去度假。

examples.english: Hiring a lawyer would be expensive, and she just couldn't afford it.
examples.chinese: 请律师很贵，她根本就负担不起。

examples.english: The restaurant charges exorbitant prices for very ordinary food.
examples.chinese: 这家餐厅非常普通的食品也收很贵的价钱。

examples.english: Interest rates for some of the credit cards are extortionate.
examples.chinese: 有些信用卡的利率高得离谱。

examples.english: Eighty dollars for a pair of jeans? What a rip-off!
examples.chinese: 一条牛仔裤要80美元？真是敲竹杠！

examples.english: The vacation package we bought ended up being a total rip-off.
examples.chinese: 我们花了钱的包价旅游结果被人宰了一刀。

examples.english: For most people, the cost of living in the centre of town is prohibitive.
examples.chinese: 对大部分人来说，城中心的生活费高得令人望而却步。

examples.english: The computer was superior to other models, but it was prohibitively expensive.
examples.chinese: 这台电脑比其他型号都好，只是价钱贵得吓人。

examples.english: Nightclubs often charge inflated prices for drinks.
examples.chinese: 夜总会里酒水的钱经常收得很贵。

examples.english: Some people buy large blocks of tickets and then try to sell them at vastly inflated prices.
examples.chinese: 有些人买下大批的门票，然后再设法大幅抬高价钱卖出去。

examples.english: I think £7 for a drink is a bit steep, don't you?
examples.chinese: 我觉得一杯饮料要七英镑贵了点，你说呢?

examples.english: It's hard to find an apartment around here, and when you do the rents are pretty steep.
examples.chinese: 在这一带找间公寓很困难，即使找到的话，租金也是高得惊人。

examples.english: I'm not paying £5 for an ice-cream - that's daylight robbery!
examples.chinese: 我可不想花五英镑买个冰淇淋——那简直是在光天化日之下抢钱！

examples.english: We knew it was highway robbery, but we had no choice but to pay.
examples.chinese: 我们知道那是敲竹杠，但没有办法，只好付钱。

expressions.text: be priced out of the market

examples.english: British electrical equipment is likely to be priced out of the market by cheap imports.
examples.chinese: 英国的电气设备可能会因定价太高而被价格低廉的进口产品挤出市场。

expressions.text: price yourself out of the market

examples.english: Ford don't want to raise its prices any more - it's worried about pricing itself out of the market.
examples.chinese: 福特公司不想再提价了—一他们担心价格太高会使自己失去市场。

centers.english: not costing much money

examples.english: My shoes were really cheap - they only cost $15.
examples.chinese: 我的鞋子实在很便宜——只要15美元。

examples.english: The cheapest way to get to Chicago is to take the bus.
examples.chinese: 去芝加哥最便宜的方法是乘公共汽车。

expressions.text: it is cheap to do something

examples.english: It's cheaper to phone after six o'clock.
examples.chinese: 6点之后打电话便宜些。

examples.english: Wooden houses are relatively cheap to build.
examples.chinese: 木屋造价比较便宜。

examples.english: You can buy electronic diaries fairly cheaply nowadays.
examples.chinese: 现在购买电子记事簿相当便宜。

examples.english: The furniture is inexpensive but well-made.
examples.chinese: 这家具不贵，而且做工很好。

examples.english: a simple, inexpensive meal
examples.chinese: 简单而不贵的一餐

examples.english: Beans and lentils are an inexpensive source of protein.
examples.chinese: 菜豆和小扁豆是廉价的蛋白质来源。

examples.english: a hotel that offers air-conditioned rooms at relatively inexpensive prices
examples.chinese: 一家提供空调房间、价格比较公道的酒店

examples.english: We stayed in a very nice hotel in Vienna and it didn't cost much.
examples.chinese: 我们住在维也纳一家很好的酒店，花费并不多。

expressions.text: it doesn't cost much to do something

examples.english: It doesn't cost much to rent an apartment here.
examples.chinese: 在这里租一套公寓花不了许多钱。

examples.english: We have a very economical heating system, so the bills aren't too high.
examples.chinese: 我们有一套很经济的暖气系统，因此费用不是很高。

examples.english: This is a well-designed car that is also very economical to run.
examples.chinese: 这是一辆设计精良的车，开起来费用也很省。

expressions.text: it is more economical to do something

examples.english: It's more economical to buy the big packet - it's only 50p more than the small one.
examples.chinese: 买大包装更经济——只比小包的贵50便士。

examples.english: Single mothers often have trouble finding affordable child care.
examples.chinese: 单身母亲常常为寻找负担得起的托儿服务而烦恼。

examples.english: We have a vast range of cars to choose from at affordable prices.
examples.chinese: 我们有许多车可供选择，价格合宜。

examples.english: If you want low-cost transport and regular exercise, a bike is ideal.
examples.chinese: 如果你想要个价格低廉的交通工具而且又想定期锻炼身体，那么自行车是最理想的了。

examples.english: If elected, he promised to build more low-cost housing in the city.
examples.chinese: 如果当选的话，他许诺在城内建造更多廉价房屋。

examples.english: The US is giving low-cost loans to help under-developed countries in the region.
examples.chinese: 美国将提供低息贷款来帮助该地区的不发达国家。

examples.english: Nikon's latest camera is low in price and easy to use.
examples.chinese: 最新型的尼康相机价格低廉，使用简便。

examples.english: The ‘Pocket-Pack’ range of toys are very low in price and will provide hours of pleasure for the kids.
examples.chinese: “袖珍”玩具系列价格低廉，而且能让孩子们开开心心地玩好几个小时。

examples.english: My first acting job was in a low-budget horror movie with a terrible plot.
examples.chinese: 我第一次做演员是在一部情节糟糕的低预算恐怖影片中。

examples.english: The Tourist Information Office will give you a list of budget hotels in the area.
examples.chinese: 旅游信息中心会给你一份该地区廉价酒店的名录。

examples.english: ‘I'm not sure if I should buy this suit.’ ‘Come on! It won't break the bank!’
examples.chinese: “我不知道该不该买这套衣服。”“得了吧！这不会让你倾家荡产的！”

examples.english: This guide lists 900 of the best places in which to eat without breaking the bank.
examples.chinese: 这份指南列出了900家最好的餐馆，在那里吃饭不会太破费。

centers.english: cheap but bad in quality
centers.chinese: 价格便宜但质量低劣的

examples.english: The tourist shops were full of cheap souvenirs.
examples.chinese: 那家旅游商店里全是蹩脚的纪念品。

examples.english: The hotel room was very small, with cheap furniture and a bumpy bed.
examples.chinese: 酒店客房很小，有蹩脚的家具和一张高低不平的床。

examples.english: Oh look -- a present from Rob. I bet it's another bottle of cheap perfume.
examples.chinese: 哦，瞧——罗布送来的礼物。我敢打赌又是一瓶廉价香水。

examples.english: What do you think of these bracelets? They look really cheap and nasty to me.
examples.chinese: 你觉得这些手镯怎么样？在我看来，它们很不值钱，而且非常蹩脚。

examples.english: I don't like plastic shoes. They always seem cheap and nasty.
examples.chinese: 我不喜欢塑料鞋。它们看上去总是又便宜质量又差。

centers.english: when you get something for a good price

examples.english: The meals at Charlie's Pizza are really good value.
examples.chinese: 在查利比萨店用餐真的很划算。

examples.english: The CD-ROM encyclopedia is a good value because the printed encyclopedia set sells for twice as much.
examples.chinese: 光盘版百科全书很划算，因为印刷的百科全书价格要翻倍。

examples.english: Sainsbury's cookbooks are generally considered to be value for money.
examples.chinese: 塞恩斯伯里的烹饪书一般很合算。

examples.english: There's a special ticket that means you can see six concerts, which is definitely good value for money.
examples.chinese: 有一种特别的票可以让你看六场音乐会，绝对合算。

examples.english: The show was less than one hour long and we didn't really get value for money.
examples.chinese: 演出不到一个小时就结束，我们的钱花得不值得。

examples.english: The Brazilian white wine is a good buy at only $2.99 a bottle.
examples.chinese: 巴西产的白葡萄酒每瓶只要2.99美元，很合算。

examples.english: College officials insist that higher education is a good buy despite rising tuition costs.
examples.chinese: 大学的负责人坚持说尽管学费在涨，但接受高等教育是合算的。

examples.english: The price of the holiday includes free use of the tennis courts, the pool, and the gym. It's a very good deal.
examples.chinese: 度假的价格里包括免费使用网球场、游泳池和体育馆，很划算。

examples.english: They gave me a really good deal on my camera.
examples.chinese: 我买照相机时他们给我很合算的折扣。

examples.english: Cowpland said he was willing to buy the company if he got a good deal.
examples.chinese: 考普兰说如果合算的话，他愿意买下那家公司。

examples.english: Did you get any bargains at the market?
examples.chinese: 你在市场上买到便宜货了吗？

examples.english: I got this shirt when I was in Indonesia. It was a real bargain.
examples.chinese: 我是在印度尼西亚买这件衬衣的，很合算。

centers.english: not too expensive when compared to other prices
centers.chinese: 与其他价格相比不太贵

examples.english: They sell good-quality computer equipment at reasonable prices.
examples.chinese: 他们出售优质的电脑设备，价格公道。

examples.english: Only £15 a night? That sounds reasonable.
examples.chinese: 一晚只要15英镑？听上去很公道的。

examples.english: I think you'll find our prices are extremely competitive.
examples.chinese: 我想你会发现我们的价格极具竞争力。

examples.english: The hotel offers a high standard of service at very competitive rates.
examples.chinese: 这家旅馆以极具竞争力的价格提供高标准的服务。

examples.english: Call this number for our free catalogue of competitively priced software.
examples.chinese: 打这个电话索取免费目录，其中的软件价格都颇具竞争力。

centers.english: very cheap

examples.english: You can get beautiful leather jackets in the markets and they're dirt cheap.
examples.chinese: 你能在市场上买到漂亮的皮夹克，而且非常便宜。

examples.english: She buys all her clothes dirt cheap in charity shops.
examples.chinese: 她所有衣物都是在慈善商店以极便宜的价格买的。

examples.english: She says her new outfit was a steal.
examples.chinese: 她说她新买的外套是便宜货。

examples.english: The new computer package is a snip at only £599 plus tax.
examples.chinese: 新的电脑套装不含税价才599英镑，很合算。

expressions.text: at rockbottom prices/ at giveaway prices

examples.english: Fox Hi-Fi specialize in selling top quality CD players at rockbottom prices.
examples.chinese: 福克斯高保真公司以最低价专门经销顶级的CD播放器。

examples.english: In our summer sale, we have clothes from top designers at giveaway prices.
examples.chinese: 在我们的夏季大减价活动中，以最低价出售名家设计的服装。

examples.english: You can pick up video recorders for very little money if you know where to look.
examples.chinese: 如果你找对地方，就能买到很便宜的录像机。

examples.english: We got the car for nothing because the woman wanted to get rid of it fast.
examples.chinese: 我们几乎不花什么钱就买到了那辆车，因为那个女人急于脱手。

centers.english: to reduce the price of something

examples.english: There is a lot of pressure on electricity companies to reduce their prices.
examples.chinese: 人们要求降低电费对电力公司造成很大压力。

examples.english: The company needs to cut costs drastically if it's going to survive.
examples.chinese: 这家公司如果想要生存下去，就必须大幅度降低成本。

examples.english: Unless they can reduce their prices, they will soon be unable to compete on the American market.
examples.chinese: 除非他们能降价，否则在美国市场很快就会没有竞争力。

examples.english: Continental Airlines are to reduce fares by up to 10% in some areas.
examples.chinese: 大陆航空公司准备在某些地区降低票价，最高达10%。

examples.english: If there was a reduction in fares more people would ride the train to work.
examples.chinese: 如果降低票价，更多人会坐火车去上班。

examples.english: Further cuts in oil prices seem unlikely.
examples.chinese: 油价看来是不太可能进一步降低的。

examples.english: I expect if you ask him he'll knock a couple of pounds off.
examples.chinese: 我估计如果你跟他说，他会便宜几英镑的。

examples.english: Knock fifty bucks off and I'll buy it.
examples.chinese: 便宜50美元我就买了。

examples.english: Their prices are usually marked down after Christmas.
examples.chinese: 圣诞节过后，他们的价格一般都要下降。

examples.english: To celebrate the store's 100th anniversary, all merchandise has been marked down by 20 percent.
examples.chinese: 为店庆100周年，所有货品八折优惠。

examples.english: Sony has slashed the price of its new CD player, the D50.
examples.chinese: 索尼公司已大幅削减新推出的D50型CD播放器的售价。

examples.english: Final Sale. All prices slashed. Everything must go!
examples.chinese: 最后大减价。所有商品一律削价。清仓甩卖！

examples.english: British Airways have slashed fares by over 50%.
examples.chinese: 英国航空公司票价降了50%以上。

centers.english: when the price has been reduced

examples.english: There's going to be a sale at Macy's next week.
examples.chinese: 下周梅西百货大减价。

examples.english: Amelia bought her jacket at a sale for twenty dollars.
examples.chinese: 阿梅莉娅在特价时花20美元买了件外套。

examples.english: The bookstore across the street is having a sale.
examples.chinese: 街对面的那家书店在举行特卖。

examples.english: I got this coat for half price in the January sales.
examples.chinese: 我在1月大减价期间花一点点钱就买下了这件大衣。

examples.english: ‘How much was your jacket?’ ‘I got it on sale in Montgomery Wards. It only cost $45.’
examples.chinese: “你的夹克多少钱？”“这是我在蒙哥马利·沃兹百货店大减价时买的。只花了45美元。”

examples.english: His suit was bought in the sales for £100.
examples.chinese: 他的西装是大减价时花了100英镑买的。

examples.english: I need a new pair of shoes but I want to wait until they go on sale.
examples.chinese: 我要买双新鞋子，但我想等到大减价的时候才买。

examples.english: Everything is reduced because the store's closing down next month.
examples.chinese: 每样东西都减价了，因为这个店下月就要关门。

examples.english: The CDs were reduced from $10 to $5.
examples.chinese: CD光盘的价格已从10美元减至5美元。

examples.english: 20% off all computers in Dixon's summer sale
examples.chinese: 在狄克逊商店夏季大减价活动中，所有的电脑都以八折出售！

examples.english: We got $10 off the chair because it had a small mark on it.
examples.chinese: 因为这把椅子上有道小擦痕，所以我们买的时候便宜了10美元。

examples.english: Do you get a discount if you pay in cash?
examples.chinese: 现金付款有折扣吗？

examples.english: Workers at the store get a discount on books and records.
examples.chinese: 那家商店的员工买书和唱片可以打折。

examples.english: There's a 30% discount on all electrical goods.
examples.chinese: 所有的电器均打七折。

examples.english: Air UK are currently offering tickets to students at a special discount.
examples.chinese: 目前联合王国航空公司向学生提供特别折扣票。

examples.english: They've got a special offer for seniors -- five nights for the price of three.
examples.chinese: 他们为老人提供特价—以三天的房价住五天。

examples.english: Take advantage of our special offer between now and Oct 30 this year.
examples.chinese: 从现在起到今年10月30日特价优惠，抓紧机会。

examples.english: Tottenham Court Road is the best place for cut-price stereo equipment.
examples.chinese: 托特纳姆考特路是寻觅减价立体声设备的最佳去处。

examples.english: Fruit is fairly inexpensive in Japan because they buy cut-price oranges and apples from South Africa.
examples.chinese: 日本的水果相当便宜，因为他们从南非购买减价的橙子和苹果。

examples.english: If they have any bicycle lamps going cheap, can you get me one?
examples.chinese: 如果他们出售减价的自行车灯，你能否替我买一个？

examples.english: Have a look in the travel agent's and see if there are any flights to Toronto going cheap.
examples.chinese: 到旅行社查一下，看看是否有去多伦多的打折机票。

examples.english: Today's lunch special is smoked salmon with rice.
examples.chinese: 今天的特价午餐是熏三文鱼加米饭。

examples.english: We have Bud beer 6-packs on special at $5.
examples.chinese: 我们供应特价百威啤酒，六罐装售五美元。

centers.english: to persuade someone to reduce the price of something
centers.chinese: 说服某人降低某物的价格

examples.english: If you go to a street market, you'd better be prepared to haggle.
examples.chinese: 如果你去路边市场，要作好讨价还价的准备。

examples.english: The passenger haggled over the fare before she got into the taxi.
examples.chinese: 那个乘客跟司机讨价还价，谈好了车费才钻进出租车。

examples.english: My mother used to spend hours haggling with the market traders.
examples.chinese: 我母亲过去会同市场里的商贩讨价还价几个小时。

examples.english: She bargained with the woman who was selling the plates and managed to get them for half the usual price.
examples.chinese: 她与那卖盘子的女人讨价还价，最后以比原来便宜一半的价格成交。

examples.english: The owners originally wanted $1000 for the horse, but George managed to beat them down to $850.
examples.chinese: 那几个马主最初索价1,000美元，但乔治把价格杀到了850美元。

examples.english: I beat him down and got the bracelet for $2.
examples.chinese: 我杀低了他的售价，以两美元买下这只手镯。

centers.english: not costing any money

examples.english: Parking is free after 6 pm.
examples.chinese: 6点钟以后停车是免费的。

examples.english: ‘How much is it to get into the concert?’ ‘Oh, I think it's free.’
examples.chinese: “这场音乐会入场券要多少钱？”“噢，我想是免费的。”

examples.english: The clinic offers free advice on contraception.
examples.chinese: 这家诊所免费提供有关避孕的咨询意见。

examples.english: I'm saving these tokens to get a free poster.
examples.chinese: 我把这些赠券积起来去换一张免费的宣传画。

expressions.gram: verb phrase not usually in progressive

examples.english: Luckily I was insured, so the treatment didn't cost anything.
examples.chinese: 幸亏我买了保险，所以这次治疗不费一分钱。

expressions.text: cost nothing/not cost anything to do something

examples.english: It doesn't cost anything to get advice from them.
examples.chinese: 向他们咨询是免费的。

examples.english: The competition costs nothing to enter, just send a postcard with your name and address.
examples.chinese: 参加这项比赛是免费的，只要寄去一张填上你姓名地址的明信片就可以了。

examples.english: He offered to fix the car for nothing.
examples.chinese: 他主动提出免费修理这辆汽车。

examples.english: Fans were allowed into the stadium for nothing as a way of celebrating.
examples.chinese: 允许球迷免费进入体育场以示庆祝。

examples.english: Children under five can see the show for free.
examples.chinese: 五岁以下儿童可免费观看演出。

examples.english: Guests can park free of charge all day.
examples.chinese: 宾客可以全天免费停车。

examples.english: Copies of the leaflet can be obtained free of charge from your local library.
examples.chinese: 小册子可以从当地图书馆免费获得。

examples.english: This policy ensures that you get emergency medical treatment free of charge when travelling abroad.
examples.chinese: 该保险单保证出国旅行时看急诊免费。

examples.english: ‘How much is the prescription?’ ‘No charge -- students are exempt from payment.’
examples.chinese: “配这药方多少钱？”“免费的—学生不用付费。”

examples.english: Entry to the museum costs £3, but there is no charge on Wednesdays and Sundays.
examples.chinese: 博物馆入场券为三英镑，但周三和周日是免费的。

examples.english: There is no charge for cashing these travellers’ cheques.
examples.chinese: 兑现这类旅行支票是不收费的。

examples.english: On New Year's Eve, he offered a glass of champagne to everyone, on the house.
examples.chinese: 除夕那天他免费为所有顾客提供一杯香槟酒。

examples.english: The owner let us have the first bottle of wine on the house.
examples.chinese: 我们喝的第一瓶葡萄酒是店主免费招待的。

examples.english: The Helpline provides advice on all types of personal problems at no cost to the caller.
examples.chinese: 这条服务热线免费向拨打电话者提供各种有关个人问题的建议。

examples.english: Treatment at the health center is available at no cost to students.
examples.chinese: 健康中心免费为学生提供治疗。

examples.english: Many activities are available at the hotel at no extra cost, but theatre trips and excursions are not included.
examples.chinese: 酒店内的许多活动都不另外收费，但看戏和外出观光不包括在内。

examples.english: The store is offering to install satellite dishes at no extra cost to the buyer.
examples.chinese: 该商店为购买盘式卫星天线的客户免费提供安装服务。

examples.english: His work for the church is performed gratis.
examples.chinese: 他为教会做的事是不收取报酬的。

examples.english: You can see some local bands at local clubs absolutely gratis.
examples.chinese: 你可以免费观赏一些本地的乐队在本地俱乐部的演出。

centers.english: something that is given free by a company
centers.chinese: 由公司免费提供的某物

examples.english: Karen's sister works at the New York Ballet and she's managed to get us some complimentary tickets.
examples.chinese: 卡伦的姐姐是在纽约芭蕾舞团工作的，她设法给我们弄来了几张赠票。

examples.english: Honeymooners receive a complimentary bottle of champagne in their hotel room.
examples.chinese: 度蜜月的新婚夫妇在下榻的旅馆房间内收到一瓶赠送的香槟酒。

examples.english: Buy three skincare products and you can choose your super free gift.
examples.chinese: 买三种护肤品你就可以选一份免费赠送的高级礼品。

examples.english: We came back from the tour round the factory loaded down with free gifts.
examples.chinese: 我们参观了工厂之后，满载赠品而归。

examples.english: ‘Where did you get that calendar?’ ‘It was a freebie from work.’
examples.chinese: “你那个日历是哪来的？”“公司送的。”

examples.english: Most airlines offer freebies to children traveling on their planes.
examples.chinese: 大多数航空公司送赠品给乘坐他们飞机旅行的儿童。

centers.english: allowed to do what you want

examples.english: I had just left home, and was enjoying the feeling of being free and independent at last.
examples.chinese: 我刚离开家，在享受终于获得自由和独立的感觉。

examples.english: During ‘Golden Time’, the pupils are free to choose the activity they would like to do.
examples.chinese: 在“黄金时间”学生可自由选择自己喜欢的活动。

expressions.text: be at liberty to do something

examples.english: The Secretary of State told reporters, ‘I am not at liberty to get into the details of the proposal.’
examples.chinese: 国务卿对记者说：“我无权谈论此项提议的细节。”

examples.english: You are quite at liberty to make an official complaint if you wish.
examples.chinese: 要是你愿意就尽管正式提出投诉。

examples.english: For most of the year, farmers allow the sheep to roam freely on the hillsides.
examples.chinese: 一年中大部分时间里，农民都让羊群自由地在山坡上走动。

examples.english: In England he could write freely, without fear of arrest.
examples.chinese: 在英格兰他可以自由地写作，不用担心被捕。

examples.english: TV companies need the ability to operate freely, with the minimum of government interference,
examples.chinese: 电视公司需要有自由经营的权力，政府的干涉应被减少到最低的限度。

examples.english: As a kid, I wanted to do my own thing, but when I got older I realized I wanted to continue the family business.
examples.chinese: 小时候我想做自己愿意做的事，但长大后我意识到自己想继续家族生意。

examples.english: The three women worked together on a stage play, and then each went off to do her own thing.
examples.chinese: 这三位女子一起演出了一部舞台剧，然后分道扬镳了。

centers.english: activities or actions that are not restricted
centers.chinese: 不受限制的活动或行动

examples.english: This computer program assures the free movement of facts, figures, and text between files.
examples.chinese: 这一电脑程序可以保证资料、数据和文本在各文件之间任意调动。

examples.english: Bulgaria's first free elections were held in 1990.
examples.chinese: 保加利亚的首次自由选举于1990年举行。

examples.english: Things like health and education cannot be left to the free market.
examples.chinese: 像健康和教育这类事情不能留给自由市场去操作。

examples.english: All Americans have the right of free speech.
examples.chinese: 所有的美国人都享有言论自由的权利。

examples.english: Activists were calling for a free press and political reforms.
examples.chinese: 积极分子要求自由出版权和进行政治改革。

examples.english: Reporters were later given unrestricted access to the evidence in the case.
examples.chinese: 后来记者们被允许不受限制地看此案的证据。

examples.english: The U.N. demanded unrestricted searches for weapons within the country.
examples.chinese: 联合国要求不受限制地在该国内搜查武器。

examples.english: Most countries do not permit unrestricted immigration.
examples.chinese: 大部分国家都不允许不加限制的移民进入。

examples.english: The military government has agreed to hold open elections next year.
examples.chinese: 军政府同意明年举行公开大选。

examples.english: We are holding an open competition to find a name for our new ship.
examples.chinese: 为给新船起名，我们举行了一个公开的竞赛活动。

examples.english: The summit meeting was intended to be wide-ranging and open-ended.
examples.chinese: 按照安排，这次高峰会议的议题广泛，不作限制。

examples.english: As well as practice exercises, students should be encouraged to do more open-ended activities.
examples.chinese: 让学生们进行练习的同时，还应鼓励他们做一些更为自由的活动。

centers.english: the right to do what you want

examples.english: Teachers in the special program have a greater amount of freedom in what they teach.
examples.chinese: 参加这一特殊项目的教师在教什么内容方面拥有更大的自主权。

examples.english: People here have the freedom to practise whatever religion they like.
examples.chinese: 这里的人能自由信奉自己喜欢的任何宗教。

examples.english: In a country where freedom of speech is guaranteed, citizens should expect to hear ideas with which they disagree.
examples.chinese: 在言论自由得到保障的国家里，公民应该会听到自己不赞同的观点。

examples.english: The constitution guarantees freedom from persecution on grounds of race, sex, or sexuality.
examples.chinese: 宪法保障公民不因为种族、性别或性取向而遭受迫害。

examples.english: They were fighting for liberty and equality.
examples.chinese: 他们在为自由和平等而战。

examples.english: Many people think that compulsory ID cards interfere with personal liberty.
examples.chinese: 许多人认为强制性的身份证干涉了个人自由。

examples.english: Some government agencies will be run like private companies, with a free hand when it comes to rules on hiring, buying equipment, etc.
examples.chinese: 有些政府机构将与私营公司一样经营，在雇请员工、购买设备等方面拥有自主权。

examples.english: He was given a remarkably free hand in making all the arrangements.
examples.chinese: 他在制定计划方面被授予很大的自行决定权。

centers.english: a country or system of government in which people have freedom
centers.chinese: 人民享有自由的国家或政府体制

examples.english: We will continue our struggle until our country is free.
examples.chinese: 我们将继续奋斗直到祖国获得自由。

examples.english: They were able to return to visit their family in a free Czech Republic.
examples.chinese: 他们能回到自由的捷克共和国探望自己的家人。

examples.english: Sometimes you realize how lucky you are to live in a free society.
examples.chinese: 有时你会认识到生活在一个自由的社会中是一件多么幸运的事。

examples.english: In a liberal society you may have the right to express your own beliefs, but not necessarily to cause offence to other people.
examples.chinese: 在自由的社会里，你可以有权利自由表达自己的信仰而不至于得罪别人。

examples.english: In the 1840s, President Herrera promoted a policy of gradual liberal reform in Mexico.
examples.chinese: 19世纪40年代，赫雷拉总统在墨西哥推行一项逐步进行自由化改革的政策。

centers.english: to make a country free

examples.english: He joined the resistance movement in order to free his country from the enemy.
examples.chinese: 他加入了抵抗运动，决心要把祖国从敌人的统治下解放出来。

examples.english: The allies arrived in Brussels on September 3rd and Antwerp was freed the next day.
examples.chinese: 盟军于9月3日抵达布鲁塞尔，次日解放了安特卫普。

examples.english: Algeria was liberated from France in 1962.
examples.chinese: 阿尔及利亚于1962年从法国的统治下解放了出来。

examples.english: the liberation of Italy
examples.chinese: 意大利解放

centers.english: not in prison

examples.english: He was free again, after 10 long years in jail.
examples.chinese: 在监狱中度过漫长的十年后，他又自由了。

examples.english: The hostages are now free after their five-day ordeal.
examples.chinese: 这些人质经历了五天的苦难之后现在自由了。

examples.english: The rapist was sentenced to five years in prison, but he could be free in 18 months.
examples.chinese: 强奸犯被判了五年徒刑，不过18个月以后就可能获得自由。

examples.english: Peters could be out in as little as 3 years.
examples.chinese: 彼得斯过上短短三年也许就可以出狱了。

examples.english: Her husband gets out of jail next week.
examples.chinese: 她丈夫下周出狱。

examples.english: Tonight only one of the escaped prisoners remains at liberty; the other seven are now back in Central Prison.
examples.chinese: 今晚只有一名囚犯仍在逃，其余七名均已被捕，送回中央监狱。

examples.english: Walker was at liberty for many years before the police apprehended him.
examples.chinese: 沃克逍遥法外多年才被警察逮捕。

examples.english: One of the protesters was arrested again after only 48 hours of freedom.
examples.chinese: 其中一名抗议者被释放仅48小时后又再次被拘捕了。

examples.english: The negotiations led to freedom for the eight hostages.
examples.chinese: 谈判的结果使这八名人质获得自由。

centers.english: to let someone leave prison

examples.english: McKay moved to Newcastle after being released from prison.
examples.chinese: 麦凯获释出狱后搬到纽卡斯尔去了。

examples.english: They released ten political prisoners last year.
examples.chinese: 去年他们释放了十名政治犯。

examples.english: The four men were greeted by jubilant relatives upon their release.
examples.chinese: 四名男子获释后受到亲属们兴高采烈地欢迎。

examples.english: Thousands of people worldwide campaigned for the release of Nelson Mandela.
examples.chinese: 世界各地数以万计的人为要求纳尔逊·曼德拉获释而发起运动。

examples.english: The hostages were set free last night.
examples.chinese: 人质于昨晚获释。

examples.english: The Emancipation Proclamation, in 1863, set the American slaves free.
examples.chinese: 1863年颁布的《解放宣言》使美国的黑奴获得了自由。

examples.english: Lusani hopes to be let out early.
examples.chinese: 卢萨尼希望早日获得释放。

examples.english: She was let out of prison to attend her daughter's funeral.
examples.chinese: 她被允许出狱去参加女儿的葬礼。

examples.english: Due to a lack of evidence against the suspect, the police had to let the prisoner go.
examples.chinese: 由于指控嫌疑犯的证据不足，警方只得释放他。

examples.english: I just kept praying that the man would let me go.
examples.chinese: 我不断地祈祷希望那名男子能放我走。

examples.english: Many of these young offenders should have been freed a long time ago.
examples.chinese: 这些少年犯有许多早就应该被释放了。

examples.english: His supporters are demanding that he be freed from prison.
examples.chinese: 他的支持者要求把他从狱中释放出来。

examples.english: The dolphins will be freed into the ocean once their injuries have healed.
examples.chinese: 这些海豚受的伤一痊愈就会被放回海里。

centers.english: time when you can do what you want
centers.chinese: 你能做自己想做的事的时间

examples.english: Now that she's retired she has plenty of free time.
examples.chinese: 她已退休，有许多闲暇的时间。

examples.english: On Wednesday afternoons most of the students have free time.
examples.chinese: 星期三下午大多数学生都有闲暇。

examples.english: Theo spends his free time doing volunteer work.
examples.chinese: 西奥把自己的空余时间用于做志愿工作。

examples.english: In his limited free time, Carson likes to take his family skiing.
examples.chinese: 卡森在自己有限的闲暇时间内喜欢带家人去滑雪。

examples.english: Mothers with young babies rarely have much spare time.
examples.chinese: 带婴儿的母亲很难得有空闲时间。

examples.english: She's studying for a degree in her spare time.
examples.chinese: 她业余时间里在读学位。

examples.english: How do you spend your spare time?
examples.chinese: 你怎么度过自己的闲暇时间？

examples.english: Penny spends her spare time writing letters and emailing friends.
examples.chinese: 彭妮把闲暇时间用来给朋友写信和发电子邮件。

examples.english: All employees are allowed time off for doctor's appointments.
examples.chinese: 所有员工都被允许休假去看医生。

examples.english: She hasn't had any time off for six months.
examples.chinese: 她已经连续六个月没有休假了。

examples.english: I'll need some extra time off for revision.
examples.chinese: 我需要些额外闲暇时间复习。

examples.english: Americans get much less time off work than European workers.
examples.chinese: 比起欧洲的工人，美国的工人闲暇时间要少得多。

examples.english: Very often, retired people need to be taught how to use and enjoy their leisure time.
examples.chinese: 退休的人常常需要指导才会利用和享受闲暇时间。

examples.english: If I have a moment of leisure, I go to the movies.
examples.chinese: 我如果有空就会去看电影。

examples.english: In his leisure time he visits museums and art galleries.
examples.chinese: 他业余时间会去参观博物馆和画廊。

examples.english: tourism, sightseeing, and other leisure time activities
examples.chinese: 旅游、观光以及其他业余活动

examples.english: Reading was one of the most popular leisure activities.
examples.chinese: 阅读是最常见的消闲活动之一。

examples.english: Taking time out just to relax each day is important for busy working people.
examples.chinese: 每天停下工作放松一下对忙碌的上班族是很重要的。

centers.english: when you are not busy and have free time

examples.english: Are you free this weekend?
examples.chinese: 这个周末你有空吗?

examples.english: I'm free on Wednesday evening, if you want to go out to dinner then.
examples.chinese: 如果你要出去吃饭的话，星期三晚上我有空。

expressions.text: not have anything planned/ not have anything on

examples.english: I don't think we have anything on next Tuesday, do we?
examples.chinese: 我们下周二没什么安排，对吧？

examples.english: We don't have anything planned yet for Christmas; we might go to my parents’.
examples.chinese: 圣诞节我们还没什么安排，我们可能去父母那里。

examples.english: Take a brochure home to read at your leisure.
examples.chinese: 拿本小册子回家，有空时阅读一下。

examples.english: Sixty cars will be displayed, and potential buyers will be able to inspect them at leisure.
examples.chinese: 将展出六十辆汽车，有意的顾客可以随便参观。

centers.english: not high or not far off the ground

examples.english: The garden was surrounded by a low wall.
examples.chinese: 花园周围是一道矮墙。

examples.english: Some of the lowest branches were touching the ground.
examples.chinese: 有些低垂的树枝触到了地面。

examples.english: In the middle of the room was a low table.
examples.chinese: 房间中央是一张矮桌。

examples.english: The plane flew low over the fields.
examples.chinese: 飞机在田野上空低飞。

examples.english: We had to bend down low to get through the opening.
examples.chinese: 我们只得把腰弯得很低才能穿过那个洞。

examples.english: Low-lying land in river valleys is often subject to flooding.
examples.chinese: 河谷里的低洼地常常被水淹没。

examples.english: Experts are predicting that the sea level will rise, flooding many low-lying areas.
examples.chinese: 专家预测，海平面将会上升，淹没许多地势低的地区。

examples.english: There are many advantages to low-rise buildings.
examples.chinese: 低层房子有很多好处。

examples.english: traditional, low-rise housing
examples.chinese: 传统的低层住房

centers.english: a low sound/voice etc

examples.english: I can't sing the low notes.
examples.chinese: 我唱不了低音。

examples.english: He's got quite a low singing voice.
examples.chinese: 他唱歌的声音很低沉。

examples.english: David's familiar deep voice called out to her as she walked past.
examples.chinese: 她走过时，戴维用她熟悉的低沉声音喊她。

examples.english: She heard a husky voice call her name.
examples.chinese: 她听到有一个沙哑的声音在喊她的名字。

examples.english: His voice dropped to a husky whisper.
examples.chinese: 他声音轻下来，变成沙哑的低语。

examples.english: Jim was asked to sing the bass solos.
examples.chinese: 吉姆被要求唱低音独唱部分。

examples.english: You need to play the bass notes slightly louder.
examples.chinese: 这几个低音你要稍微弹响一些。

examples.english: He sang popular songs for us in his deep bass voice.
examples.chinese: 他用深沉的低音给我们唱流行歌曲。

examples.english: He spoke in a strong, rich voice.
examples.chinese: 他说话时声音浑厚有力。

examples.english: She had a wonderful deep, rich singing voice.
examples.chinese: 她的歌声甜美，深沉而圆润。

centers.english: a low temperature/level/rate/cost
centers.chinese: 低的温度/水平/比率/费用

examples.english: the lowest temperature ever recorded
examples.chinese: 有记录以来的最低气温

examples.english: Japan has a much lower crime rate than other countries.
examples.chinese: 日本的犯罪率远远低于其他国家。

examples.english: the recent low level of unemployment
examples.chinese: 近来的低失业率

centers.english: work that someone does as part of their job

examples.english: What kind of work are you looking for?
examples.chinese: 你在找什么样的工作?

examples.english: He liked the work, and he was good at it too.
examples.chinese: 他喜欢这工作，并且做得也很好。

examples.english: Scott's doing some work for me at the moment, as it happens.
examples.chinese: 斯科特这会儿正好在为我做点事。

examples.english: I didn't get much work done today.
examples.chinese: 我今天没做多少工作。

examples.english: Being in the police isn't all action. Administration is a large part of the work we do.
examples.chinese: 警察的工作并不全是执行任务，我们还要处理大量的行政事务。

examples.english: Have you ever done bar work before?
examples.chinese: 你以前有没有做过律师工作？

examples.english: He's doing construction work these days.
examples.chinese: 如今他在干建筑工作。

examples.english: It's clerical work mainly -- pretty boring.
examples.chinese: 主要是文书工作—很无聊。

examples.english: She does two afternoons voluntary work at the playgroup.
examples.chinese: 她在幼儿游戏班做两个下午的义工。

examples.english: Are you still involved in charity work?
examples.chinese: 你还在做慈善工作吗？

examples.english: The last thing I want is extra work.
examples.chinese: 我最不愿加班。

examples.english: I was in London last month because I had some business there.
examples.chinese: 上个月我在伦敦，因为在那里我有些生意。

examples.english: Gerald left, saying he had some important business to attend to.
examples.chinese: 杰拉尔德走了，他说有些重要的生意要处理。

examples.english: Some insurance companies offer lower rates for drivers who do not use their cars for business.
examples.chinese: 对于不作商务用途的汽车，有些保险公司给车主提供较低的保费。

examples.english: ‘Is this trip for business or pleasure?’ ‘Business, I'm afraid.’
examples.chinese: “这次出门是出差还是游玩？”“恐怕是出差。”

examples.english: The paper claims to provide proof that some drug lords are doing business from their jail cells.
examples.chinese: 这份报纸称他们可以提供一些大毒枭在监狱牢房里遥控生意的证据。

examples.english: ‘Where's Michael?’ ‘He's at a business meeting.’
examples.chinese: “迈克尔在哪里？”“他在开工作会议。”

examples.english: This is strictly a business trip.
examples.chinese: 这确确实实是出差。

examples.english: Our main market is the business traveler looking for cheap overnight accommodation.
examples.chinese: 我们的主要市场是寻求廉价食宿的商务旅客。

examples.english: I have to go to Tokyo next month on business.
examples.chinese: 下个月我要去东京出差。

examples.english: In addition to secretarial and general office work, your duties will include providing the directors with refreshments.
examples.chinese: 除了秘书工作和一般的办公室工作外，你的职责还将包括向董事们提供点心。

examples.english: As soon as she returned home from her honeymoon, she resumed her medical duties at the clinic.
examples.chinese: 她度完蜜月一回家就又回到诊所继续医疗工作了。

examples.english: A teacher can be dismissed for not performing his or her contractual duties.
examples.chinese: 教师未履行合同规定的职责可被解雇。

examples.english: She is a member of staff, and like all of us, she has duties to fulfil.
examples.chinese: 她也是一名员工，和我们一样，她也要履行职责。

examples.english: I admired him, especially because of the way he went about his duties efficiently.
examples.chinese: 我佩服他，尤其是因为他工作效率高。

examples.english: Three instructors have been suspended from duties while sexual harassment charges are investigated.
examples.chinese: 性骚扰指控调查期间，三名讲师被暂时停职。

examples.english: Nine officers were relieved of their duties after McDuffie's death.
examples.chinese: 九名官员因为麦克达菲之死被暂时停职。

centers.english: work that a student does

examples.english: My brother always used to help me with my homework.
examples.chinese: 我哥哥过去常常帮助我做作业。

examples.english: I'm sorry Gail, but Amber has to stay home and do her homework.
examples.chinese: 对不起，盖尔，安伯得待在家里做作业。

examples.english: Oh, I've got so much homework to do!
examples.chinese: 噢，我有那么多作业要做！

examples.english: Did you get your homework done Jason?
examples.chinese: 贾森，你的作业都做完了吗？

examples.english: I don't have any homework tonight.
examples.chinese: 今天晚上我没有家庭作业。

examples.english: Have you got a lot of homework then?
examples.chinese: 那么你有很多作业要做吗？

examples.english: For homework, I'd like you to finish exercises 2 and 3 on page 24.
examples.chinese: 至于家庭作业，我想要你们做完第24页上的练习2和练习3。

examples.english: Dave, have you done your French homework?
examples.chinese: 戴夫，你做完法语作业了吗？

examples.english: Mrs Hoffmann, I'm calling about Mike's classwork. There are some problems.
examples.chinese: 霍夫曼太太，我打电话来想谈谈迈克的课堂作业，有点问题。

examples.english: The units are ideal for classwork, but can also be used by students at home.
examples.chinese: 这些单元是理想的课堂作业，但学生也可以在家里做。

examples.english: Johnny's had a lot of problems at home recently and it's starting to affect his schoolwork.
examples.chinese: 约翰尼最近家里出了很多事，开始影响他的学业了。

examples.english: The program combines schoolwork with job experience.
examples.chinese: 这个计划将课业和工作实践结合在一起。

examples.english: Tim, a third-grader, had difficulty with his schoolwork, and also found it hard to make friends.
examples.chinese: 蒂姆是一名三年级学生，学习上有困难，而且交朋友也有问题。

examples.english: Half of the marks are for the exam, the rest are for coursework.
examples.chinese: 一半分数是考试，其余的是课程作业。

examples.english: None of the coursework seemed to have much relevance to being a nurse in a busy hospital.
examples.chinese: 课程作业好像跟在一家忙碌的医院里做护士没有很大关系。

examples.english: I'm just so behind on the coursework.
examples.chinese: 我还有很多课程作业没做。

examples.english: After the war, he resumed his studies at the University of Turin.
examples.chinese: 战争结束后，他恢复了在都灵大学的学业。

examples.english: Her parents insisted that she give up the vacation job, as they felt it was interfering with her studies.
examples.chinese: 她父母坚持要她放弃假期的工作，因为他们觉得这妨碍了她的学业。

examples.english: After completing her studies at the University, she worked as a nurse for six years.
examples.chinese: 完成大学学业后，她做了六年的护士。

centers.english: work that you have to do in your home

examples.english: None of her kids ever help with the housework.
examples.chinese: 她的小孩从来没有一个帮忙做家务。

examples.english: I've got to catch up on the housework this weekend.
examples.chinese: 这个周末我得赶紧做家务。

examples.english: Well, I did all my housework this morning, though you wouldn't think it to look at the place now.
examples.chinese: 嗯，今天早上我把家务都做过了，不过你现在去看的话你不会这样认为。

examples.english: The garden needs a bit more work, but it's almost finished.
examples.chinese: 花园里还有点活要干，但是也差不多干完了。

examples.english: Use the best tools and materials you can afford to give a professional finish to your DIY work.
examples.chinese: 自己动手做东西，要尽量用最好的工具和材料，让成品显得有专业水平。

expressions.text: do some/any more/a bit of etc work

examples.english: ‘Where's Dave?’ ‘He's outside, doing some work on the car, I think.’
examples.chinese: “戴夫在哪里？”“我想是在外面弄车子吧。”

examples.english: I'm not doing any more work on the house this year, I can't be bothered.
examples.chinese: 今年我不再弄房子了，我不想麻烦。

centers.english: a piece of work done by an artist, musician etc
centers.chinese: 艺术家、音乐家等的作品

examples.english: The painting is one of Picasso's earlier works.
examples.chinese: 这幅画是毕加索的早期作品之一。

examples.english: A major new work by one of Poland's leading film directors will be shown next Saturday.
examples.chinese: 由波兰一名大导演拍摄的一部新的大片将在下星期六上映。

examples.english: The highest price paid for a work of art was the £30.2 million for Van Gogh's ‘Irises’.
examples.chinese: 出价最高的艺术精品是梵高的《鸢尾花》，达3,020英镑。

examples.english: the complete works of William Shakespeare
examples.chinese: 莎士比亚全集

examples.english: The concert began with three short pieces by the Brazilian composer Villa-Lobos.
examples.chinese: 这场音乐会以巴西作曲家维拉-罗勃斯的三支短曲开始。

examples.english: The collection includes pieces in both oils and watercolours, with a range of still life paintings.
examples.chinese: 藏品中有油画和水彩画，是静物系列。

examples.english: Another typical piece of Owen's work is the poem, ‘The Sentry’.
examples.chinese: 欧文的另一代表作是诗歌《哨兵》。

examples.english: a truly impressive piece of Greek sculpture
examples.chinese: 一座让人印象深刻的希腊雕塑

centers.english: the effort involved in working

examples.english: David tries to avoid work at all times.
examples.chinese: 戴维总是试图躲避工作。

examples.english: It seems to be an awful lot of work to keep this place looking tidy.
examples.chinese: 保持这个地方整洁似乎非常费劲。

examples.english: Finally, I would like to thank all the staff for their hard work this year.
examples.chinese: 最后，我想感谢全体职员这一年来的努力工作。

examples.english: My daughter gained her grades through sheer hard work and determination.
examples.chinese: 我女儿取得成绩全凭她的努力和决心。

examples.english: His last few speeches had been awful, and he knew he had to put more work into them.
examples.chinese: 他最近的几次演讲很糟糕，他知道得多花点工夫了。

examples.english: Phil has had the car for two years and has put hours of work into it.
examples.chinese: 菲尔的车买了两年，他在上面已经花了很多工夫。

expressions.text: a considerable/huge/immense etc amount of work

examples.english: A considerable amount of work was necessary to establish even this basic framework.
examples.chinese: 即使是搭建这个基本的框架也需要花相当多的工夫。

examples.english: The students have put a huge amount of work into the scheme.
examples.chinese: 学生在这个计划中投入了不少心思。

examples.english: Well done Peter -- keep up the good work.
examples.chinese: 干得不错，彼得—继续好好干。

examples.english: I hope you'll join me in paying tribute to the sterling work done by the committee this year.
examples.chinese: 我希望大家和我一起向委员会今年所取得的优异成绩致敬。

examples.english: It seemed like a lot of effort for a very small gain.
examples.chinese: 好像是事倍功半。

examples.english: His last piece does require some effort from the listener, but it's well worth it.
examples.chinese: 他最后一首乐曲需要听众用心听，但这很值得。

examples.english: He mounted the slope with effort, breathing hard.
examples.chinese: 他费力地爬上山坡，气喘吁吁。

examples.english: I could have told you it would be a waste of effort.
examples.chinese: 我本可以告诉你这是白费力气。

examples.english: After all the effort I put in, they had better be satisfied!
examples.chinese: 我那么卖力，他们也该满意了！

examples.english: Vicki has hardly put in any effort, yet she's expecting the same rewards as everyone else.
examples.chinese: 薇姬几乎没出什么力，但是她还期望得到和别人一样的奖赏。

examples.english: This exercise isn't difficult - it shouldn't require much effort.
examples.chinese: 这练习不难—不用费很大工夫。

examples.english: The former method takes a bit more effort, but the results are more reliable.
examples.chinese: 前一种方法要费点工夫，但是结果较可靠。

examples.english: Children are hard work, of course, but worth the effort.
examples.chinese: 带孩子当然吃力，但是值得。

examples.english: The climb is arduous, but well worth the effort, as the views from the top are spectacular.
examples.chinese: 爬山艰苦，但是值得，因为山顶的景色很壮观。

examples.english: I've spent a lot of time and effort getting this far. I'm not giving up now.
examples.chinese: 我花费了许多时间和心血做到这一步，我现在不会放弃的。

examples.english: Many women do all the work in the home, and their labour is unpaid.
examples.chinese: 许多妇女料理所有家务，而她们的劳动是没有报酬的。

examples.english: Marx defined the working class as people who sell their labour to employers.
examples.chinese: 马克思把工人阶级定义为把劳动出卖给雇主的人。

examples.english: You don't look as if you could do physical labor.
examples.chinese: 你看上去不像会干体力活。

examples.english: rising opportunities in agricultural labor in the North
examples.chinese: 北方越来越多的干农活的机会

examples.english: Thanks to your energy and commitment, the fundraiser was a great success.
examples.chinese: 感谢你们所付出的精力和奉献精神，这次募捐活动取得了极大成功。

examples.english: Your commitment to the project is very much appreciated by management.
examples.chinese: 管理层很感激你们对这个项目的投入。

examples.english: He is adamant that he wants total commitment and effort in the build-up to the match.
examples.chinese: 他坚决要求全身心投入到比赛的准备阶段中。

examples.english: Lawrence promised full commitment in his drive to make Santa Barbara College the most successful school in the region.
examples.chinese: 劳伦斯承诺会尽全力让圣巴巴拉学院成为本地区最成功的大学。

centers.english: unpleasant or boring work
centers.chinese: 令人不快的或乏味的工作

examples.english: Work feels like such a grind lately.
examples.chinese: 近来工作让人感觉如此乏味。

examples.english: The relentless grind of hard labour and ill-health had taken its toll on Booth.
examples.chinese: 没完没了的苦活重活加上身体不好已对布思造成极大损害。

examples.english: The daily grind of meetings and tutorials went on.
examples.chinese: 每天都是单调乏味的会议和辅导课。

examples.english: The Prime Minister is pictured taking a break from the hard grind of political life.
examples.chinese: 有人拍到了首相放下繁重的政务在休假的照片。

examples.english: The journey across the valley to the farm is going to be a slog.
examples.chinese: 穿过山谷到农场的这一段路会走得很辛苦。

examples.english: It's a hard slog isn't it? I wish we'd got further yesterday.
examples.chinese: 很辛苦是不是？要是昨天多做点就好了。

examples.english: Cutting all the wood before nightfall was a long, hard slog.
examples.chinese: 要把所有木头都在黄昏前劈好，那真是件漫长的苦差事。

examples.english: I was doing grunt work for the secretary in the department, twenty hours a week.
examples.chinese: 我每周20小时为部门秘书做单调乏味的苦差事。

examples.english: The real donkey work was actually done by those guys.
examples.chinese: 真正的苦差事实际上是由那些家伙干的。

examples.english: Technological advances have taken much of the drudgery out of the assembly line and car plant.
examples.chinese: 技术进步为装配线和汽车制造厂省去了许多辛苦乏味的工作。

examples.english: What seemed a promising job turned into months of boredom and drudgery.
examples.chinese: 看似有前途的职位结果变成了数月无聊乏味的工作。

examples.english: The data management system has eliminated much of the drudgery of filing.
examples.chinese: 数据管理系统省却了文件归档工作中许多繁重乏味的工作。

examples.english: Calculators were introduced to relieve students of the drudgery of pencil-and-paper number-crunching.
examples.chinese: 计算器的使用把学生从枯燥乏味的笔头计算工作中解放了出来。

examples.english: Here began their arduous toil to force a living from the land.
examples.chinese: 他们在这里开始了艰苦劳作，努力在这块土地上谋生。

examples.english: man's desire for freedom from physical toil
examples.chinese: 男性摆脱体力劳动的愿望

centers.english: to do a job that you get paid for

examples.english: I haven't worked since I had my first child seven years ago.
examples.chinese: 七年前我生第一个孩子后就没工作过。

examples.english: His illness eventually prevented him from working.
examples.chinese: 他的病最后使他无法工作。

examples.english: Four teachers agreed to work without pay until things were settled.
examples.chinese: 四名教师同意在事情解决前无偿工作。

examples.english: For nineteen years, my father worked for the General Electric Corporation.
examples.chinese: 我父亲在通用电气公司干了19年。

examples.english: The company Jack worked for gave him fully paid leave during his wife's illness.
examples.chinese: 妻子生病期间，杰克所在的公司给了他带薪假。

examples.english: I'd never worked in a lab before I came here.
examples.chinese: 来这里之前，我从未在实验室工作过。

examples.english: Five mornings a week, she worked on campus.
examples.chinese: 她一周有五个上午在校园里干活。

examples.english: Over the years, I'd gotten used to all the perks of working at a posh downtown Miami law firm.
examples.chinese: 这些年来，我已经习惯了在迈阿密市中心一家高级律师事务所工作的种种好处。

examples.english: He's changed his job and is now working as a consultant for a German firm.
examples.chinese: 他换了工作，现在给一家德国公司当顾问。

examples.english: Her father was an artist who sometimes worked as a salesman and labourer.
examples.chinese: 她爸爸是个画画的，有时也当推销员和工人。

examples.english: Sorry, Bethany doesn't work here any more.
examples.chinese: 对不起，贝萨尼不在这里上班了。

examples.english: Where do you work?
examples.chinese: 你在哪里上班？

examples.english: He only works three days a week now.
examples.chinese: 他现在每周只工作三天。

examples.english: There's always someone in -- I'm working nights so I'm here in the days.
examples.chinese: 家里一直有人的一我晚上上班，所以白天在家。

examples.english: I was working full-time, so I didn't see much of my girlfriend.
examples.chinese: 我全职上班，因此不常见到女朋友。

examples.english: Are you prepared to work longer hours occasionally, to get the work done?
examples.chinese: 你愿意偶尔加班把工作做完吗？

examples.english: My staff work hard, and they trust me. That's important.
examples.chinese: 我的员工工作努力，而且他们信任我，那很重要。

examples.english: ‘What do you do?’ ‘I'm a journalist.’
examples.chinese: “你干什么工作？”“我是个记者。”

examples.english: She was a teacher for over twenty years.
examples.chinese: 她当了二十多年教师。

examples.english: Before becoming a writer, Schwarz had been a cook, a cab driver and a door-to-door salesman.
examples.chinese: 在成为作家前，施瓦茨曾当过厨师、出租车司机和挨户兜售的推销员。

examples.english: Janet says she'd like to go into teaching after she finishes college.
examples.chinese: 珍妮特说她大学毕业后想教书。

examples.english: Mills was wealthy even before he went into politics.
examples.chinese: 米尔斯早在从政前就很有钱了。

examples.english: Snyder went into business for herself as an independent consultant.
examples.chinese: 斯奈德从商当独立顾问。

examples.english: Although he is a qualified dentist, he ceased to practice several years ago.
examples.chinese: 虽然他是位合格的牙医，但他几年前就不干这一行了。

examples.english: Kingsley has been practising from the London Hydrotherapy Centre since 1960.
examples.chinese: 自1960年起，金斯利就在伦敦水疗中心执业。

examples.english: I graduated from Manchester Law school and practised law with the firm of Arthur & Madden of Birmingham.
examples.chinese: 我毕业于曼彻斯特法学院，曾在伯明翰的阿瑟和梅登律师行执业。

examples.english: A small proportion of those who complete their training do not practise as doctors.
examples.chinese: 有一小部分人完成培训后没有当医生。

examples.english: Jenny is a practising psychotherapist.
examples.chinese: 珍妮是执业心理治疗师。

centers.english: to do work that is not part of your job

examples.english: I've been working all day in the garden.
examples.chinese: 我在花园里干了一天活。

examples.english: We had to work non-stop to get the boat ready for the race.
examples.chinese: 为了在比赛前把船造好，我们必须不停地干。

examples.english: I have to work on the Jeep over the weekend.
examples.chinese: 周末我得修理吉普车。

examples.english: I'm always the one who does the cooking and cleaning and stuff around here.
examples.chinese: 这里做饭、打扫诸如此类的事情总是我来做。

examples.english: It's about time the laundry was done.
examples.chinese: 该洗衣服了吧。

examples.english: Hey, the washing-up's been done. That must have been Cynthia.
examples.chinese: 嗨，碗碟都洗好了，肯定是辛西娅洗的。

centers.english: to be at the place where you work

examples.english: I'm afraid Fran's not here at the moment -- he's at work.
examples.chinese: 恐怕弗兰现在不在这儿——他在上班。

examples.english: What time do you have to be at work?
examples.chinese: 你几点上班？

examples.english: I'll tell you, I wish I had these DAT machines at work.
examples.chinese: 我告诉你，我希望我的办公室里有这些数码录音机。

examples.english: You can't drink while you're on duty.
examples.chinese: 值班的时候不能喝酒。

expressions.text: on duty 24 hours/from 6.00 p.m./on Mondays etc

examples.english: I'm on duty from 8 a.m. on Monday till 12 midday on Thursday.
examples.chinese: 我从周一上午9点一直值班到周四中午12点。

examples.english: We're on duty tonight at half past ten.
examples.chinese: 我们今晚10点半值班。

examples.english: She drives to Tijuana several times a month on business.
examples.chinese: 她一个月有好几次要开车去蒂华纳出差。

examples.english: The family was living in the Palace Hotel in Japan because my father was there on business.
examples.chinese: 全家人都住在日本的皇宫酒店，因为我爸爸在那里出差。

examples.english: Do you travel abroad on business more than three times a year?
examples.chinese: 你每年去国外出差超过三次吗？

examples.english: With her husband frequently away on business, Berenice turns to a close friend for help and support.
examples.chinese: 丈夫经常出差，使贝蕾妮丝转而向好朋友求助。

examples.english: Doctor Lalor won't be at the surgery this afternoon, but she's on call until midnight.
examples.chinese: 今天下午莱勒医生不在诊所，但午夜之前她随叫随到。

examples.english: If the machine breaks down at any time, there's always a technician on call.
examples.chinese: 如果机器突然坏了的话，总有位技术员随叫随到。

examples.english: Construction managers must be on call to deal with emergencies.
examples.chinese: 施工经理必须随叫随到处理紧急情况。

expressions.text: be on call 24 hours a day/3 days a week etc

examples.english: Resident managers live in hotels and are on call 24 hours a day.
examples.chinese: 驻店经理住在酒店里，一天24小时随时待命。

centers.english: a piece of work that you have to do

examples.english: Repairing the roof -- that's going to be the biggest job.
examples.chinese: 修理屋顶—那可是最费工夫的事。

examples.english: Cleaning the car's one of my least favorite jobs.
examples.chinese: 洗车是我最不喜欢干的活之一。

examples.english: Well, I must go now. I've lots of jobs to do around the house.
examples.chinese: 好啦，我得走了，家里有很多事要做。

examples.english: I always take my car to York Street garage. They're expensive, but they do a good job.
examples.chinese: 我总是把车送到约克街汽车修理厂，他们收费虽然高，但是活干得漂亮。

examples.english: Irene did a nice job on those clothes didn't she?
examples.chinese: 那些衣服艾琳做得很漂亮，不是吗？

examples.english: He didn't complain or criticize, he just got on with the job.
examples.chinese: 他没有发牢骚也没有指责，只是继续工作。

examples.english: He does odd jobs for people in his spare time.
examples.chinese: 他闲下来时为人打打零工。

examples.english: Let's just concentrate on the job in hand, shall we?
examples.chinese: 我们就专注手头上的工作，好吗？

examples.english: She was upset, and found it difficult to keep her mind on the job at hand.
examples.chinese: 她心神不定，难以专注手上的工作。

examples.english: One of the first tasks Eva set herself was learning the local language.
examples.chinese: 伊娃为自己定的头几个任务之一是学会当地语言。

examples.english: The UN Peacekeeping Force faces an almost impossible task.
examples.chinese: 联合国维和部队面临一个几乎不可能完成的任务。

examples.english: We knew what had to be done, but it wasn't an easy task.
examples.chinese: 我们知道得做什么，但这个任务不简单。

examples.english: Recovery crews continued the grim task of retrieving bodies from the wreckage.
examples.chinese: 救援队继续执行从残骸里打捞尸体的令人沮丧的任务。

examples.english: By 2001, we had begun the task of collecting the materials and information needed for the study.
examples.chinese: 2001年的时候，我们已开始着手这个工作，搜集研究所需的素材和资料。

examples.english: This is one of the most difficult and complex tasks we face.
examples.chinese: 这是我们面临的最困难、最复杂的任务之一。

expressions.text: perform a task/carry out a task

examples.english: Most of the workers did not have the skills required to perform the most basic tasks.
examples.chinese: 大多数工人都不具备完成最基本任务所需的技能。

examples.english: The massacre was never fully investigated because the police were incapable of carrying out the task.
examples.chinese: 对这场大屠杀从没有展开过全面的调查，原因是警方没有能力执行这个任务。

examples.english: Who on earth would volunteer for such a thankless task?
examples.chinese: 谁还会主动去做这样吃力不讨好的差使？

expressions.text: something to do/some work to do

examples.english: I'll pick the laundry up on Saturday -- I have some shopping to do anyway.
examples.chinese: 我周六去拿洗好的衣服——反正还要去买些东西。

examples.english: I've got some work to do this evening.
examples.chinese: 今天晚上我有些事情要做。

expressions.text: do/hand in/submit a piece of work

examples.english: Do you actually fail the year if you don't hand in a piece of work?
examples.chinese: 要是不把作业交上去，今年真的会不及格吗？

examples.english: I've got a merit for every piece of work I've done.
examples.chinese: 我的每一件作品都有可称道之处。

examples.english: I think this is a very fine piece of work and it deserves a first class mark.
examples.chinese: 我认为这件作品很好，应该得高分。

examples.english: Look at that piece of work and ask yourself the question -- ‘Is this the best I can do?’
examples.chinese: 看看那件作品，然后问自己—“我就只能做到这么好吗？”

examples.english: Bart's first assignment for the newspaper was to report on the French elections.
examples.chinese: 巴特在报社的第一个任务是报道法国大选。

examples.english: This is a really tough assignment, and I believe you're the only person who can handle it.
examples.chinese: 这是个很棘手的任务，我相信你是唯一一个能应付的人。

examples.english: She stayed late to complete a class assignment.
examples.chinese: 她留到很晚以完成课堂作业。

examples.english: Robin spent many lunch hours poring over her math assignments.
examples.chinese: 罗宾用了很多午餐时间仔细阅读她的数学作业。

examples.english: I eventually got a teaching assignment at Xibei.
examples.chinese: 我最终在西北谋到一个教职。

examples.english: ‘I figure this will either make or break us,’ Cheyne said of the 1-year assignment to get the camp up and running.
examples.chinese: “我想我们成败在此一举。”切恩谈到为期一年的任务是使阵营准备就绪时如此说道。

examples.english: Washing the kitchen floor was a daily chore, and it was the one I hated most.
examples.chinese: 清洗厨房地面是每天要做的家务，我最讨厌这个了。

examples.english: When we opened the store, our ambition was to make shopping less of a chore, more of a pleasure.
examples.chinese: 我们开商店时的目标是使购物少点麻烦，多点乐趣。

examples.english: When I got old enough I started to have chores around the house.
examples.chinese: 当我长大了，就开始做家务。

examples.english: Michael, come on. Do your chores, bud.
examples.chinese: 迈克尔，来吧，做家务了，老兄。

examples.english: Husbands should be prepared to do their share of the household chores.
examples.chinese: 丈夫应该分担家务。

examples.english: Before you disappear, I want you to do an errand for me.
examples.chinese: 在你消失之前，我要你给我办件事。

examples.english: Peter cleaned equipment, ran errands, answered the phone -- it was all routine.
examples.chinese: 彼得清洗设备、跑腿、接电话—都是些日常杂活。

examples.english: I used to pick up her dry cleaning and run errands for her.
examples.chinese: 我以前常给她取干洗的衣服，跑跑腿。

examples.english: For the most part, there was not much to do, other than cleanup duty around the prison camp.
examples.chinese: 除了战俘营里的打扫任务外，大部分时间没什么太多的事可做。

examples.english: Part of a park ranger's official duties is to ensure public safety.
examples.chinese: 园林管理员的职责之一是确保公众安全。

examples.english: clerical and secretarial duties
examples.chinese: 文书和秘书的职责

expressions.text: have a duty to do something

examples.english: Teachers have a duty to ensure that students are not injured whilst they are in their care.
examples.chinese: 教师有责任确保照管的学生不受伤害。

examples.english: And now I have a very pleasant duty to perform. I am going to present the prizes to the winning competitors.
examples.chinese: 现在我要履行一项非常愉快的职责，给获奖选手颁奖。

examples.english: He recently completed a tour of duty in Seoul as assistant to the US ambassador there.
examples.chinese: 他在首尔给美国驻韩大使当助理的任期最近结束了。

centers.english: an important piece of work

examples.english: The federal government will help fund this immense project, which includes the building of 150 day-care centers.
examples.chinese: 联邦政府将资助这个庞大的计划，这个计划包括建造150个日托中心。

examples.english: The government scrapped the project after ruling that the costs were too high.
examples.chinese: 政府裁定费用太高，故此放弃了这个计划。

examples.english: I've been working on the Inner City Development Project for the last five years.
examples.chinese: 过去五年我一直在忙于旧城区改造计划。

examples.english: a joint US--British research project
examples.chinese: 美英联合研究计划

examples.english: These are encouraging signs that the ballpark project is moving from blueprint to reality.
examples.chinese: 棒球场计划正从蓝图变为现实，这些都是令人鼓舞的迹象。

examples.english: He was immediately sent to Paris. His mission was to negotiate a ceasefire.
examples.chinese: 他立即被派往巴黎，任务是商议停火协议。

examples.english: He volunteered to embark on a dangerous secret mission into occupied France.
examples.chinese: 他自告奋勇，参加一个危险的秘密任务，潜入被占领的法国。

examples.english: a rescue mission to salvage a satellite
examples.chinese: 抢修卫星的救援任务

examples.english: I flew on over 280 combat missions in two wars, so I'm used to danger.
examples.chinese: 两次战争中我参加过二百八十多次飞行战斗任务，因此我对危险已习惯了。

examples.english: In the late 1980s, the US embarked on a major undertaking: the human genome project.
examples.chinese: 20世纪80年代末，美国开始了一个重大项目：人类基因组计划。

examples.english: Everybody needs to realise that this is a huge undertaking.
examples.chinese: 每个人都要明白，这是一个巨大的任务。

examples.english: Covering an Olympics is an extraordinary undertaking for any television company.
examples.chinese: 报道奥运会对任何一家电视公司来说都是非同寻常的任务。

centers.english: to give someone work to do

examples.english: I asked Joel's teacher if we should give him some Level 4 work.
examples.chinese: 我问乔尔的老师，我们是否该给他做些四级的作业。

examples.english: We were given some grammar assignments for homework.
examples.chinese: 我们给布置了一些语法练习作为家庭作业。

examples.english: Angie did a really good interview, but they gave the job to someone with more experience.
examples.chinese: 安吉面试表现很好，但是他们却把职位给了更有经验的人。

expressions.text: give somebody something to do/give something to somebody to do

examples.english: What can I give Helen to do? She's finished the filing.
examples.chinese: 我给海伦做什么呢？她刚完成归档。

examples.english: OK, you open the parcels. That'll give you something to do.
examples.chinese: 好的，你来打开包裹，那会给你一些事情做做。

examples.english: ‘Have you peeled the carrots?’ ‘No, I gave them to Dad to do.’
examples.chinese: “你削好胡萝卜了吗？”“没有，我交给爸爸做了。”

examples.english: You have been assigned the task of keeping the records up to date.
examples.chinese: 指派给你的任务是不断更新记录。

examples.english: After her promotion took effect, she was assigned a research job.
examples.chinese: 她的晋升令生效后，她获派一项研究工作。

examples.english: The job of producing a development program was assigned to the junior minister.
examples.chinese: 制定发展计划的工作指派给了副部长。

examples.english: He was asked to assign two of his employees to the inventory control department.
examples.chinese: 他被要求派两名手下去库存管理部。

examples.english: Mr Harris always sets a lot of homework.
examples.chinese: 哈里斯先生总是布置很多家庭作业。

examples.english: Is that all -- or has she set some other task for you as well?
examples.chinese: 就这么多吗—还是她给你布置了其他任务？

examples.english: Anneka was set the huge task by Christian Aid on behalf of a family who fled from war-torn Mozambique.
examples.chinese: 基督教援助委员会指派给安妮卡一个巨大任务，为从饱受战争蹂躏的莫桑比克逃出的一个家庭提供帮助。

examples.english: She set us some work to do in groups.
examples.chinese: 她指派给我们一些小组任务。

examples.english: At the end of the session, they were set a homework task.
examples.chinese: 这堂课结束时，他们被布置了一项家庭作业。

examples.english: The Philadelphia Medical Society commissioned a report on alcoholism.
examples.chinese: 费城医学会托人撰写有关酒精中毒的报告。

examples.english: His ‘Landscapes’ Symphony was commissioned for the inaugural concert of the Shepherd School.
examples.chinese: 他的《风光》交响曲是受托为谢泼德学院的成立音乐会而写的。

examples.english: Seventy-five percent of Americans think that women are more sensual than men, according to a survey commissioned by Revlon.
examples.chinese: 据露华浓公司委托进行的一项调查显示，75%的美国人认为女性比男性更喜欢感官享受。

examples.english: The Left-Hand Piano Concerto was the first of several works commissioned from distinguished composers.
examples.chinese: 《左撇子钢琴协奏曲》是著名作曲家受托谱写的数部作品中的第一部。

examples.english: In 1506, Bramante was commissioned by Pope Julius II to rebuild St Peter's church.
examples.chinese: 1506年，教皇尤利乌斯二世委托布拉曼特重建圣彼得大教堂。

examples.english: The gallery is housed in the new wing, which he commissioned Adams to build 18 years ago.
examples.chinese: 美术馆设在新翼，那是他18年前委派亚当斯建造的。

examples.english: Campaign adviser Ken Polaski has been saddled with the job of explaining the recent presidential gaffes.
examples.chinese: 竞选顾问肯·波兰斯基有件苦差事，要为总统最近的失言作出解释。

examples.english: ‘I'm sorry you've been lumbered with running me back home,’ said Ashley stiffly.
examples.chinese: “对不起，开车送我回家让你受累了。”阿什利生硬地说。

examples.english: The Hong Kong Rugby Union has saddled Simpkin with the post of national coach to the ailing team.
examples.chinese: 香港橄榄球联合会把这支积弱球队的主教练职位推给了辛普金。

centers.english: a job

examples.english: My first job was in a record store.
examples.chinese: 我的第一份工作是在一家唱片店上班。

examples.english: Daniel starts his new job on Monday.
examples.chinese: 丹尼尔周一去上新工。

examples.english: She has a well-paid job in the tax department.
examples.chinese: 她在税务部门干着一份收入丰厚的工作。

examples.english: Ted got a job as a bartender.
examples.chinese: 泰德得到一份当酒保的工作。

examples.english: Her son still hasn't been able to find a job.
examples.chinese: 她儿子仍未能找到工作。

examples.english: She's looking for a job in the music business.
examples.chinese: 她正在音乐圈内找工作。

examples.english: If a woman is qualified, she should hold any job in government she wants.
examples.chinese: 女性如果条件符合，就应该可以担任政府部门内任何她想要的职位。

examples.english: I had a part-time job while I was in college.
examples.chinese: 我上大学时做过一份兼职工作。

examples.english: The company announced 74,000 job cuts and 21 factory closures.
examples.chinese: 这家公司宣布裁员74,000人，并关闭21家工厂。

examples.english: My father started work when he was 14.
examples.chinese: 我父亲14岁开始工作。

examples.english: Most people stop work when they are 65.
examples.chinese: 大多数人65岁就不再工作了。

examples.english: I usually start work each day around 9 am and finish about 6 pm.
examples.chinese: 我一般每天早上9点左右上班，下午6点左右下班。

examples.english: The work's really interesting but the pay's lousy.
examples.chinese: 这工作确实很有趣，可报酬很低。

examples.english: Lena graduated from college six months ago and she's still looking for work.
examples.chinese: 莉娜大学毕业已六个月，但仍在找工作。

examples.english: He eventually found work as a labourer on a construction site.
examples.chinese: 他最终在一个建筑工地上找到一份体力活。

expressions.text: return to work/go back to work

examples.english: Women often return to work after they have had children.
examples.chinese: 妇女生了孩子后通常会回去工作。！

examples.english: His injuries have made it impossible for him to go back to work.
examples.chinese: 他的伤使他不可能再回去工作了。
