examples.english: Her mother tried to call her at home and then at work.
examples.chinese: 她母亲试图打电话到家里找她，然后又打到她工作的地方。

examples.english: Alexander commutes 30 miles to work each day.
examples.chinese: 亚历山大每天乘车30英里去上班。

examples.english: They sometimes play tennis after work.
examples.chinese: 他们有时在下班后打网球。

examples.english: Many teachers are thinking about leaving the profession for more highly paid careers.
examples.chinese: 许多教师在考虑辞职去从事薪酬更高的工作。

examples.english: There are now a lot more women in the legal profession.
examples.chinese: 现在从事法律职业的女性多得多了。

examples.english: There was a big demand for accountants in the 1980s, and many graduates entered the profession at this time.
examples.chinese: 20世纪80年代对会计师的需求量很大，当时许多毕业生投身这一行业。

examples.english: Please write your name, address, and occupation in the spaces below.
examples.chinese: 请在下面空白处填上你的姓名、地址和职业。

examples.english: Part-time workers often work in low-paid occupations.
examples.chinese: 兼职员工通常从事的是低薪职位。

examples.english: In our business the first rule is that the customer is always right.
examples.chinese: 我们这一行第一条守则就是顾客永远是对的。

examples.english: ‘What type of business are you in?’ ‘I run a catering company.’
examples.chinese: “你做哪一行？”“我开一家酒席承办公司。”

examples.english: The used-car business has a pretty bad reputation.
examples.chinese: 旧车买卖行业的声誉相当不好。

examples.english: What does your husband do?
examples.chinese: 你丈夫是干什么的?

examples.english: She used to work for an accounting firm, but I'm not sure what she does now.
examples.chinese: 她以前在一家会计事务所工作，但我不清楚现在她在做什么。

examples.english: Most of the men had worked in skilled trades such as carpentry or printing.
examples.chinese: 当时大多数人都从事手工行业，如木工或印刷。

examples.english: Young men and women can learn a trade in the military.
examples.chinese: 军队里的青年男女可以学一门手艺。

expressions.text: be a bricklayer/carpenter etc by trade

examples.english: His father had been a bricklayer by trade.
examples.chinese: 他父亲以前的职业是砖瓦工。

examples.english: Like his father, Tommy chose a career in the Army.
examples.chinese: 跟父亲一样，汤米选择了军旅生涯。

examples.english: Later on in his career he became first secretary at the British Embassy in Washington.
examples.chinese: 在他的职业生涯中，他后来成了英国驻华盛顿大使馆的一等秘书。

examples.english: The scandal destroyed his career as a politician.
examples.chinese: 这件丑闻毁了他的政治生涯。

examples.english: I wanted to find out more about careers in publishing.
examples.chinese: 我想对出版业多作了解。

examples.english: Nursing is hard work and often low paid, but for many people it is a vocation.
examples.chinese: 护理是件很辛苦的工作，报酬往往很低，但对许多人来说这是一种使命。

examples.english: He was quite young when he decided he had a religious vocation.
examples.chinese: 他决定以宗教为使命时还相当年轻。

examples.english: Most of the people here depend on tourism for their livelihood.
examples.chinese: 这里大部分人都以旅游业为生。

examples.english: Fishermen are angry about the new EC fishing regulations because they feel that their livelihood is being threatened.
examples.chinese: 渔民对欧盟的新捕鱼规定非常不满，因为他们觉得自己的生计受到了威胁。

examples.english: I meet some interesting people in my line of work.
examples.chinese: 做我这行会遇到一些有趣的人。

examples.english: Henson had to leave real-estate, which had been his line of business since 1969.
examples.chinese: 汉森只得离开房地产行业，他从1969年开始就一直在从事这一行。

examples.english: I have not yet signed a contract of employment.
examples.chinese: 我还没有签雇佣合同。

examples.english: A Japanese company plans to set up a factory in the area, so this should provide some employment for local people.
examples.chinese: 一家日本公司计划在该地区兴建工厂，这样应该能给当地居民提供一些就业机会。

examples.english: Are you in full-time employment, Mr Edwards?
examples.chinese: 你有全职工作吗，爱德华兹先生？

centers.english: a job in a company or organization
centers.chinese: 在某公司或组织内的一份工作

examples.english: She has been offered the post of director of UNICEF.
examples.chinese: 她被委任为联合国儿童基金会总干事。

examples.english: When he took up his present post at the BBC he was only 23.
examples.chinese: 他到英国广播公司出任目前的职位时才23岁。

examples.english: Environmentalists supported Murphy as the best candidate for the director's post.
examples.chinese: 环境保护者支持墨菲，认为他是会长的最佳人选。

examples.english: We have decided to offer you the position of sales assistant starting next Monday.
examples.chinese: 我们已决定下星期一开始让你出任销售助理一职。

examples.english: What position did you hold at your previous company?
examples.chinese: 你在前一家公司担任什么职务？

examples.english: Always look for the best person to fill any position, regardless of age, race, or gender.
examples.chinese: 总要找最优秀的人来担当任何职位，不管年龄、种族或性别如何。

examples.english: I'm here in my capacity as Union Representative.
examples.chinese: 我以工会代表的身份出席。

examples.english: In her capacity as war correspondent for ABC News, she has traveled all over the world.
examples.chinese: 她以美国广播公司战地记者的身份去过世界各国。

expressions.text: in an advisory legal/financial etc capacity

examples.english: He works for this firm in a legal capacity, giving advice on international law.
examples.chinese: 他以律师身份为这家公司提供国际法方面的建议。

centers.english: relating to a job

examples.english: The salary's not very good, but there's a lot of job satisfaction.
examples.chinese: 薪水不是很高，但这工作会给你带来很大的满足感。

examples.english: It says in the job description that we're only supposed to work 35 hours a week.
examples.chinese: 职务说明里写明我们一周只要工作35小时。

examples.english: The bad thing about working at holiday resorts is that there's no job security.
examples.chinese: 在度假胜地工作的缺点是就业没有保障。

examples.english: The RSA course in teaching is a recognized professional qualification.
examples.chinese: 皇家艺术学会的教师培训课程是公认的专业资历。

examples.english: Lawyers have their own professional association, which operates a strict code of conduct.
examples.chinese: 律师有他们自己的专业协会，协会有一套严格的行为准则。

examples.english: You are advised to seek professional legal advice if in any doubt about the contract details.
examples.chinese: 如对合同细则有任何疑问，应该寻求专业法律咨询。

examples.english: Occupational injuries and even deaths are quite common in the coal mining industry.
examples.chinese: 在采煤业中，工伤甚至是死亡事故都颇为普遍。

examples.english: The survey studied the incidence of cancer among different occupational groups.
examples.chinese: 这次调查研究了不同职业组别中的癌症发病率。

examples.english: Not all the courses are purely vocational.
examples.chinese: 并非所有的课程都是纯粹与职业有关的。

examples.english: The Job Corps is a vocational training program for low-income youths.
examples.chinese: 职业培训团是一项为低收入青年提供职业培训的计划。

centers.english: to have a job

examples.english: I've had a job since the day I left high school.
examples.chinese: 我高中毕业那天起就开始工作了。

examples.english: George had a well-paid job in a computer firm.
examples.chinese: 乔治在一家电脑公司有份薪金丰厚的工作。

examples.english: If you have a decent salary and a steady job, you can usually get a loan.
examples.chinese: 如果你有不错的薪水和稳定的工作，通常都能申请到贷款。

examples.english: To qualify for the program, at least one parent must be employed.
examples.chinese: 至少要一个家长有工作才有资格参加这项计划。

examples.english: Curtis was employed by a car rental agency.
examples.chinese: 柯蒂斯受雇于一家汽车出租代理行。

examples.english: A graduate of Stanford, she is employed at Jackson, Cole, Roberts & Green, a respected law firm.
examples.chinese: 她是斯坦福大学的毕业生，受雇于有名望的杰克逊一科尔一罗伯茨和格林法律事务所。

examples.english: He is a self-employed music teacher.
examples.chinese: 他是个自己单干的音乐教师。

examples.english: I've been self-employed for over 10 years.
examples.chinese: 我做自由职业已有十年多了。

examples.english: She was the first woman to hold the job of mayor.
examples.chinese: 她是第一个当上市长的女性。

examples.english: Even men who had always been able to hold down a job found themselves unemployed.
examples.chinese: 即使是那些总能保住饭碗的人也失业了。

examples.english: She was the only one in the family to be in work.
examples.chinese: 她是家里唯一一个有工作的人。

examples.english: It's often difficult for people who are in work to appreciate the problems of the unemployed.
examples.chinese: 在职的人往往难以体会到失业者的苦恼。

centers.english: to not have a job

expressions.text: not have a job/be without a job

examples.english: I don't have a job yet, but I'm going for an interview tomorrow.
examples.chinese: 我还没有工作，不过明天我会去参加面试。

examples.english: She's been without a job now for three months.
examples.chinese: 到现在为止她已有三个月没有工作了。

examples.english: Many of the students who leave the course this summer won't have a job to go to.
examples.chinese: 今年夏季完成这门课程的学生中有许多人不会有工作。

examples.english: I've been out of work for two years.
examples.chinese: 我已失业两年了。

examples.english: At the age of 33, he suddenly found himself out of work and without much hope of finding any.
examples.chinese: 33岁那年他突然失业了，而且没有多大希望能找到工作。

examples.english: The company's bankruptcy meant that 5,000 people were thrown out of work.
examples.chinese: 公司破产意味着5,000人突然间失去了工作。

examples.english: She is an out-of-work actress.
examples.chinese: 她是一名失业的演员。

examples.english: Fifty per cent of the men in this town are unemployed.
examples.chinese: 这个镇上50%的男人都失业了。

examples.english: The accused man is an unemployed labourer from South London.
examples.chinese: 被告是一名来自伦敦南部的无业劳工。

examples.english: The government is not doing enough to help the unemployed.
examples.chinese: 政府没有尽力帮助失业者。

examples.english: There has been a sharp rise in unemployment.
examples.chinese: 失业人数激增。

examples.english: The factory closure will leave 3,000 workers jobless.
examples.chinese: 这家工厂的关闭将使3,000名工人失业。

examples.english: Jobless youths are a major cause of concern.
examples.chinese: 青年失业是人们主要担心的事。

examples.english: The bill would allow the jobless to collect 4 to 20 weeks of additional benefits.
examples.chinese: 这项法案将使失业者多领取到4至20周的救济金。

expressions.text: be on the dole /be on welfare/on unemploymen

examples.english: Many people on welfare don't have anyone to take care of the kids while they train for a job.
examples.chinese: 许多领取失业救济金的人在接受就业培训时没有人帮忙照看孩子。

examples.english: Just about everyone on the estate is one the dole. Jobs are scarce.
examples.chinese: 这一住宅区里几乎人人都在领取失业救济。工作机会十分紧缺。

examples.english: He spent five months on unemployment before finding a job that paid much less than his previous job.
examples.chinese: 他领了五个月的失业救济金，然后才找到薪水比前一份工作低得多的工作。

expressions.text: go on the dole/go on welfare

examples.english: Students used to be allowed to go on the dole in the summer holidays, but the government has stopped that.
examples.chinese: 学生以前可以在暑假里领取失业救济金，但现在政府已停止这样发放救济金了。

examples.english: Rivera lost his job, and the family had to go on welfare.
examples.chinese: 里韦拉失业了，他的家人因此要领失业救济金。

centers.english: a job that is available

examples.english: There might be some vacancies at the hospital.
examples.chinese: 这家医院可能有几个空缺。

examples.english: A vacancy exists for an import/export sales manager at our Paris office.
examples.chinese: 我们巴黎办事处有个进出口销售经理的职位空缺。

examples.english: Skilled workers are few, and employers are having trouble filling vacancies.
examples.chinese: 熟练的工人很少，雇主要人填补空缺甚为困难。

examples.english: Of the fourteen openings, only one went to a minority candidate.
examples.chinese: 十四个职位空缺中仅有一个给了少数民族求职者。

examples.english: I was wondering if you had any openings for sales staff?
examples.chinese: 我想知道你们的销售部门有空缺吗?

examples.english: The journal has been a good way to publicize job openings.
examples.chinese: 这份杂志是刊登职位空缺的好途径。

examples.english: There are several opportunities for experienced designers and researchers.
examples.chinese: 有好几个职位需要经验丰富的设计师和研究员。

examples.english: Career opportunities for nurses have improved in the last 10 years.
examples.chinese: 近十年来护士的就业机会增加了。

centers.english: to give someone a job

examples.english: If I give you the job, how soon can you begin?
examples.chinese: 如果我把这份工作给你，你最快何时可以来上班？

examples.english: After law school, he was given a job in the city's legal department.
examples.chinese: 法学院毕业后他在市司法部门获得一份工作。

examples.english: Goldman gave her a job as his assistant.
examples.chinese: 戈德曼给了她一份工作，就是当他的助理。

examples.english: Since he came out of prison no one will employ him.
examples.chinese: 自从他出狱之后，没人愿意雇用他。

examples.english: The company has been accused of not hiring enough women.
examples.chinese: 这家公司因没有雇用足够数量女性职员而受到指责。

examples.english: I was employed as a night-watchman by the local hospital.
examples.chinese: 我受雇于当地那家医院当夜间守卫。

examples.english: She was hired as marketing director for a biotechnology firm.
examples.chinese: 她获聘为一家生物技术公司的市场部董事。

examples.english: This letter outlines the terms and conditions of employment the conditions of your job.
examples.chinese: 这封信大致说明了雇用的条件。

examples.english: We're not taking on any more staff at the moment.
examples.chinese: 目前我们不打算再招聘员工。

examples.english: Franklin needed an assistant, and he got funding from the department to take one on.
examples.chinese: 富兰克林需要一名助手，他从部门拿到拨款雇用了一个。

examples.english: The director took me on as a messenger while they were filming in my village.
examples.chinese: 他们在我们村子里拍片时，导演雇我当通信员。

examples.english: The vet was increasingly busy and had to engage two new assistants.
examples.chinese: 这位兽医越来越忙，不得不聘请两名新助手。

examples.english: Paul was engaged as a junior clerk at a very low wage.
examples.chinese: 保罗被雇用为初级文员，薪水微薄。

examples.english: The French president has appointed a new Minister for Culture.
examples.chinese: 法国总统任命了新的文化部长。

examples.english: The committee was appointed to make recommendations on housing development in the area.
examples.chinese: 该委员会被任命对这一地区的房屋发展提出建议。

examples.english: When he was governor, Brown appointed Rose Bird as chief justice of the California Supreme Court.
examples.chinese: 布朗任州长时曾委任罗斯·伯德担任加州最高法院首席法官。

examples.english: Schreiber was appointed director of human resources.
examples.chinese: 施赖伯被任命为人力资源总监。

expressions.text: appoint somebody to a job/post/ position etc

examples.english: This is the first time that a woman has been appointed to the post.
examples.chinese: 这是女性首次获此职位任命。

examples.english: His appointment to the position of Senior Surgeon was unexpected.
examples.chinese: 他获任命高级外科医生令人意外。

examples.english: The police department is trying to recruit more black officers.
examples.chinese: 警察局打算招聘更多的黑人当警察。

examples.english: It's getting more and more difficult to recruit experienced staff.
examples.chinese: 聘请有经验的员工越来越难了。

examples.english: At many banks, young recruits first work as tellers.
examples.chinese: 在许多银行里，新招聘的年轻员工先要当出纳员。

examples.english: Allegre was signed by the New York Jets.
examples.chinese: 阿莱格尔与纽约喷气机队签了约。

examples.english: Six episodes of the show have been taped, and the actors have been signed for six more.
examples.chinese: 该剧已拍了六集，演员已签约再拍六集。

examples.english: England soccer star Paul Gascoigne was signed up by a top Italian club.
examples.chinese: 英格兰足球明星保罗·加斯科因已签约加盟意大利一家顶级俱乐部。

examples.english: The band have just completed a highly successful US tour, and several record companies have offered to sign them up.
examples.chinese: 这支乐队刚刚圆满地结束了在美国的巡回演出，有几家唱片公司已经提出希望跟他们签约。

centers.english: to move to a more important job

examples.english: The company promotes women and minorities whenever possible.
examples.chinese: 该公司只要有机会就会提升女性和少数民族员工。

examples.english: Did you hear that David's been promoted?
examples.chinese: 你听说戴维得到提升了吗?

examples.english: Shula was promoted to head coach of the Cincinnati Bengals in 1991.
examples.chinese: 1991年舒拉被擢升为辛辛那提猛虎队的主教练。

examples.english: No-one thought they would make him manager so soon after joining the company.
examples.chinese: 没有人想到他们在他加入公司后没多久就提升他为经理。

examples.english: He's been made Head of Security at the Chicago National Bank.
examples.chinese: 他被提升为芝加哥国民银行的保安主管。

examples.english: Civil service tests determine promotion in government jobs.
examples.chinese: 文职公务员考试决定政府部门职位的提升。

examples.english: What are my chances of promotion if I stay here?
examples.chinese: 如果我留在这里有多大的晋升机会?

examples.english: She got a promotion last year.
examples.chinese: 去年她得到了擢升。

examples.english: Many people are forced to move from one city to another in search of better jobs or career advancement.
examples.chinese: 许多人为了得到更好的工作或提升，不得不从一个城市迁往另一个城市。

expressions.text: move/go/climb up the ladder/work your way up the ladder

examples.english: Feldman started working for the company at age 18, and slowly worked his way up the ladder.
examples.chinese: 费尔德曼18岁起为公司工作，慢慢地攀上了高位。

examples.english: Education is vital to help these children to move up the career ladder.
examples.chinese: 要帮助这些孩子获得事业上的成功，教育是至关重要的。

examples.english: The women demanded that their work be upgraded.
examples.chinese: 这些女性要求升职。

examples.english: After the inspector's visit all temporary workers were upgraded to permanent status.
examples.chinese: 督察员来访后，所有的临时工都被转为正式工了。

centers.english: doing something for a job, rather than for enjoyment
centers.chinese: 作为一项工作而不是为了取乐而做某事

examples.english: She actually tastes wine for a living!
examples.chinese: 她以品尝酒为职业！

examples.english: No one in the show acts or sings for a living.
examples.chinese: 这个节目中表演或唱歌的人没有一个是以此谋生的。

examples.english: Professional basketball players can earn huge sums of money.
examples.chinese: 职业篮球运动员能赚巨额的钱。

examples.english: He was a keen amateur photographer for many years before he turned professional.
examples.chinese: 多年来他一直是个热心的业余摄影师，是后来才成为专业摄影师的。

examples.english: Most athletes these days are highly-trained professionals, who spend their whole time practising or competing.
examples.chinese: 如今大多数的运动员都是受过高水准训练的职业运动员，他们把所有时间都用于训练或比赛。

centers.english: a job that you have in addition to your main job
centers.chinese: 主要工作之外的一份工作

examples.english: I sometimes take wedding photographs on Saturdays -- it's a nice little sideline and it gives me a bit of extra cash.
examples.chinese: 星期六我有时给人拍拍结婚照—这是个不错的小副业，还可以得到点额外的收入。

examples.english: Tracy intended to run the seed business as a sideline, but it soon became her full-time job.
examples.chinese: 特蕾西打算把种子生意当成副业来做，但很快它就成了她的全职工作。

examples.english: It is difficult to estimate the number of people doing part-time jobs on the side.
examples.chinese: 从事兼职工作的人数难以估计。

examples.english: He sometimes does a bit of gardening on the side when he is short of money.
examples.chinese: 他缺钱用时有时也会兼职做点园艺工作。

examples.english: Carlos is an auto mechanic who moonlights fixing the cars of friends.
examples.chinese: 卡洛斯是一名汽车修理工，他晚上兼职给朋友修理汽车。

examples.english: Sarton has been moonlighting for five years to supplement his income.
examples.chinese: 萨顿五年来一直在晚上兼职以贴补收入。

examples.english: Some police officers moonlight as security guards.
examples.chinese: 有些警察晚上兼职做保安员。

centers.english: to reduce the number, amount, price, or size of something
centers.chinese: 减少数目、数量，降低价格或缩小尺寸

examples.english: I was hoping they would reduce the price a little.
examples.chinese: 我希望他们能降低一点价格。

examples.english: You can greatly reduce your heating bills by using low-energy heaters.
examples.chinese: 使用低耗能取暖器就可以大幅度降低暖气费。

examples.english: Their income has been drastically reduced.
examples.chinese: 他们的收入锐减了。

expressions.text: reduce something by half/10%/2 years etc

examples.english: The new road will reduce traffic through the town by 30%.
examples.chinese: 这条新马路能使经过镇子的交通流量减少30%。

examples.english: Benefits will be reduced by $50 for each child who fails to attend school.
examples.chinese: 不去上学的儿童每人的补助费要减少50美元。

examples.english: Most airlines offer reduced prices for children.
examples.chinese: 大多数航空公司都为儿童提供折扣票价。

examples.english: After 20 minutes, lower the temperature to 200 degrees.
examples.chinese: 20分钟后把温度降到200度。

examples.english: The Bundesbank is under pressure to lower interest rates.
examples.chinese: 德国央行正受到压力要降低利率。

examples.english: The new system is aimed at cutting the average waiting time.
examples.chinese: 这套新系统旨在减少平均等候时间。

expressions.text: cut something by half/several weeks/ten per cent etc

examples.english: Because of the recession, salaries in the advertising industry have been cut by a half.
examples.chinese: 由于经济衰退，广告业的薪水已经减少了一半。

examples.english: The mortgage insurance agency has cut costs by $2000 over the last 3 years, making it easier for people to buy homes.
examples.chinese: 抵押保险代理行近三年来已把手续费降低了2,000美元，让大家买房子更容易。

examples.english: His annual leave has been cut from six weeks to just three.
examples.chinese: 他的年假从六周被削减到只有三周。

examples.english: Could you turn the lights down - it's too bright in here.
examples.chinese: 你能把灯光调暗些吗？这里太亮了。

examples.english: The weather wasn't as cold, so we decided to turn down the central heating.
examples.chinese: 天气没那么冷，所以我们决定把中央取暖器调低些。

expressions.text: turn something down slightly/a little/a bit

examples.english: Would you mind turning the volume down a little?
examples.chinese: 你能把音量调低一点吗？

examples.english: Various methods are being explored in order to decrease the volume of traffic on our roads.
examples.chinese: 为了减少道路上的车流量，我们正在探索各种方法。

examples.english: Better health education should help to decrease the incidence of heart disease.
examples.chinese: 良好的健康教育会有助于减少心脏病的发病率。

examples.english: Use of the new nets has significantly decreased the number of dolphins killed accidentally each year.
examples.chinese: 使用新式渔网大大减少了每年海豚意外死亡的数目。

examples.english: American car manufacturers have started slashing prices in an effort to stimulate sales.
examples.chinese: 为了刺激销量，美国的汽车制造商已经开始大幅度地降价。

examples.english: Public spending has been slashed over the past two years.
examples.chinese: 在过去两年内公共开支已大幅度削减了。

examples.english: Come to our Summer Sale, where prices have been slashed by up to 75%.
examples.chinese: 请来参加我们的夏季大减价活动，价格已削减了75%。

examples.english: Shops are knocking down prices in an effort to increase sales.
examples.chinese: 商店都在大减价以增加销量。

examples.english: In the end he knocked the price down to £70.
examples.chinese: 最后他把价格降至70英镑。

examples.english: The overseas aid budget has been almost halved, from $18m to just over $10m.
examples.chinese: 海外援助预算几乎减半，从1，800万美元降低到了只有1,000万美元左右。

examples.english: Most of the big downtown stores have rolled back their prices to dispose of winter stock.
examples.chinese: 为了处理冬季库存，城里大部分大商店都降低了价格。

examples.english: Rather than roll prices back, the company negotiated pay increases that ranged between 10 and 15 percent.
examples.chinese: 该公司协商要加薪百分之十到十五，而不是降低价格。

centers.english: to reduce pain, worry, or unpleasant feelings
centers.chinese: 减轻疼痛、忧虑或其他不快的感情

examples.english: They gave him drugs to reduce the pain.
examples.chinese: 他们给他用药以减轻痛楚。

examples.english: Prompt action can often reduce the severity of shock in road accident victims.
examples.chinese: 立即采取行动常可以减轻车祸受害者所受打击的严重程度。

examples.english: Miriam finds that yoga and meditation help her in reducing stress.
examples.chinese: 米丽娅姆发现瑜伽和冥想能帮助她减轻压力。

examples.english: Stopping smoking can significantly reduce your risk of suffering a heart attack.
examples.chinese: 戒烟能够大幅度减少患心脏病的危险。

examples.english: He shifted his position a little, in order to lessen the pain in his leg.
examples.chinese: 他稍稍换了一下姿势，以减轻腿的疼痛。

examples.english: Everyone has their own ideas about the best way to lessen jet lag.
examples.chinese: 每个人对缓和飞行时差反应都有一套自己认为是最有效的办法。

examples.english: Boys are more likely to smoke to relieve stress than girls are.
examples.chinese: 男孩比女孩更有可能以吸烟减轻压力。

examples.english: Maybe we should hire another secretary to lighten Barbara's workload.
examples.chinese: 我们也许应该再雇一名秘书来减轻芭芭拉的工作量。

examples.english: Peppermint has long been regarded as a plant that can relieve indigestion.
examples.chinese: 薄荷长久以来一直被当作是可以减轻消化不良的植物。

examples.english: Magnetic board games can help relieve the boredom of long car journeys for kids.
examples.chinese: 磁板象棋可以有助减轻孩子们坐车长途旅行时的无聊感。

examples.english: Harry attempted a couple of jokes to relieve the tension of the occasion.
examples.chinese: 哈里讲了几个笑话，试图缓解当时的紧张气氛。

examples.english: Massage is excellent for the relief of stress.
examples.chinese: 按摩非常有助于减轻压力。

examples.english: Various methods can be used for pain relief during childbirth.
examples.chinese: 有多种方法可用来减缓分娩时的疼痛。

examples.english: Rod rubbed his jaw to ease the pain a little.
examples.chinese: 罗德揉着下颚以稍稍减轻疼痛。

examples.english: The arrival of the others eased her embarrassment slightly.
examples.chinese: 其他人的到来稍稍减少了她的窘迫感。

examples.english: You can't cure a common cold, but you can alleviate the symptoms.
examples.chinese: 一般的感冒是治不好的，不过可以缓解其症状。

examples.english: Western aid has helped to alleviate the situation in northern India.
examples.chinese: 西方的援助已帮助缓和了印度北部的局面。

examples.english: the alleviation of pain
examples.chinese: 疼痛的缓解

examples.english: They gave me a local anaesthetic to deaden the pain.
examples.chinese: 他们给我用了一种土制的麻醉剂来镇痛。

examples.english: It was impossible not to think about her baby, but the drugs dulled her panic.
examples.chinese: 她无法不去想她的孩子，但药物减缓了她的恐慌。

examples.english: I took a couple of painkillers, which took the edge off the pain.
examples.chinese: 我服了几片止痛药，减轻了疼痛。

examples.english: Knowing that Peter was close by took the edge off my anxiety for my grandson.
examples.chinese: 我知道彼得在身边，就减轻了我对孙子的担心。

examples.english: The government is anxious to allay public fears over the safety of beef.
examples.chinese: 政府急于缓解公众对牛肉安全问题的恐惧感。

examples.english: Showing her his identity card went some way towards allaying her suspicions.
examples.chinese: 他向她出示了身份证，这多少减轻了她的怀疑。

centers.english: to reduce the amount of something that you eat, drink, or use
centers.chinese: 减少所吃、所喝或所用的东西的数量

examples.english: If you can't give up smoking completely, at least try to cut down.
examples.chinese: 如果你戒不了烟，至少也要想办法少抽点。

examples.english: I'm trying to cut down on meat.
examples.chinese: 我在设法少吃肉。

examples.english: Doctors are urging people to reduce the amount of salt in their diet.
examples.chinese: 医生在力劝人们在饮食中要减少用盐量。

examples.english: Supermarkets can help promote healthy eating habits by reducing the amount of sugar and fat in their products.
examples.chinese: 超级市场可以通过减少其产品中的糖分和脂肪来促进人们养成健康的饮食习惯。

centers.english: when a company reduces its activities, the amount it spends etc
centers.chinese: 公司减少其活动、缩减支出等

examples.english: European central banks have scaled down their operations in South Africa.
examples.chinese: 欧洲各中央银行已减小他们在南非的经营规模。

examples.english: The two companies have announced plans to scale back production next year.
examples.chinese: 这两家公司已宣布了缩小明年汽车生产规模的计划。

examples.english: Development projects were scaled down, and some proposals for new buildings were put on hold.
examples.chinese: 开发项目已缩减规模，一些有关新建筑的计划也被搁置了起来。

examples.english: Her friends know that she is under stress and have warned her to cut back on her workload.
examples.chinese: 她的朋友都知道她承受了压力，告诫她要减少工作量。

examples.english: Our budget has been cut back this year.
examples.chinese: 今年我们的预算已削减了。

examples.english: Farmers have agreed to cut back wheat production.
examples.chinese: 农民们已同意削减小麦的产量。

examples.english: We have had to cut expenditure back in an effort to increase profits.
examples.chinese: 我们为了增加利润，只得减少支出。

examples.english: Schools and hospitals could suffer as a result of government cutbacks.
examples.chinese: 政府削减经费可能会使学校和医院承担后果。

examples.english: There has been a significant cutback in the defence budget this year.
examples.chinese: 今年国防预算大幅度减少了。

examples.english: They are downsizing the workforce in a desperate attempt to save the firm.
examples.chinese: 为了拯救公司，他们孤注一掷在裁减员工。

examples.english: Advised to rightsize its operation, the company has shrunk to 2,000 employees.
examples.chinese: 公司接受了缩小经营规模的建议，将雇员人数裁减到2,000名。

examples.english: The company has pared down expenditure and hopes to recoup its losses this year.
examples.chinese: 公司已经缩减开支，希望今年能弥补亏损。

examples.english: We have managed to pare our costs down to the absolute minimum.
examples.chinese: 我们设法把成本降到最低。

examples.english: We are a small company, and we need to rationalize if we want to compete in this market.
examples.chinese: 我们是小公司，想在这个市场上竞争就需进行合理化改革。

examples.english: The company has done a lot to rationalize production.
examples.chinese: 该公司做了大量工作以使生产合理化。

examples.english: The old sickness benefit system is slowly being wound down.
examples.chinese: 那套旧的疾病福利制度在逐渐被废弃。

examples.english: I want to return in a few years’ time - I've already started to wind the business down.
examples.chinese: 我想几年之后回来，我已经开始在逐步结束公司了。

examples.english: Opposition leaders are accusing the government of running down the Health Service.
examples.chinese: 反对派领导人谴责政府在缩减保健服务。

examples.english: They buy up rival companies then just run them down.
examples.chinese: 他们买下竞争对手的公司，然后逐渐将他们关闭。

examples.english: By trimming costs and improving service the hotel has now started to make a profit again.
examples.chinese: 通过削减开支、提高服务质量，旅馆现在又开始赢利了。

examples.english: The proposed bill would trim welfare spending by $5 billion.
examples.chinese: 这项提案要将福利开支削减50亿美元。

examples.english: The government is once again attempting to streamline the health care service in order to pay for tax cuts.
examples.chinese: 政府再一次试图减少保健服务的开支以弥补税收的削减。

examples.english: The company announced it was to streamline its operations and close down three factories in the UK.
examples.chinese: 公司宣布要精简业务，关闭三家在英国的工厂。

centers.english: to make a written or spoken statement less forceful
centers.chinese: 使书面或口头的话语婉转

examples.english: I felt my letter was worded too strongly, so I toned it down a bit.
examples.chinese: 我感到我的信措辞太强硬，于是就把它改得婉转些。

examples.english: Wagner was forced to tone down his remarks about his opponent when it became obvious that the attacks were costing him votes.
examples.chinese: 瓦格纳被迫把关于竞选对手的言论说得不那么尖锐，因为那些攻击显然在使他失去选票。

examples.english: We had to ask Joan to moderate her language in front of the kids.
examples.chinese: 我们不得不叫琼在孩子们面前说话温和一点。

examples.english: She apologized at once, and moderated her voice.
examples.chinese: 她立刻道了歉，声音也温和起来。

examples.english: Right wing groups are determined to dilute the influence of the trade unions.
examples.chinese: 右翼团体决心要削弱工会的影响力。

examples.english: They felt that their original aims and demands were being diluted.
examples.chinese: 他们感到原先的目标和要求被降低了。

centers.english: to reduce something gradually

examples.english: Over the years, the value of our savings and investments has been eroded by inflation.
examples.chinese: 经过这些年，我们的积蓄和投资的价值因通货膨胀逐渐减少了。

examples.english: High interest rates can gradually erode profit margins.
examples.chinese: 高利率可能会逐渐减少利润幅度。

examples.english: Rising rents and travel expenses simply eat into any pay rise that nurses might get.
examples.chinese: 不断上涨的房租和交通费把护士们可能得到的加薪都消耗掉了。

examples.english: Theft from offices and factories eats into company profits.
examples.chinese: 办公室和工厂内的失窃影响了公司的利润。

examples.english: Over the last few years, rainforests have been steadily depleted.
examples.chinese: 在过去几年内，雨林面积逐渐削减了。

examples.english: He knew that the area's rich plant life had been severely depleted by the huge herds of cows grazing the land.
examples.chinese: 他知道，该地区品种繁多的植物被大批放牧在土地里的牛群吃掉了许多。

examples.english: CFC is just one chemical that depletes the ozone layer.
examples.chinese: 氯氟烃只是其中一种消耗臭氧层的化学物质。

examples.english: High interest rates can chip away at your profits.
examples.chinese: 高利率会慢慢吃掉你的利润。

examples.english: The group continues to campaign for the rights of disabled people, chipping away at old prejudices.
examples.chinese: 该团体继续发起为残障人士争取权利的运动，逐渐地铲除陈旧的偏见。

examples.english: Congress is whittling away at our civil liberties.
examples.chinese: 国会在逐渐削减我们的公民自由。

examples.english: Inflation has been whittling away the value of state pensions for the last fifteen years.
examples.chinese: 过去15年来，通货膨胀不断削减着国家养老金的价值。

examples.english: Lawmakers have gradually whittled the program's funding away over the last few years.
examples.chinese: 立法者在近几年里已经逐渐把该计划的资金削减掉了。

centers.english: a reduction in number, prices, levels etc
centers.chinese: 数量、价格、程度等上的减少

examples.english: We offer a reduction for groups of 10 or more.
examples.chinese: 我们对十人或十人以上的团体提供减价优惠。

examples.english: Cleaner fuel has contributed to a reduction in air pollution.
examples.chinese: 更为清洁的燃料使得空气污染程度降低了。

examples.english: a reduction in working hours
examples.chinese: 减少工作时间

examples.english: There were reductions of up to 50% in some stores.
examples.chinese: 一些商店减价达50%。

examples.english: There has been a big reduction in the number of issues the president addresses in any given week.
examples.chinese: 总统在一周中所处理的问题已大大减少了。

examples.english: Several holiday firms are offering huge price reductions on winter holidays.
examples.chinese: 几家度假服务公司正推出冬季大减价。

examples.english: There has been a 15% decrease in violent crime it has gone down by 15%.
examples.chinese: 暴力犯罪减少了15%。

examples.english: In the last five years there has been a significant decrease in the number of deaths from heart disease.
examples.chinese: 最近五年来死于心脏病的人数大量减少。

examples.english: Charities have reported a 25% fall in donations during the past year.
examples.chinese: 慈善机构报告说去年的捐款减少了25%。

examples.english: Universities are reporting a sudden drop in the number of students studying science subjects.
examples.chinese: 大学报告说学习理科的学生数量突然下降了。

examples.english: This year we have seen a sharp fall in profits.
examples.chinese: 今年我们的利润急剧下降了。

examples.english: Cuts in the education budget have led to fewer teachers and larger classes.
examples.chinese: 教育预算减少导致了教师更少，班级人数更多。

examples.english: There are to be big cuts in the health budget next year.
examples.chinese: 明年的保健预算会大幅度削减。

examples.english: Nurses are protesting about further pay cuts.
examples.chinese: 护士在抗议进一步削减工资。

examples.english: The new management has promised that there will be no job cuts.
examples.chinese: 新管理层承诺不会裁员。

centers.english: to get money for your work

examples.english: At the peak of his career, Rogers was earning more than seven million dollars a year.
examples.chinese: 罗杰斯在事业顶峰的时候，一年能挣七百多万美元。

examples.english: It's not uncommon nowadays for women to earn more than their husbands.
examples.chinese: 如今妻子挣得比丈夫多已是屡见不鲜了。

expressions.text: earn £15,000 per year/$15 an hour etc

examples.english: Alan earns $30,000 a year.
examples.chinese: 艾伦一年挣30,000美元。

examples.english: Ella makes a lot of money.
examples.chinese: 埃拉赚钱很多。

examples.english: How much to you think he makes?
examples.chinese: 你觉得他赚多少钱？

expressions.text: make $500 a week/£25,000 per year etc

examples.english: Some models make millions of dollars a year.
examples.chinese: 有些模特儿一年赚好几百万美元。

expressions.text: get £10 per hour/$350 dollars a week etc

examples.english: My sister gets $22 an hour at her new job.
examples.chinese: 我姐姐的新工作一小时能挣22美元。

examples.english: How much are you getting a week?
examples.chinese: 你一星期挣多少钱？

examples.english: I got £5 for washing Nick's car.
examples.chinese: 我给尼克洗车挣了五英镑。

examples.english: City maintenance workers are paid around $250 a week.
examples.chinese: 城市维护工人一周收入有250美元左右。

examples.english: We get paid every two weeks.
examples.chinese: 我们每两个星期拿一次薪水。

examples.english: Claire's on a very good salary.
examples.chinese: 克莱尔年薪很高。

examples.english: In January, I'll be on £23,350.
examples.chinese: 1月份，我的年薪将达到23,350英镑。

examples.english: How much were you on in your last job?
examples.chinese: 你上一份工作年薪是多少？

examples.english: Jack grosses $58,000 a year, but he has to pay taxes and health insurance out of that.
examples.chinese: 杰克一年的总利润为58,000美元，但是其中还要交税和付医疗保险。

examples.english: Walmax, a California superstore, grosses more than eight million dollars annually.
examples.chinese: 沃玛克斯是加州的一家超级市场，每年总利润有八百多万美元。

examples.english: If you gross over $100,000, you should consult a good tax accountant.
examples.chinese: 如果你的税前收入超过100,000美元，就应当找一位出色的税务会计咨询一下。

centers.english: to earn an amount of money after tax etc has been taken away
centers.chinese: 在缴付所得税等之后挣得一定数额的钱

examples.english: Lidia takes home only about $150 a week.
examples.chinese: 莉迪娅一周实际只挣得150美元左右。

examples.english: Did you know that plumbers can take home as much as $40,000 a year?
examples.chinese: 你知道吗，水管工一年能挣到四万美元呢。

examples.english: My dad's take-home pay was around £50 a week when he first started out.
examples.chinese: 我爸爸才开始的时候一周的实得工资是50英镑左右。

examples.english: For the first three months of 1990, Starcorp netted $547 million.
examples.chinese: 思达可公司在1990年的头三个月里净赚了5.47亿美元。

examples.english: Donna got a raise in February, but she's still only netting $19,000 a year.
examples.chinese: 唐娜2月份加薪了，但是她一年净收入还是只有19，000美元。

examples.english: Sandra cleared £50,000 last year.
examples.chinese: 桑德拉去年净赚了50,000英镑。

examples.english: A good lawyer can clear $250,000 a year easily.
examples.chinese: 一名出色的律师一年轻轻松松可以净赚250,000美元。

centers.english: to earn enough money to pay for the things that you need
centers.chinese: 挣足够的钱购买所需要的东西

expressions.text: earn/make a living by doing something

examples.english: As an engineer, you can earn a living anywhere in the world.
examples.chinese: 作为一个工程师，你在世界各地都能谋生。

examples.english: It's difficult to make a living as a writer.
examples.chinese: 靠写作谋生很困难。

examples.english: Nordstrom earned his living by teaching violin.
examples.chinese: 诺德斯特姆以教小提琴为生。

examples.english: A programmer earns a pretty decent living.
examples.chinese: 程序员收入不菲。

examples.english: After his father died, Peter had to quit school and support the family.
examples.chinese: 父亲去世后，彼得不得不辍学去挣钱养家。

examples.english: Hank supported himself for years by doing construction work.
examples.chinese: 汉克多年来就靠做建筑工养活自己。

examples.english: I have no idea how he's supporting himself.
examples.chinese: 我不知道他是怎么养活自己的。

examples.english: It's time you got a job and started earning your keep.
examples.chinese: 是到你找工作养活自己的时候了。

centers.english: to earn a lot of money

expressions.text: make a fortune/ make a bomb

examples.english: The person who invented Post-It notes must have made a fortune.
examples.chinese: 发明报事贴的人肯定发大财了。

examples.english: Roger makes a fortune buying and selling real estate.
examples.chinese: 罗杰买卖房地产挣了很多钱。

examples.english: Jules made his fortune in the liquor business.
examples.chinese: 朱尔斯是做酒类生意发财的。

examples.english: Milos earns good money as a foreman.
examples.chinese: 迈洛斯做工头收入很高。

examples.english: Dan is making good money now, but for years we really struggled.
examples.chinese: 丹现在挣很多钱，但是有许多年我们过得很艰难。

examples.english: Most engineers are very well-paid.
examples.chinese: 大多数工程师薪水都很高。

examples.english: Dr. Singh is one of the most highly-paid surgeons in Britain.
examples.chinese: 辛格医生是英国报酬最高的外科医生之一。

examples.english: Athletes rake it in these days.
examples.chinese: 如今运动员赚钱很快。

expressions.text: somebody must be raking it in

examples.english: What a car! Jasper must be raking it in.
examples.chinese: 多好的车啊！贾斯珀一定是赚大钱了。

examples.english: In my opinion, lawyers are overpaid and underworked.
examples.chinese: 在我看来，律师酬金过高、工作过少。

centers.english: words for describing a job that you earn a lot from
centers.chinese: 描写一个工作能挣很多钱的单词

examples.english: There are not enough women in well-paid, responsible jobs.
examples.chinese: 任高薪重要职位的女性不多。

examples.english: Boring jobs often pay well.
examples.chinese: 乏味单调的工作往往报酬高。

examples.english: Modelling usually pays very well but the work is not very regular.
examples.chinese: 模特儿职业一般报酬都很高，但是工作不是很稳定。

examples.english: Transferred from Barcelona to Naples, Maradona signed a highly lucrative three-year contract.
examples.chinese: 马拉多纳从巴塞罗那转会到那不勒斯，签了一份酬金很高的三年期合同。

examples.english: An increase in consumer demand has made sports shoe retailing a lucrative business.
examples.chinese: 消费者需求的增长使运动鞋零售业成了赚钱的行业。

centers.english: not earning much money

examples.english: a low-paid mechanic
examples.chinese: 薪水低的机械工

examples.english: The jobs centre seems to list only low-paid temporary jobs.
examples.chinese: 就业中心似乎只列出报酬很低的临时性工作。

examples.english: A lot of people think that nurses are badly-paid.
examples.chinese: 许多人认为护士的报酬不高。

examples.english: Jobs are so hard to find that people are willing to work for peanuts.
examples.chinese: 工作很难找，只挣点芝麻小钱的活人们也愿意去干。

examples.english: It used to be accepted that teaching didn't pay very well, but things have changed a lot.
examples.chinese: 以前大家都认为教书的工资不高，如今却大不一样了。

examples.english: £50 a week? That's slave labour!
examples.chinese: 一星期50英镑？那是做苦力！

examples.english: Working for them is slave labor - they only pay five bucks an hour.
examples.chinese: 给他们工作就是做苦力——他们一小时只给五美元。

centers.english: pay that is too low

examples.english: Low pay is one of the disadvantages of working in publishing.
examples.chinese: 低薪是从事出版行业的缺点之一。

examples.english: These jobs are unattractive because of low pay and inadequate training.
examples.chinese: 这些工作没有吸引力，因为报酬低，培训机会也不多。

examples.english: In the 19th century, children worked long hours in factories for a pittance.
examples.chinese: 在19世纪，工厂的童工工时长，报酬却少得可怜。

examples.english: Compared to what some people earn, my salary is a pittance.
examples.chinese: 和有些人赚的钱相比，我这点薪水微不足道。

examples.english: ‘It's not fair,’ she said. ‘He pays me peanuts, and he expects me to work late as well.’
examples.chinese: “这不公平，”她说道，“他给这么一点点钱，却还要我干到很晚。”

centers.english: the money that you earn

examples.english: ‘What's the pay?’ ‘About $10 an hour.’
examples.chinese: “报酬如何？”“一小时十美元左右。”

examples.english: The worst thing about being a nurse is the low pay.
examples.chinese: 当护士最不好的就是报酬低。

examples.english: Joe's been receiving sick pay since the accident.
examples.chinese: 乔自从遭遇事故之后就一直在领病假工资。

examples.english: The university provides a salary of $3,000 a month plus benefits.
examples.chinese: 该大学月薪3,000美元，另加各种福利。

examples.english: Johansen reportedly earns an annual salary of $4 million.
examples.chinese: 据说约翰森年薪400万美元。

examples.english: I joined the company in 1985, on a salary of $22,000 a year.
examples.chinese: 我1985年进这家公司，年薪22,000美元。

examples.english: Our daughter makes a good salary, but she really works for it.
examples.chinese: 我们的女儿工资很高，但干得也辛苦。

examples.english: Elvina earns an hourly wage of $11.
examples.chinese: 埃尔维纳的时薪为11美元。

examples.english: Without qualifications it's nearly impossible to get a job with decent wages.
examples.chinese: 没有资历几乎不可能找到工资像样的工作。

examples.english: Most of the new jobs in the area only pay the minimum wage.
examples.chinese: 这个领域的新工作岗位大多只给最低工资。

examples.english: Braund's annual income is just over $40,000.
examples.chinese: 布朗德的年收入是四万美元多一点。

examples.english: The amount of tax you have to pay depends on your income.
examples.chinese: 交多少税要看你收入是多少。

examples.english: Families on low incomes are eligible for state benefits.
examples.chinese: 低收入家庭可享受政府津贴。

examples.english: Richard has a comfortable income from his salary and his investments.
examples.chinese: 理查德的薪水和投资加在一起，收入很可观。

examples.english: Most single mothers spend a large part of their earnings on childcare.
examples.chinese: 大多数单身母亲很大一部分收入都用在小孩身上。

examples.english: The average worker's earnings have not kept up with inflation.
examples.chinese: 工人的平均收入跟不上通货膨胀。

examples.english: Dr Allison charges a fee of $90 for a consultation.
examples.chinese: 艾利森医生一次会诊收取90美元诊金。

examples.english: Last year IBM paid $12 million in legal fees to a single law firm.
examples.chinese: 去年国际商业机器公司单向一家律师事务所就付了1，200万美元的律师费。

examples.english: The fee for the standard structural survey is £175.
examples.chinese: 标准的结构测量费用是175英镑。

centers.english: money that you earn in addition to your usual pay
centers.chinese: 除正常工资以外所挣的钱

examples.english: Last week Alex earned $300, including ten hours of overtime.
examples.chinese: 上星期亚历克斯挣了300美元，包括十小时的加班费。

examples.english: Teachers never get paid overtime.
examples.chinese: 老师从来没有加班工资。

examples.english: Liz earned a £1000 bonus for being the best salesperson of the year.
examples.chinese: 莉兹因为是年度最佳销售员，拿到了1,000英镑的奖金。

examples.english: The management offered a large bonus to those workers who stayed to the end of the contract.
examples.chinese: 管理层给做满合同期的工人发放一大笔奖金。

examples.english: His basic salary is low, but he gets 20% commission on everything he sells.
examples.chinese: 他基本工资很低，但是卖出每件东西可以收取20%的佣金。

examples.english: Most insurance agents are on commission, and some earn a lot of money.
examples.chinese: 大多数保险代理人都按营业额提成，有的能赚很多钱。

examples.english: The boy carried my suitcases up to my room and then stood waiting for a tip.
examples.chinese: 那男孩帮我把旅行箱拎到我房间，然后就站着等我给小费。

examples.english: We finished our lunch and left a tip on the table for the waiter.
examples.chinese: 我们吃完午饭，在桌上留了点小费给服务员。

examples.english: She tipped the taxi-driver.
examples.chinese: 她给了出租车司机一些小费。

examples.english: The salary isn't very high, but fringe benefits include free health insurance and a company car.
examples.chinese: 薪水不是很高，但是附加福利包括免费医疗保险和公司配车。

examples.english: One of the perks of working for a fashion designer is that you get to wear lots of nice clothes.
examples.chinese: 给时装设计师工作的好处之一是能穿很多漂亮的衣服。

examples.english: It's not always fun being an air hostess, but the perks are good.
examples.chinese: 当空姐并不总是很有意思，但好处不少。

examples.english: The professors regard foreign travel as a perk, and they go to all the international conferences.
examples.chinese: 教授们把出国当成是一项额外待遇，所有国际性会议都会出席。

centers.english: someone who earns money

examples.english: Many people still expect the man to be the breadwinner.
examples.chinese: 有许多人仍然认为男人应该养家。

examples.english: Jim is the family's main wage earner.
examples.chinese: 吉姆是家里主要挣钱的人。

examples.english: Families without wage-earners must seek relief from government social security programs.
examples.chinese: 没有工资收入的家庭必须依靠政府的社会保障计划寻求救济。

centers.english: not earn anything for work that you do

examples.english: Amir worked as an unpaid informant for the internal security service
examples.chinese: 阿米尔是国内安全机构不取报酬的线人。

examples.english: Coburn works 20 to 25 unpaid hours a week for the organization.
examples.chinese: 科伯恩为该组织每周无偿工作20到25小时。

examples.english: Since retiring Martha has been doing voluntary work for the Red Cross.
examples.chinese: 玛莎自从退休以后就为红十字会做志愿工作。

examples.english: Most charities depend on the services of volunteer workers.
examples.chinese: 大多数慈善机构依靠志愿人员的服务。

centers.english: a book

examples.english: I think Muriel Spark is a great writer, I love her books.
examples.chinese: 我认为穆里尔·斯帕克是个伟大的作家，我喜欢她写的书。

examples.english: What book are you reading at the moment?
examples.chinese: 你现在在读什么书?

examples.english: a book by Charles Dickens
examples.chinese: 查尔斯·狄更斯写的一本书

examples.english: I'm reading a book about a little girl who was a slave in 19th century Atlanta.
examples.chinese: 我正在读一本讲述19世纪亚特兰大一个奴隶小女孩的书。

examples.english: Do you have any books on astronomy?
examples.chinese: 你有天文学的书吗?

examples.english: She wrote a book of short stories, but it never got published.
examples.chinese: 她写过一本短篇小说集，但从未出版过。

examples.english: I went and got a library book about it.
examples.chinese: 我去借了一本有关这个方面的图书馆藏书。

examples.english: a secondhand book dealer
examples.chinese: 二手书商人

examples.english: Usually the hardback comes out first and the paperback comes out after.
examples.chinese: 一般都是先出精装书再出平装书。

examples.english: a softback romantic novel
examples.chinese: 一本平装的浪漫小说

examples.english: The two books you need for the regular assignment are both inexpensive and in paperback.
examples.chinese: 你平时作业所需的那两本书都很便宜，是平装版的。

examples.english: The hardback version spent three weeks on the Times bestseller list.
examples.chinese: 此书的精装版在《时代周刊》畅销书排行榜上连续三周榜上有名。

examples.english: The book is published by HarperCollins, and costs $15 in hardback and $4.95 in paperback.
examples.chinese: 该书由哈珀一柯林斯出版社出版，精装本售15美元，平装本售4.95美元。

examples.english: Already a best-seller in Japan, Quovis comes out in English later this year.
examples.chinese: 《奎维斯》一书先是在日本成为畅销书，它的英文版将于今年稍后推出。

examples.english: Her book has been an international best-seller for over a decade.
examples.chinese: 她的书十多年来一直是全世界的畅销书。

examples.english: Nader's book, ‘Unsafe at Any Speed’, became a surprise best-seller.
examples.chinese: 纳德的作品《任何时速都不安全》出人意料地成为畅销书。

examples.english: J K Rowling's ‘Harry Potter’ books were number one on the best-seller list for months.
examples.chinese: J.K.罗琳的《哈利·波特》系列小说连续几个月在畅销书排行榜上名列首位。

centers.english: a book about imaginary people and events
centers.chinese: 讲述虚构的人物或事件的书

examples.english: The new Sidney Shelton novel is to be adapted for film later in the year.
examples.chinese: 西德尼·谢尔顿的新小说年内将被改编成电影。

examples.english: This is the study where Hemingway wrote the legendary novels ‘Death in the Afternoon’ and ‘For Whom the Bell Tolls’.
examples.chinese: 海明威就在这间书房里写出了著名小说《午后之死》与《战地钟声》。

examples.english: The movie is based on a novel by Anne Tyler.
examples.chinese: 这部影片是根据安尼·泰勒的一部小说改编而成的。

examples.english: Butler has also written several historical novels under the pen-name of Jenny Melville.
examples.chinese: 巴特勒还以珍妮·梅尔维尔这个笔名创作了几部历史小说。

examples.english: Johnston's nudes look like cover art for romantic novels.
examples.chinese: 约翰斯顿的裸体作品看上去就像浪漫小说的封面创作。

examples.english: Keller's debut novel is about a Korean woman who was sold into prostitution during World War II.
examples.chinese: 凯勒的处女作写的是一名朝鲜妇女在二战期间被卖作妓女的故事。

examples.english: His first novel won a prize for modern fiction.
examples.chinese: 他的第一部小说获得了现代小说奖。

examples.english: I'm taking a class in Victorian fiction.
examples.chinese: 我正在修读一门维多利亚时代小说的课程。

examples.english: This small band of women writers dominated the romantic fiction market for a number of years.
examples.chinese: 这群为数不多的女作家占领了浪漫小说市场好几年。

examples.english: Anthony's first books were historical fiction.
examples.chinese: 安东尼最初写的几部书都是历史小说。

examples.english: Why is Miami such a ripe setting for crime fiction?
examples.chinese: 为何犯罪小说总以迈阿密为背景呢？

examples.english: Chandler remains the greatest exponent of detective fiction.
examples.chinese: 钱德勒仍然是侦探小说最重要的代表。

examples.english: the Nobel Prize for Literature
examples.chinese: 诺贝尔文学奖

examples.english: She is a professor of language and literature at Arizona State University.
examples.chinese: 她是亚利桑那州立大学的语言文学教授。

examples.english: Mitterrand's oratory and writings displayed a wide grasp of history, philosophy, religion and literature.
examples.chinese: 密特朗的演讲词与文章均显示了他对历史、哲学、宗教及文学的广泛认识。

examples.english: I teach Japanese literature.
examples.chinese: 我教的是日本文学。

examples.english: She's studying European literature at the University of Illinois.
examples.chinese: 她在伊利诺伊大学修读欧洲文学。

examples.english: Science fiction is often wrongly regarded as a ‘lesser’ form of literature.
examples.chinese: 科幻小说常被错误地归为“次一等”的文学作品。

examples.english: Joanne says she is not a fan of science fiction, and has never read her husband's book.
examples.chinese: 乔安妮说她不是科幻小说迷，从没有读过她丈夫的作品。

examples.english: Such developments sound like science fiction, but they're not.
examples.chinese: 这些发展听起来就像是科幻小说，但却是事实。

examples.english: the sci-fi writer William Gibson
examples.chinese: 科幻小说作家威廉·吉布森

examples.english: If you enjoy a whodunnit, you'll lap up Janet Laurence's ‘Hotel Morgue’.
examples.chinese: 假如你爱读侦探小说，肯定会对珍尼特·劳伦斯的《旅馆内的停尸间》着迷。

examples.english: an Agatha Christie whodunnit
examples.chinese: 一本阿加莎·克里斯蒂的侦探小说

examples.english: They discovered a mutual love of mysteries and thrillers.
examples.chinese: 他们俩发现双方都爱好侦探小说和惊险小说。

examples.english: Stephen King's new psychological thriller
examples.chinese: 斯蒂芬·金新写的心理惊悚小说

examples.english: He has written a spy thriller that recalls Fleming's James Bond series.
examples.chinese: 他写的间谍惊险小说让人联想起弗莱明的詹姆斯·邦德系列小说。

examples.english: His latest work is a legal thriller set in Boston.
examples.chinese: 他的最新作品是一本以波士顿为背景的法律惊悚小说。

examples.english: She started out writing short stories for the magazine ‘Black Mask’.
examples.chinese: 她最先是为《黑面罩》杂志写短篇小说。

examples.english: I understand your novel was inspired by a short story by Katherine Mansfield.
examples.chinese: 我听说你的小说的创作灵感来自凯瑟琳·曼斯菲尔德的一篇短篇小说。

examples.english: a collection of American short stories
examples.chinese: 一本美国短篇小说集

centers.english: a book about real people, places, or events
centers.chinese: 关于真实的人、地方或事件的写实作品

examples.english: The books in the library are divided into fiction and non-fiction.
examples.chinese: 该图书馆内的藏书分成小说类和非小说类。

examples.english: He also produced works of non-fiction.
examples.chinese: 他还创作了一些非小说类作品。

examples.english: a disturbing non-fiction account of events in Vietnam
examples.chinese: 对在越南发生的事情令人不安的写实叙述

centers.english: a book about someone's life

examples.english: She's the author of three acclaimed biographies.
examples.chinese: 她是三本备受好评的传记作品的作者。

examples.english: This is a competent and well-researched biography.
examples.chinese: 这本传记内容精彩，资料翔实。

examples.english: Boswell's biography of Dr Johnson
examples.chinese: 博斯韦尔为约翰逊博士写的传记

examples.english: ‘Paul McCartney: Many Years from Now’ is an authorized biography of the former Beatle by Barry Miles.
examples.chinese: 《保罗·麦卡特尼：陈年旧事》是有关这位前披头士乐队成员的经认可的传记，由巴里·迈尔斯撰写。

examples.english: He has slammed an unauthorised biography which he claims contains ‘factual errors’.
examples.chinese: 他猛烈抨击一本未经授权而写的传记，认为书中有一些“与事实不符的错误”。

examples.english: Although she has written three novels, this autobiography is her first published work.
examples.chinese: 她虽然写过三本小说，这本自传却是她第一本出版的作品。

examples.english: In her autobiography, Doris Lessing writes about her childhood in Zimbabwe.
examples.chinese: 多丽丝·莱辛在她的自传中写到她在津巴布韦度过的童年生活。

examples.english: The incident is recounted in his autobiography.
examples.chinese: 他在自传中讲述了这一事件。

examples.english: The duke's memoirs will be serialised in The Sunday Times.
examples.chinese: 公爵的回忆录将在《星期日泰晤士报》上连载。

examples.english: Reading Bready's unpublished memoirs, I was struck by her courage and resilience.
examples.chinese: 读了布雷迪那本未出版的回忆录后，我被她的勇气和坚韧所感动。

examples.english: ‘I felt lost, abandoned,’ she wrote in her memoirs.
examples.chinese: “我感觉迷失了，被遗弃了。”她在回忆录中写道。

examples.english: I wouldn't really show anyone my diary, not even you.
examples.chinese: 我不愿意给任何人看我的日记，甚至你也不行。

examples.english: During his illness, David kept a diary, which his family hopes to publish.
examples.chinese: 戴维在患病期间一直记日记，他的家人希望能将它出版。

examples.english: I decided to keep a diary of our trip to Toronto.
examples.chinese: 我决定把我们去多伦多的旅程记到日记里。

examples.english: In the 1837 journal, Darwin gives an account of his voyage to South America.
examples.chinese: 达尔文在1837年的日记中记录了他去南美洲的航程。

examples.english: Her book draws on letters, diaries, journals and historical sources.
examples.chinese: 她的书取材于信件、日记、日志以及历史资料。

examples.english: I was given access to his private papers and journals.
examples.chinese: 我获准翻阅他的私人文件和日记。

examples.english: Jewish life is poignantly described in Wiesel's journal, ‘The Jews of Silence’.
examples.chinese: 威塞尔的日记《沉默的犹太人》对他们的生活有着辛酸的描述。

centers.english: a book that gives you information about a subject
centers.chinese: 为某学科提供信息的书

examples.english: Do not remove reference books from the library.
examples.chinese: 别把工具书拿出图书馆。

examples.english: ‘The Elements of Style’ is a classic reference book written by the late E.B. White.
examples.chinese: 《文体学基础》是已故的E.B.怀特所写的一本经典参考书。

examples.english: Talk to the career counselors and check out the reference books on career choices.
examples.chinese: 去和就业顾问谈谈，并去查找一些有关选择职业的参考书。

examples.english: ‘Does anyone know when Mozart was born?’ ‘Look it up in the encyclopedia.’
examples.chinese: “有谁知道莫扎特的出生年月吗？”“查一查百科全书吧。”

examples.english: a thirty-volume encyclopaedia
examples.chinese: 一套三十卷的百科全书

examples.english: the Encyclopedia of Science
examples.chinese: 科学大百科

examples.english: The grant covers the costs of tuition, fees and textbooks.
examples.chinese: 助学金够付学费和课本费。

examples.english: Most economics textbooks skip over the subject of investing and financial markets.
examples.chinese: 大多数经济学教科书中都略去了投资及金融市场这一课题。

examples.english: I can't get hold of any of the college textbooks he recommended.
examples.chinese: 他推荐的那几本大学教材，我一本都找不到。

centers.english: someone who writes books

examples.english: When I was young, I wanted to be a famous writer.
examples.chinese: 小时候，我想长大后当个名作家。

examples.english: Greene was one of the finest writers of his generation.
examples.chinese: 格林是他那一代人中最杰出的作家之一。

examples.english: Do you have any books by modern American writers?
examples.chinese: 你有现代美国作家的作品吗？

expressions.text: (the) writer George Eliot/Arthur C. Clarke etc

examples.english: Among his influences, he places Wynton Marsalis and writer Stanley Goode.
examples.chinese: 说到对他有影响的人，他列举了温顿·马萨利斯及作家斯坦利·古德。

examples.english: Rush is a poet and writer of fiction.
examples.chinese: 拉什是一位诗人及小说作家。

examples.english: It seems likely that Campbell's book is almost wholly attributable to a ghostwriter.
examples.chinese: 看来坎贝尔的那本书差不多全是由别人代写的。

examples.english: Balzac was one of her favourite authors.
examples.chinese: 巴尔扎克是她最喜欢的作家之一。

examples.english: A little gentle encouragement is all that is needed to put this promising author into the ranks of the high-flyers.
examples.chinese: 只需稍加鼓励就足可让这位有前途的作者晋身一流作家的行列。

examples.english: The prize was won by the German author, Heinrich Böll.
examples.chinese: 该奖由德国作家海因里希·博尔获得。

examples.english: Among the guests was the author Salman Rushdie.
examples.chinese: 宾客中有作家萨曼·拉什迪。

examples.english: Who was the author of ‘Catch 22’?
examples.chinese: 《第22条军规》的作者是谁？

examples.english: We will be interviewing Lisa Mainero, author of ‘Office Romance’.
examples.chinese: 我们将会采访《办公室罗曼史》的作者莉莎·梅内罗。

examples.english: With co-author Eyre, Barlow has produced a book charting the history of African music.
examples.chinese: 巴洛与合著者艾尔一起写了一本记录非洲音乐史的书。

examples.english: Charles Dickens was one of the greatest 19th century novelists.
examples.chinese: 查尔斯·狄更斯是19世纪最伟大的小说家之一。

examples.english: Japanese novelists deal with the question of old age in a way few other writers can aspire to.
examples.chinese: 日本小说家在处理年老这个问题上无人能出其右。

examples.english: The book quotes from the diaries of novelist Evelyn Waugh.
examples.chinese: 该书中有些引语出自小说家伊夫琳·沃的日记。

examples.english: Budding gay novelist Larry Kramer is enjoying success at last.
examples.chinese: 崭露头角的同性恋小说家拉里·克雷默终于尝到了成功的滋味。

centers.english: the people in a book

examples.english: Her female characters often have strong, important relationships with other women.
examples.chinese: 她笔下的女性角色通常都与其他女性有着牢固而重要的关系。

examples.english: She reminds you of a character from Dickens.
examples.chinese: 她让人想起狄更斯笔下的一个角色。

examples.english: Sisyphus, the character from Greek mythology
examples.chinese: 希腊神话中的人物西绪福斯

examples.english: The main character is a soldier in the First World War.
examples.chinese: 主人公是第一次世界大战时的一名士兵。

examples.english: He writes Westerns in which the main characters are gay.
examples.chinese: 他写美国西部小说，其中的主角都是同性恋。

examples.english: King Henry is the name given to a donkey, the title character in the children's book, ‘King Henry Saves Christmas’.
examples.chinese: “亨利国王”是一头驴子的名字，它是儿童故事《亨利国王拯救了圣诞节》中的主角。

examples.english: Ancient literature uses fictional characters to illustrate moral dilemmas.
examples.chinese: 古代文学作品中常用虚构的人物来表现道德困境。

examples.english: By the story's end, the heroine finds herself in the hero's arms, and all ends well.
examples.chinese: 故事结尾时，女主角发现自己倚在男主角的胳膊里，欢喜收场。

examples.english: ‘Cinderella’ is the story of a downtrodden heroine who wins out over her sisters.
examples.chinese: 《灰姑娘》讲的是一个饱受欺凌的女主人公的故事，她最终摆脱了姐姐的欺压。

examples.english: Paul Morel is the hero of ‘Sons and Lovers’.
examples.chinese: 保罗·莫雷尔是《儿子与情人》的男主角。

centers.english: to produce a book

examples.english: ‘Moby Dick’ was first published in London in 1851.
examples.chinese: 《白鲸》于1851年在伦敦首次出版。

examples.english: ‘I've had a remarkable life,’ says the 60-year-old author, who has published 35 books.
examples.chinese: 那位60岁的作家说道：“我过去的生活很不平凡。”他出版过的书多达35本。

examples.english: King has made history by publishing a novel on the World Wide Web.
examples.chinese: 金在互联网上出版了一本小说，开创了历史先河。

examples.english: A lot of work goes on behind the scenes to prepare a book like this for publication.
examples.chinese: 为出版这样的一本书，幕后进行了大量的准备工作。

examples.english: She sent off the completed manuscript to 34 publishers before getting it accepted.
examples.chinese: 她把完成的书稿寄给了34家出版商后，此书才得以出版。

examples.english: How long have you worked in publishing?
examples.chinese: 你在出版界工作有多久了?

examples.english: Electronic publishing is a rapidly expanding field.
examples.chinese: 电子出版业是一个增长迅速的领域。

examples.english: Fay Weldon has just brought out a new collection of stories.
examples.chinese: 费伊·韦尔登刚出版了一本新的故事集。

examples.english: Scribner will bring out a memoir by Candace Gringritch in the autumn.
examples.chinese: 斯克里布纳出版社今年秋天将出版坎达丝·格林格里奇的回忆录。

examples.english: He phoned to say they want to bring out a second edition.
examples.chinese: 他来电话说他们打算出第二版。

centers.english: a company

examples.english: The company employs over 10,000 people worldwide.
examples.chinese: 那家公司在全世界雇用了一万多名员工。

examples.english: It is the second largest insurance company in Germany.
examples.chinese: 这是德国第二大保险公司。

examples.english: My father used to work for one of the big oil companies.
examples.chinese: 我爸爸过去在一家大石油公司工作。

examples.english: Davis joined the company as vice-president of sales nine months ago.
examples.chinese: 九个月前，戴维斯加盟那家公司，任职销售副总裁。

examples.english: The company was set up in 1975.
examples.chinese: 该公司于1975年成立。

examples.english: Hanson decided to start his own management consulting firm.
examples.chinese: 汉森决定创办自己的管理咨询公司。

examples.english: She works for a law firm in Amsterdam.
examples.chinese: 她在阿姆斯特丹一家律师事务所工作。

examples.english: Edward got a job with a firm of accountants in London.
examples.chinese: 爱德华获得一份伦敦会计师事务所的工作。

examples.english: Harris joined the firm in 1992.
examples.chinese: 哈里斯于1992年加入那家公司。

examples.english: Jack's thinking of starting his own business.
examples.chinese: 杰克在考虑自己办公司。

examples.english: Several small businesses have folded closed in recent months.
examples.chinese: 在最近几个月中，有数家小公司倒闭。

examples.english: Don and his wife run their own business.
examples.chinese: 唐和妻子经营自己的公司。

examples.english: Profits have slowly increased since we started the business three years ago.
examples.chinese: 自从我们三年前创建公司以来，利润有了缓慢增长。

examples.english: His oldest daughter, 31, owns a small printing business in Fresno.
examples.chinese: 他的大女儿31岁，在弗雷斯诺经营一家小印刷公司。

examples.english: His sons have worked in the family business for years.
examples.chinese: 他的几个儿子已在家族企业里工作多年。

examples.english: Sharp Electronics is the U.S. subsidiary of Japan's Sharp Corporation.
examples.chinese: 夏普电子公司是日本夏普集团的美国分公司。

examples.english: Relco plans to establish a subsidiary company in the UK with a capital of around $4m.
examples.chinese: 雷尔科计划以400万美元左右的资金在英国开设分公司。

examples.english: Many dotcoms fail in their first year of trading.
examples.chinese: 许多网络公司开业第一年就倒闭了。

examples.english: Investment analysts are predicing another dotcome boom.
examples.chinese: 投资分析家预计网络公司还有一次繁荣。

examples.english: She works for a small internet start-up.
examples.chinese: 她在一家新成立的小网络公司上班。

examples.english: start-up companies
examples.chinese: 新成立的小公司

centers.english: a very big company

examples.english: The recording business is now controlled by multinational corporations.
examples.chinese: 唱片业现在由跨国公司控制。

examples.english: the power of the big multinationals
examples.chinese: 大跨国集团的实力

examples.english: IBM is one of the biggest corporations in the world.
examples.chinese: 国际商业机器公司是世界最大的公司之一。

examples.english: U.S. corporations sold nearly $6.2 billion in new stock in May -- the highest monthly volume in history.
examples.chinese: 5月份美国的大公司发行了价值62亿美元的新股——创月发行量历史新高。

examples.english: A vast American conglomerate has announced plans to buy the site at a cost of well over a billion dollars.
examples.chinese: 一家庞大的美国联合大企业已经宣布计划以远远超过十亿美元的价格购买这块地皮。

examples.english: In the mid-1980s the big financial conglomerates muscled into the market.
examples.chinese: 20世纪80年代中期，一些庞大的金融联合大企业挤进了市场。

examples.english: The German media conglomerate Kronstadt AG reported record earnings last year.
examples.chinese: 德国媒体联合企业集团喀琅施塔得公司报道，去年的利润创了纪录。

centers.english: when a company operates in many different parts of the world
centers.chinese: 一家公司在世界许多地方经营业务

examples.english: Globalization has brought very little real benefit to developing countries.
examples.chinese: 全球化给发展中国家带来的实际利益很少。

examples.english: The history of capitalism has been a history of the globalization of production.
examples.chinese: 资本主义的历史是生产全球化的历史。

examples.english: a demonstration against globalization
examples.chinese: 反对全球化的示威游行

centers.english: relating to a company

examples.english: Company profits have more than doubled in the last four years.
examples.chinese: 在过去的四年里，公司利润增长了一倍多。

examples.english: One of the benefits of the job is the use of a company car.
examples.chinese: 这份工作的好处之一是可以用公司提供的汽车。

examples.english: A spokesman said company policy doesn't allow comment on mergers and acquisitions.
examples.chinese: 一位发言人说，公司政策不允许对并购发表评论。

examples.english: Ad campaigns are used to both bolster sales and improve corporate image.
examples.chinese: 广告活动用于增加销量和改善企业形象两方面。

examples.english: Fisher, 37, will be responsible for corporate planning.
examples.chinese: 费希尔37岁，将负责公司规划。

examples.english: The company is moving its corporate headquarters from Philadelphia to New York.
examples.chinese: 该公司将把公司总部从费城搬到纽约。

centers.english: abbreviation for different types of company

examples.english: Stevenson Securities Ltd
examples.chinese: 史蒂文森证券有限公司

examples.english: Syquest Technology Inc.
examples.chinese: 赛快技术有限公司

examples.english: Federal Express Corp.
examples.chinese: 联邦快递公司

examples.english: Henry Butt and Co. Ltd
examples.chinese: 亨利·巴特有限公司

examples.english: Imperial Life Assurance Co. of Canada
examples.chinese: 加拿大帝国人寿保险公司

examples.english: Marks & Spencer plc
examples.chinese: 玛莎公共有限公司

centers.english: a manager

examples.english: I'd like to speak to the manager.
examples.chinese: 我想和经理谈谈。

examples.english: the advertising manager of a mail-order company
examples.chinese: 邮购公司的广告部经理

examples.english: All new loans must be approved by the bank manager.
examples.chinese: 所有新贷款都必须由银行经理批准。

examples.english: She's one of our regional sales managers.
examples.chinese: 她是我们的一个地区销售经理。

examples.english: Does your boss know you're looking for another job?
examples.chinese: 你的老板知道你在另找工作吗？

examples.english: There's a new guy at work who's always trying to impress the boss.
examples.chinese: 公司里有个新来的家伙老是想方设法要讨好老板。

examples.english: The front page of the paper announced ‘Company bosses get record pay increases’.
examples.chinese: 报纸头版上报道：“公司主管们的工资增长创新高”。

examples.english: We were visited by a young, dynamic executive from a small computer company.
examples.chinese: 一家小规模电脑公司的年轻而富有活力的经理拜访了我们。

examples.english: Clifford, a former congressman, is now an executive for a large charity.
examples.chinese: 前国会议员克利福德现在是一家大型慈善机构的主管。

examples.english: a psychiatrist who specializes in executive stress
examples.chinese: 一位专治管理人员压力症的精神科医生

examples.english: Anton hated the foreman, who was never satisfied with anyone's work.
examples.chinese: 安东讨厌那个工头，他对任何人的工作都从没满意过。

examples.english: He spoke as though he were a rich landowner instead of just the foreman of a modest building firm.
examples.chinese: 他说起话来好像他是有钱的地主，而不是一家小建筑公司里的一个小工头。

examples.english: We still need to replace the office supervisor.
examples.chinese: 我们仍需要更换办公室主任。

examples.english: She has worked her way up the company and is now supervisor of 50 staff members.
examples.chinese: 她在公司里工作，一路升职，现在是50名员工的主管了。

examples.english: If you want to take a holiday, first ask your line manager.
examples.chinese: 如果你要去度假，先去征求部门经理的意见。

examples.english: Jan is based in Birmingham and reports to the Head of Marketing.
examples.chinese: 简在伯明翰工作，向营销主任汇报。

centers.english: a manager in a high position

examples.english: The directors are meeting today to discuss the company's future.
examples.chinese: 董事们今天开会商讨公司的未来。

examples.english: Have you met the new finance director?
examples.chinese: 你见过新来的财务经理了吗？

examples.english: Dr Jane Wilde, director of the Health Promotion Agency
examples.chinese: 简·怀尔德博士，健康促进局的主任

examples.english: Universal Studios is looking for a new chief executive.
examples.chinese: 环球影片公司正在物色一位新的总裁。

examples.english: the CEO of General Motors
examples.chinese: 通用汽车公司的总裁

examples.english: Angry shareholders called for the resignation of the company president.
examples.chinese: 愤怒的股东们要求公司董事长辞职。

examples.english: the president of CBS news
examples.chinese: 哥伦比亚广播公司新闻部的总裁

examples.english: Meyer hopes to become the company's first female vice president.
examples.chinese: 迈耶希望成为该公司首位女性副总裁。

examples.english: the vice president for sales and marketing
examples.chinese: 销售与市场部副总裁

examples.english: the VP of corporate affairs
examples.chinese: 企业事务副总裁

examples.english: Doreen's leaving party looked more like a board meeting, with the chairman and directors there to say goodbye.
examples.chinese: 多琳的离职聚会看上去更像是一次董事会议，董事长和董事们都来和他道别。

examples.english: Manley gradually worked her way up, and within ten years became chairwoman of the board.
examples.chinese: 曼利逐步升职，十年之内就成了董事长。

examples.english: The Chairman of British Airways visited Downing Street last week.
examples.chinese: 英国航空公司主席上周访问了唐宁街。

examples.english: Silva has been appointed managing director of the sales division.
examples.chinese: 席尔瓦被任命为销售部总经理。

examples.english: He's the managing director of a small printing firm.
examples.chinese: 他是一家小印刷公司的常务董事。

examples.english: the former head of MI5, the British Intelligence Service
examples.chinese: 军情五处，即英国情报机构的前主任

examples.english: She's the head of research and development.
examples.chinese: 她是研究与开发部的主管。

centers.english: a manager who is in a lower position

examples.english: The deputy director is authorized to act in the director's absence.
examples.chinese: 副主任被授权在主任缺位时行使管理权。

examples.english: He became the deputy head of the FBI at the age of only 36.
examples.chinese: 他年仅36岁时就成了美国联邦调查局的副局长。

examples.english: I left the planning to my second- in-command while I was away.
examples.chinese: 我不在时就把订计划的事留给了我的副手去做。

examples.english: She had been second- in-command at the nursing home and was now a senior manager in one of the big Boston hospitals.
examples.chinese: 她以前是这家疗养院的副经理，现在是波士顿一家大医院的高级经理。

centers.english: a group of managers

examples.english: Talks between the workers and the management broke down today.
examples.chinese: 今天劳资双方的谈判破裂了。

examples.english: Senior management seem to be completely out of touch with their staff's needs.
examples.chinese: 高级管理层似乎完全不了解员工的需求。

examples.english: There are only two women on the company's board of directors.
examples.chinese: 公司董事会里只有两名女性。

examples.english: Last year the board approved use of funds to improve staff training.
examples.chinese: 去年董事会同意动用资金来改善雇员的培训质量。

expressions.text: be appointed to the board (of directors)

examples.english: Carmichael was appointed to the board in July.
examples.chinese: 卡迈克尔在7月份被任命进入董事会。

examples.english: An emergency board meeting was hastily arranged.
examples.chinese: 很匆忙地安排了一次紧急董事会议。

examples.english: Head office must approve any order for new equipment.
examples.chinese: 订购新设备必须得到总部批准。

examples.english: In the past, strategy was dictated by the head office.
examples.chinese: 在过去，策略是由总部完全主导的。

examples.english: The powers that be have decided that our lunch breaks should be reduced to 45 minutes.
examples.chinese: 掌权者们已决定把我们的午饭时间减为45分钟。

centers.english: the job of being a manager

examples.english: Val has finished college and is looking for a job in management.
examples.chinese: 瓦尔已经大学毕业，正在找一份管理工作。

examples.english: a course aimed at improving management skills
examples.chinese: 一门旨在提高管理技巧的课程

examples.english: The failure of many small businesses is caused by bad management.
examples.chinese: 许多小企业的倒闭都是管理不善造成的。

examples.english: This is her first managerial job.
examples.chinese: 这是她的第一个管理职务。

examples.english: This is the biggest crisis of his managerial career.
examples.chinese: 这是他管理生涯中遇到的最严重的危机。

examples.english: Managerial skills and technical expertise are often in short supply.
examples.chinese: 通晓管理技巧与专业技术知识的人员经常供不应求。

centers.english: to work for a company, person etc

examples.english: How long have you worked for Mr Jackson?
examples.chinese: 你为杰克逊先生工作有多长时间了？

examples.english: My Dad's been working for IBM for over twenty years.
examples.chinese: 我爸爸在国际商业机器公司公司工作了二十多年。

examples.english: Russell is working as a software developer for Microsoft.
examples.chinese: 拉塞尔在微软公司当软件开发员。

examples.english: She was the first woman pilot to be employed by a commercial airline.
examples.chinese: 她是第一位被商业航空公司雇用的女飞行员。

examples.english: The number of people employed in the construction industry has been falling for many years.
examples.chinese: 建筑行业的雇用人数多年来一直在下降。

examples.english: Just before the company closed in 1968, there were 300 people on the payroll.
examples.chinese: 就在1968年倒闭之前，该公司有雇员300人。

examples.english: Ames exposed 34 intelligence agents on the payroll of the US or its allies.
examples.chinese: 埃姆斯抖出了受雇于美国及其盟国的34名特工。

examples.english: Police questioned everyone on the staff at the hotel.
examples.chinese: 警察查问了酒店每一个职员。

examples.english: Valerie has been on the staff of the French Department at Reading University since 1992.
examples.chinese: 自1992年起，瓦莱丽就在雷丁大学法语系任职。

examples.english: I believe he's with Random House now.
examples.chinese: 我相信现在他在兰登书屋工作。

examples.english: I used to be with the BBC, but then I got the chance of being a producer for Channel Four.
examples.chinese: 我过去为英国广播公司工作，后来得到机会当了第四频道的制作人。

examples.english: We will need a reference from your last employer before we can send you a contract.
examples.chinese: 我们给你合同之前，需要你上一位雇主的推荐信。

examples.english: She applied to her employer for a redundancy payment, but she was refused.
examples.chinese: 她向雇主申请裁员补偿，但是遭到拒绝。

centers.english: to work independently and not for someone else

examples.english: Martin is a self-employed builder.
examples.chinese: 马丁是自雇建筑工。

examples.english: Most fashion models are self-employed, and find work through agencies.
examples.chinese: 大多数时装模特儿是个体经营，通过代理人寻找工作。

examples.english: The government gives generous tax allowances to the self-employed.
examples.chinese: 政府给自由职业者很大的免税额。

examples.english: She runs her own business, making and selling hand-knitted clothes.
examples.chinese: 她自己做老板，制作及销售手工编织的衣服。

examples.english: It's always been Maria's ambition to have her own business.
examples.chinese: 玛丽亚的抱负一直是自己做生意。

examples.english: People wanting to set up their own business should take expert financial advice.
examples.chinese: 如想自己创业，应该听听专业的财务方面的建议。

examples.english: Jamie's trying to earn a living as a freelance photographer.
examples.chinese: 杰米试图以自由摄影师为业谋生。

examples.english: Karen stayed at home while the children were small, and made a little money from freelance writing.
examples.chinese: 孩子小的时候卡伦待在家里，以自由写作赚一点钱。

examples.english: If you work freelance from home, your hours are completely flexible.
examples.chinese: 要是你在家做自由职业，你的时间完全是灵活的。

examples.english: I'd built up a number of contacts in the world of graphic design, so in the end I went freelance.
examples.chinese: 我在平面设计界建立了一些联系，因此到最后我做起了自由职业。

examples.english: I'm not good at taking orders from anybody -- I prefer being my own boss.
examples.chinese: 我不喜欢听任何人的吩咐—我情愿自己当老板。

examples.english: Jim sacrificed a television career to set up in business and be his own boss.
examples.chinese: 吉姆放弃了电视台的职业，自己创业当老板。

centers.english: someone who works for a company or organization
centers.chinese: 为一个公司或组织工作的人

examples.english: We need better communication between the management and the workers.
examples.chinese: 我们的管理层和员工之间需要更好的沟通。

examples.english: The report shows that male manual workers earn twice as much as female workers.
examples.chinese: 报告显示男性体力劳动者的收入是女性体力劳动者的两倍。

examples.english: Tony was a retired post-office worker.
examples.chinese: 托尼是个退休的邮局工人。

examples.english: Ambulance workers threatened to refuse all calls for twenty-four hours on New Year's Eve.
examples.chinese: 救护车工作人员威胁说除夕夜24小时拒绝接求助电话。

examples.english: Despite the high unemployment rate, there is a shortage of skilled workers in some sectors.
examples.chinese: 尽管失业率高，但有些行业还是缺熟练工人。

examples.english: There is increasing social mobility among senior white collar workers, who are able to move quite rapidly between organizations.
examples.chinese: 高级白领的社会流动性越来越大，他们能够在企业之间迅速流动。

examples.english: The report showed that blue collar workers lost ten days a year due to ill health, compared with five days for white collar workers.
examples.chinese: 报告显示，蓝领每年因病缺勤十天，相比之下白领是五天。

examples.english: We are a multi-national corporation with 140,000 employees worldwide.
examples.chinese: 我们是一家跨国公司，全球共有14万名雇员。

examples.english: Employees of American Airlines get generous reductions on the cost of flights.
examples.chinese: 美国航空的雇员享有很大的机票折扣。

examples.english: Training opportunities are available to all members of staff.
examples.chinese: 所有职员都有培训机会。

examples.english: At certain stages of a project, most staff members are expected to work additional hours when needed.
examples.chinese: 一个项目进展到某些阶段，如有需要大部分员工都得加班。

examples.english: Mr Vickers has been with the firm for forty years, and is their longest-serving member of staff.
examples.chinese: 维克斯先生在这家公司干了40年，是服务时间最长的员工。

examples.english: All employees have a formal annual interview with the senior member of staff responsible for their work.
examples.chinese: 所有员工每年都与负责他们工作的高级职员进行一次正式面谈。

centers.english: all the people who work in a company, organization, or country
centers.chinese: 在一个公司、组织或国家里工作的所有的人

examples.english: The staff were clearly worried about rumours of job losses.
examples.chinese: 所有职员显然在为裁员的传闻担心。

examples.english: Our library staff will be happy to help if you are unable to find the book you want.
examples.chinese: 要是你找不到需要的书，我们图书馆的工作人员会很乐意提供帮助。

examples.english: Ford is looking for part-time sales staff.
examples.chinese: 福特公司在招聘兼职销售员工。

examples.english: In 1998, she joined the President's personal staff in the White House.
examples.chinese: 1998年，她成为白宫的总统个人幕僚。

examples.english: Women make up 41% of the workforce.
examples.chinese: 女性占全体劳动力的41%。

examples.english: Cook began his cost-cutting campaign by getting rid of a third of his workforce.
examples.chinese: 库克以裁去三分之一的雇员来开始他的降低成本运动。

examples.english: Large-scale growth in this type of farming is limited by the climate and the high cost of labour.
examples.chinese: 这种农业的大规模发展受到气候和劳动力成本高的制约。

examples.english: Many industries are reporting a shortage of skilled labor.
examples.chinese: 许多行业都说缺乏熟练工人。

examples.english: The labour force is growing at a rate of 4% a year.
examples.chinese: 劳动力正以每年4%的速度增长。

examples.english: Our produce prices cannot compete with those of Spain, with its cheap labour and sunshine.
examples.chinese: 我们的农产品价格无法与西班牙竞争，他们那里有廉价劳工和充足的阳光。

examples.english: In the event of a fire, all personnel must report to the reception area.
examples.chinese: 如果发生火警，所有员工必须到接待处报到。

examples.english: One of her responsibilities is recruiting highly trained personnel.
examples.chinese: 她的职责之一是招聘训练有素的职员。

examples.english: The police say they don't have sufficient manpower to patrol the area.
examples.chinese: 警方说他们没有足够的人力来负责该地区的巡逻。

examples.english: At the time there was a major shortage of trained manpower in computer science in the US.
examples.chinese: 当时在美国，计算机科学领域里训练有素的劳动力极其短缺。

examples.english: The Commission was set up to look at the management of the manpower resources of the National Health Service.
examples.chinese: 成立这个委员会是为了研究国民保健制度的人力资源的管理情况。

centers.english: someone that you work with

examples.english: I'd like you to meet a colleague of mine, Jean-Michel Blanc from our Paris office.
examples.chinese: 我来给你介绍我的一位同事——我们巴黎办事处的让-米歇尔·布朗。

examples.english: Jenny is a conscientious manager, very popular with her colleagues.
examples.chinese: 珍妮是个认真负责的经理，深受同事爱戴。

examples.english: Having the support of close family, friends and workmates is important to us all.
examples.chinese: 有亲密的家人、朋友和同事的支持对我们大家都很重要。

examples.english: Kevin had come home really upset after a quarrel with a workmate.
examples.chinese: 凯文与一位同事吵架后，回到家里气呼呼的。

examples.english: Wantz's job is to teach employees how to handle difficult bosses and co-workers.
examples.chinese: 万茨的工作是教雇员如何与难相处的老板和同事打交道。

examples.english: The manual explains what to do if a co-worker is injured and in need of medical attention.
examples.chinese: 这本手册说明了如果同事受伤需要治疗时该做些什么。

centers.english: when there are not enough people working in a company etc

examples.english: It's crazy that unemployment is sky-high while so many companies are still understaffed.
examples.chinese: 失业率极高，却还有那么多公司人手不足，这真是荒谬。
