examples.english: The few public health clinics that existed were filthy and understaffed.
examples.chinese: 仅有的几个公共医疗中心卫生条件差，而且人手不足。

examples.english: Schools in inner city areas are often short-staffed because the work is particularly stressful.
examples.chinese: 旧城区的学校常人手短缺，因为那里的工作压力特别大。

examples.english: After three hours, Mrs Morrison was told that her operation had been cancelled because the hospital was short-staffed.
examples.chinese: 三小时后，莫里森太太被告知因为医院人手短缺，所以她的手术取消了。

examples.english: Let me know if you're short-handed -- I'll get a couple of the boys to help out.
examples.chinese: 你缺人手的话跟我说一声，我会叫几个男孩子来帮忙。

centers.english: time when you are allowed to be away from work or school
centers.chinese: 可以不上班或不上学的时间

examples.english: I get four weeks’ holiday each year.
examples.chinese: 我每年有四个星期的假期。

examples.english: Work has been so hectic - I really need a holiday.
examples.chinese: 工作非常繁忙—我真的需要休一次假了。

examples.english: July 20th is the first day of the summer holidays.
examples.chinese: 7月20日是暑假的第一天。

examples.english: Last year we spent most of the Christmas holiday at our grandma's.
examples.chinese: 去年圣诞节我们大部分时间都在祖母家里度过。

examples.english: As a boy, Luckett spent his holidays here in Ledsham.
examples.chinese: 小时候，勒基特就在这里—莱兹汉姆度假。

examples.english: We try to do as many different activities as we can with the children during the school holidays.
examples.chinese: 学校放假期间，我们尽可能陪孩子们进行各种各样的活动。

examples.english: I want you to write about your vacation.
examples.chinese: 我要你写一篇有关你假期的文章。

examples.english: The company allows us 14 vacation days a year.
examples.chinese: 公司一年给我们14天休假。

examples.english: Under the new plan, students will have shorter summer vacations and longer winter vacations.
examples.chinese: 根据新的方案，学生的暑假短了，寒假长了。

examples.english: I spent part of my Christmas vacation with my dad's family.
examples.chinese: 圣诞节假期里有一部分时间我是和爸爸的亲戚一起过的。

examples.english: The skating rink will be open from 8 a.m. to 8 p.m. during summer vacation.
examples.chinese: 暑假里滑冰场的营业时间是早上8点到晚上8点。

examples.english: He worked at the resort during his college vacations.
examples.chinese: 他大学时候寒暑假就在这个度假胜地打工。

examples.english: The students get a few days’ break in February.
examples.chinese: 学生在2月份有几天的假期。

examples.english: Daytona Beach is preparing for the thousands of college students who will arrive for spring break.
examples.chinese: 代托纳比奇沙滩正在准备接待成千上万的大学生来度春假。

examples.english: Can you take a break next month?
examples.chinese: 你下个月能休假吗？

examples.english: Wednesday is my only day off this week.
examples.chinese: 星期三是我这个星期唯一的休息日。

examples.english: I've got a day off on Friday -- I'll come and see you then.
examples.chinese: 我星期五休息—到时我来看你。！

examples.english: Can you take the morning off tomorrow?
examples.chinese: 你明天上午请假行吗？

examples.english: Is Phyllis taking any time off when you're there?
examples.chinese: 你在那里的时候，菲莉丝有没有请假？

examples.english: I'll get some time off around Christmas.
examples.chinese: 圣诞节前后我要请假休息几天。

examples.english: I get twenty-five days’ leave a year.
examples.chinese: 我每年有25天休假。

examples.english: Phil still has three days’ annual leave owing to him.
examples.chinese: 菲尔还有三天年休假。

examples.english: They got married while he was on leave from the army.
examples.chinese: 他们是在他从部队回来休假的时候结婚的。

examples.english: It rained all through half-term.
examples.chinese: 放期中假的时候天天下雨。

examples.english: Half-term is the last week in October.
examples.chinese: 期中假在10月的最后一个星期。

centers.english: a day's holiday when all the shops, banks etc are closed
centers.chinese: 所有商店、银行等都关门的一个假日

examples.english: We'd forgotten that July 14th was a holiday in France.
examples.chinese: 我们忘了7月14日是法国的法定假日。

examples.english: St Patrick's Day is a national holiday in Ireland.
examples.chinese: 圣帕特里克节是爱尔兰的民族节日。

examples.english: This shop is closed on Sundays and public holidays.
examples.chinese: 这家商店逢星期天和公共假日不营业。

examples.english: The roads are always busy on bank holidays.
examples.chinese: 每逢公共假日马路上总是很繁忙。

centers.english: time when you travel to another place for enjoyment

examples.english: France is the ideal place for a romantic holiday.
examples.chinese: 法国是进行浪漫之旅的理想去处。

examples.english: Mrs Southey is on holiday in Florida.
examples.chinese: 索锡夫人正在佛罗里达度假。

examples.english: Karl will take care of the house while we're on vacation.
examples.chinese: 我们去度假的时候，卡尔会照看房子。

examples.english: I had two weeks’ holiday in Thailand last year.
examples.chinese: 去年我在泰国度了两个星期的假。

examples.english: We couldn't afford to take a vacation at the moment.
examples.chinese: 目前我们没有能力去度假。

examples.english: They take a two-week family vacation every summer.
examples.chinese: 他们每年夏天都要举家出游两个星期。

examples.english: This year we're going to Colorado on a five-day skiing trip.
examples.chinese: 今年我们打算去科罗拉多进行五天的滑雪之旅。

examples.english: They went on a trip to Australia and loved it.
examples.chinese: 他们到澳洲旅行了一次，开心极了。

examples.english: Every year Peter goes on a fishing trip with all his old friends.
examples.chinese: 每年彼得都要和所有的老朋友一起进行一次垂钓之旅。

examples.english: We have enough money saved to take a trip to Cancun.
examples.chinese: 我们已经攒够了钱去坎昆旅行。

examples.english: We had our honeymoon in Majorca.
examples.chinese: 我们在马略卡岛度了蜜月。

examples.english: Where are you going on honeymoon?
examples.chinese: 你们打算去哪儿度蜜月？

centers.english: someone who is on holiday

examples.english: More than 3 million American tourists visit Britain every year.
examples.chinese: 每年有超过300万的美国游客到英国旅游。

examples.english: Tourists can use the colour-coded map to guide themselves on walks of the city.
examples.chinese: 游客可以利用这张标有色标的地图作指引，寻找城里的旅游路线。

examples.english: The town seems so empty in the autumn when all the holidaymakers have gone home.
examples.chinese: 秋天的时候，所有度假的人都回家了，整座城镇看上去空荡荡的。

examples.english: In the 1950s, vacationers flocked to resorts in the Catskills.
examples.chinese: 20世纪50年代，度假者一窝蜂地拥到卡茨基尔的度假胜地。

examples.english: All the honeymooners will receive a free bottle of champagne.
examples.chinese: 所有蜜月夫妇都将免费获赠一瓶香槟。

centers.english: to go for a holiday somewhere

examples.english: We used to go on holiday in Scotland when we were kids.
examples.chinese: 我们小时候经常去苏格兰度假。

examples.english: Make sure you get insurance before you go on holiday.
examples.chinese: 去度假之前一定要买好保险。

examples.english: Most families go on vacation during the summer.
examples.chinese: 夏天大多数家庭都去度假。

examples.english: We're going away for two weeks in June.
examples.chinese: 6月份我们要外出度假两个星期。

examples.english: Martha and Tom are going away this weekend.
examples.chinese: 玛莎和汤姆这个周末要出去度假。

examples.english: We managed to get away for a week in August.
examples.chinese: 我们8月份总算出去休了一个星期的假。

examples.english: Yosemite is a great place to get away from it all.
examples.chinese: 约塞米蒂是一个逍遥度假的好地方。

examples.english: Carlos just took off for Venezuela for three weeks.
examples.chinese: 卡洛斯刚刚去委内瑞拉度假三个星期。

centers.english: a place where people go or stay on holidays

examples.english: Acapulco is one of Mexico's most popular resorts.
examples.chinese: 阿卡普尔科是墨西哥最热门的度假胜地之一。

examples.english: Lift tickets at most ski resorts are about $30 to $40 a day.
examples.chinese: 大多数滑雪胜地的缆车票大约都在30到40美元一天。

examples.english: Graceland, Elvis Presley's former home, is now a tourist attraction that draws more than 600,000 visitors every year.
examples.chinese: 埃尔维斯·普雷斯利故居优雅园，现在成了一个旅游景点，每年吸引着六十多万名游客前往。

examples.english: Amsterdam is the Netherlands’ most popular tourist destination.
examples.chinese: 阿姆斯特丹是荷兰最热门的一个旅游点。

examples.english: Phuket is an international tourist destination 430 miles south of Bangkok.
examples.chinese: 普吉岛是一个国际性的旅游胜地，位于曼谷以南430英里。

examples.english: Residents are worried that the president's home town will turn into a tourist trap.
examples.chinese: 居民担心总统的家乡将会变成一个敲游客竹杠的地方。

examples.english: College students work at a camp for kids from the inner city, leading craft activities and sports competitions.
examples.chinese: 大学生们在一个为来自旧城区的儿童组织的活动营地里工作，带领他们做手工艺活，进行体育比赛。

examples.english: A girl's basketball camp is being organized by the City Recreation Department.
examples.chinese: 市康乐局正在筹组一个女子篮球营。

examples.english: He's going to a Boy Scout summer camp for two weeks in August.
examples.chinese: 8月份他要去参加一个为期两周的男童子军夏令营。

examples.english: The YMCA is running a day camp with crafts, sports, and water fun.
examples.chinese: 基督教青年会正在举办一个日间活动营，活动包括手工艺、体育和水上游乐。

examples.english: She won a talent show at a holiday camp in Wales.
examples.chinese: 她在威尔士一个度假营的才艺比赛上得了奖。

examples.english: The seven-day cruise stops at Cabo San Lucas, Puerto Vallarta and other Mexican resorts.
examples.chinese: 七天的海上游览要在圣卢卡斯角、巴亚尔塔港以及墨西哥其他的一些旅游胜地停靠。

examples.english: a luxury cruise ship
examples.chinese: 一艘豪华游轮

examples.english: The tour includes stops in Salzburg and Vienna.
examples.chinese: 这次旅游会在萨尔茨堡和维也纳停留。

examples.english: Package tours that include tickets to Olympic events have sold well.
examples.chinese: 包括奥运会赛事门票的包价旅游很受欢迎。

examples.english: Many Swedes have small vacation homes on a lake shore.
examples.chinese: 许多瑞典人都在湖边拥有一栋度假小屋。

examples.english: They have a timeshare in Majorca.
examples.chinese: 他们在马略卡岛拥有一栋分时享用的度假屋。

examples.english: Campgrounds in Glacier National Park open in late May and early June.
examples.chinese: 冰川国家公园的营地于5月底、6月初开放。

examples.english: Most French towns have a municipal campsite.
examples.chinese: 大多数法国城镇都有一个由市政府设立的营地。

examples.english: We stayed at a cheap hostel in the centre of Prague.
examples.chinese: 我们住在布拉格市中心一家便宜的旅舍里。

centers.english: the business of arranging holidays for people
centers.chinese: 为人们安排度假的生意

examples.english: Restrictions introduced to control foot and mouth disease have hit the tourist industry hard.
examples.chinese: 为控制手足口病而采取的限制措施给旅游业带来了很大的打击。

examples.english: In the U.S., the travel industry is the second largest employer in the nation.
examples.chinese: 在美国，旅游业是全国第二大雇主。

examples.english: As part of a plan to increase tourism, visitors staying less than 90 days do not need a visa.
examples.chinese: 促进旅游业增长的其中一个方案是逗留时间不超过90天的游客无需签证。

examples.english: The country relies on tourism and the sale of raw materials for hard currency.
examples.chinese: 这个国家依赖旅游业和原材料的销售赚取硬通货。

examples.english: Travel agencies issue at least 80 percent of all airline tickets.
examples.chinese: 旅行社签发的机票至少占全部机票的80%。

examples.english: Check with your travel agent for the best rates.
examples.chinese: 向你的旅行代理人查询最优惠的价钱。

examples.english: Student tour guides take visitors on a one-hour tour of the campus.
examples.chinese: 学生导游带参观者在校园里进行一个小时的游览。

examples.english: According to our tour guide, Gibraltar is the largest fortress in the world.
examples.chinese: 我们的导游说，直布罗陀是世界上最大的军事要塞。
